general.g_text: 과일을 빨리 익히기 위해 화학 물질이 사용되기도 한다. 그러나 화학 물질로 익힌 과일은 겉은 익었지만 속이 잘 익지 않은 경우가 많다. 그래서 화학 물질로 익힌 과일은 대개 자연적으로 숙성된 과일에 비해 맛과 향이 떨어진다. ( ) 화학 물질이 과일 껍질에 남게 될 수도 있다. 이런 과일을 지속적으로 먹으면 건강에 문제가 생기게 된다.

g_text_translate.vi: Hóa chất đôi khi được sử dụng để làm chín trái cây nhanh hơn. Tuy nhiên, hoa quả dùng hóa chất thường chín bên ngoài nhưng không chín bên trong. Do đó, trái cây chín bằng hóa chất thường không thơm và không ngon bằng trái cây chín tự nhiên. (  ) Hóa chất có thể vẫn còn trên vỏ trái cây. Nếu thường xuyên ăn những loại trái cây như vậy có thể dẫn đến các vấn đề sức khỏe.
g_text_translate.en: Chemicals are sometimes used to ripen the fruit faster. However, chemically ripened fruits often ripen on the outside but not on the inside. As a result, chemically ripened fruits usually have a lower taste and aroma than naturally-ripened fruits. Chemicals may also be left on the peel of the fruit. Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.
g_text_translate.fr:
Des produits chimiques sont parfois utilisés pour faire mûrir les fruits plus rapidement. Cependant, les fruits mûris chimiquement mûrissent souvent à l'extérieur mais pas à l'intérieur. En conséquence, les fruits mûris chimiquement ont généralement un goût et un arôme inférieurs à ceux des fruits mûris naturellement. Des produits chimiques peuvent également être laissés sur la peau du fruit. La consommation régulière de ces fruits peut entraîner des problèmes de santé.

#######

Chemicals are sometimes used to ripen the fruit faster. However, chemically ripened fruits often ripen on the outside but not on the inside. As a result, chemically ripened fruits usually have a lower taste and aroma than naturally-ripened fruits. Chemicals may also be left on the peel of the fruit. Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.
g_text_translate.es:
A veces se utilizan productos químicos para madurar la fruta más rápido. Sin embargo, las frutas maduradas químicamente a menudo maduran por fuera pero no por dentro. Como resultado, las frutas maduradas químicamente suelen tener un sabor y un aroma más bajos que las frutas maduradas naturalmente. También se pueden dejar productos químicos en la cáscara de la fruta. El consumo regular de estas frutas puede conducir a problemas de salud.

#######

Chemicals are sometimes used to ripen the fruit faster. However, chemically ripened fruits often ripen on the outside but not on the inside. As a result, chemically ripened fruits usually have a lower taste and aroma than naturally-ripened fruits. Chemicals may also be left on the peel of the fruit. Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.
g_text_translate.id:
Bahan kimia terkadang digunakan untuk mematangkan buah lebih cepat. Namun, buah yang matang secara kimiawi sering kali matang di luar tetapi tidak di dalam. Akibatnya, buah yang matang secara kimiawi biasanya memiliki rasa dan aroma yang lebih rendah daripada buah yang matang secara alami. Bahan kimia juga dapat tertinggal di kulit buah. Mengkonsumsi buah-buahan ini secara teratur dapat menyebabkan masalah kesehatan.

#######

Chemicals are sometimes used to ripen the fruit faster. However, chemically ripened fruits often ripen on the outside but not on the inside. As a result, chemically ripened fruits usually have a lower taste and aroma than naturally-ripened fruits. Chemicals may also be left on the peel of the fruit. Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.
g_text_translate.ja:
果物をより早く熟すために化学薬品が使用されることがあります。ただし、化学的に熟成された果物は、多くの場合、外側は熟しますが、内側は熟しません。その結果、化学的に熟成された果物は、通常、自然に熟した果物よりも味と香りが低くなります。果物の皮に化学物質が残ることもあります。これらの果物を定期的に摂取すると、健康上の問題を引き起こす可能性があります。

#######

Chemicals are sometimes used to ripen the fruit faster. However, chemically ripened fruits often ripen on the outside but not on the inside. As a result, chemically ripened fruits usually have a lower taste and aroma than naturally-ripened fruits. Chemicals may also be left on the peel of the fruit. Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.
g_text_translate.de:
Manchmal werden Chemikalien verwendet, um die Frucht schneller reifen zu lassen. Chemisch gereifte Früchte reifen jedoch oft außen, aber nicht innen. Folglich haben chemisch gereifte Früchte in der Regel einen geringeren Geschmack und ein geringeres Aroma als natürlich gereifte Früchte. Chemikalien können auch auf der Fruchtschale zurückbleiben. Der regelmäßige Verzehr dieser Früchte kann zu gesundheitlichen Problemen führen.

#######

Chemicals are sometimes used to ripen the fruit faster. However, chemically ripened fruits often ripen on the outside but not on the inside. As a result, chemically ripened fruits usually have a lower taste and aroma than naturally-ripened fruits. Chemicals may also be left on the peel of the fruit. Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
有时会使用化学物质使水果更快成熟。然而，化学成熟的水果通常在外面成熟，而不是在里面。因此，化学成熟的水果通常比自然成熟的水果具有更低的味道和香气。化学物质也可能留在水果的果皮上。定期食用这些水果会导致健康问题。

#######

Chemicals are sometimes used to ripen the fruit faster. However, chemically ripened fruits often ripen on the outside but not on the inside. As a result, chemically ripened fruits usually have a lower taste and aroma than naturally-ripened fruits. Chemicals may also be left on the peel of the fruit. Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
有時會使用化學物質使水果更快成熟。然而，化學成熟的水果通常在外面成熟，而不是在裡面。因此，化學成熟的水果通常比自然成熟的水果具有更低的味道和香氣。化學物質也可能留在水果的果皮上。定期食用這些水果會導致健康問題。

#######

Chemicals are sometimes used to ripen the fruit faster. However, chemically ripened fruits often ripen on the outside but not on the inside. As a result, chemically ripened fruits usually have a lower taste and aroma than naturally-ripened fruits. Chemicals may also be left on the peel of the fruit. Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.
g_text_translate.it:
A volte vengono utilizzati prodotti chimici per far maturare il frutto più velocemente. Tuttavia, i frutti maturati chimicamente spesso maturano all'esterno ma non all'interno. Di conseguenza, i frutti maturati chimicamente di solito hanno un gusto e un aroma inferiori rispetto ai frutti maturati naturalmente. Le sostanze chimiche possono anche essere lasciate sulla buccia del frutto. Il consumo regolare di questi frutti può portare a problemi di salute.

#######

Chemicals are sometimes used to ripen the fruit faster. However, chemically ripened fruits often ripen on the outside but not on the inside. As a result, chemically ripened fruits usually have a lower taste and aroma than naturally-ripened fruits. Chemicals may also be left on the peel of the fruit. Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.
g_text_translate.ru:
Химические вещества иногда используются для ускорения созревания фруктов. Однако химически созревшие плоды часто созревают снаружи, а не внутри. В результате фрукты, созревшие химическим путем, обычно имеют более слабый вкус и аромат, чем плоды, созревшие естественным путем. Химические вещества также могут оставаться на кожуре фруктов. Регулярное употребление этих фруктов может привести к проблемам со здоровьем.

#######

Chemicals are sometimes used to ripen the fruit faster. However, chemically ripened fruits often ripen on the outside but not on the inside. As a result, chemically ripened fruits usually have a lower taste and aroma than naturally-ripened fruits. Chemicals may also be left on the peel of the fruit. Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.

g_text_translate.pt:
Às vezes, produtos químicos são usados ​​para amadurecer a fruta mais rapidamente. No entanto, os frutos quimicamente amadurecidos muitas vezes amadurecem por fora, mas não por dentro. Como resultado, as frutas amadurecidas quimicamente geralmente têm sabor e aroma inferiores aos das frutas amadurecidas naturalmente. Produtos químicos também podem ficar na casca da fruta. O consumo regular dessas frutas pode causar problemas de saúde.

g_text_translate.hi:
फलों को जल्दी पकाने के लिए कभी-कभी रसायनों का उपयोग किया जाता है। हालाँकि, रासायनिक रूप से पके फल अक्सर बाहर तो पकते हैं लेकिन अंदर से नहीं। परिणामस्वरूप, रासायनिक रूप से पके फलों में आमतौर पर प्राकृतिक रूप से पके फलों की तुलना में कम स्वाद और सुगंध होती है। फलों के छिलके पर भी रसायन छोड़े जा सकते हैं। नियमित रूप से इन फलों का सेवन करने से स्वास्थ्य संबंधी समस्याएं हो सकती हैं।

#######

Consuming these fruits on a regular basis can lead to health problems.
g_text_translate.tr:
Bazen meyveyi daha hızlı olgunlaştırmak için kimyasallar kullanılır. Bununla birlikte, kimyasal olarak olgunlaşmış meyveler genellikle dıştan olgunlaşır, ancak içten olgunlaşmaz. Sonuç olarak, kimyasal olarak olgunlaşmış meyveler genellikle doğal olarak olgunlaşmış meyvelere göre daha düşük tat ve aromaya sahiptir. Meyvenin kabuğunda da kimyasal maddeler kalabilir. Bu meyvelerin düzenli olarak tüketilmesi sağlık sorunlarına yol açabilir.

explain.vi:
Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào chỗ trống.
1. Hay, hoặc, hoặc là
2. Hơn nữa
3. Dù vậy
4. Nếu vậy thì
--------------------
V/A + 는/은/ㄴ 경우가 있다: Có trường hợp rằng. 
N + 에 비해: So với N. 
V + 게 되다: Trở nên.

Dùng từ liên kết 또한 để bổ sung thông tin.

<g>V/A + 게 되다:</g> Became, came to, been decided.

general.g_text: 사람들은 보통 선택을 할 때 여러 가지 중에서 고르면 더 좋은 선택을 할 수 있을 것이라고 생각한다. 그래서 선택이 필요할 때 정보를 많이 수집하려고 노력한다. 그러나 선택의 수가 늘어나면 고민의 양도 함께 증가한다. (   )결정을 내리지 못하는 상황이 되는 것이다. 후회 없는 선택을 위한 노력이 오히려 선택을 방해하는 결과를 불러오게 된다.

g_text_translate.vi: Mọi người thường nghĩ rằng khi lựa chọn, nếu chọn một trong nhiều lựa chọn thì có thể chọn được cái tốt hơn. Vì vậy, khi cần lựa chọn ta thường cố gắng thu thập nhiều thông tin. Tuy nhiên, nếu số lựa chọn tăng lên thì theo đó sự phân vân cũng sẽ tăng lên. (  ) Trở thành tình huống không thể đưa ra quyết định. Nỗ lực để chọn sao cho không hối hận trái lại sẽ dẫn đến kết quả là cản trở khi lựa chọn.
g_text_translate.en: People usually think that when they make a choice, they will be able to make a better choice by choosing from several. So we try to gather a lot of information when we need to make a choice. However, as the number of choices increases, the amount of trouble also increases. It's a pain in the ass and you can't make decisions. Efforts to make a choice without regrets will, on the contrary, result in hindrance in choosing.
g_text_translate.fr:
Les gens pensent généralement que lorsqu'ils feront un choix, ils pourront faire un meilleur choix en choisissant parmi plusieurs. Nous essayons donc de rassembler beaucoup d'informations lorsque nous devons faire un choix. Cependant, à mesure que le nombre de choix augmente, la quantité de problèmes augmente également. C'est une douleur dans le cul et vous ne pouvez pas prendre de décisions. Les efforts pour faire un choix sans regret se traduiront au contraire par une entrave au choix.

#######

People usually think that when they make a choice, they will be able to make a better choice by choosing from several. So we try to gather a lot of information when we need to make a choice. However, as the number of choices increases, the amount of trouble also increases. It's a pain in the ass and you can't make decisions. Efforts to make a choice without regrets will, on the contrary, result in hindrance in choosing.
g_text_translate.es:
La gente suele pensar que cuando hace una elección, podrá hacer una mejor elección eligiendo entre varias. Así que tratamos de recopilar mucha información cuando necesitamos hacer una elección. Sin embargo, a medida que aumenta el número de opciones, también aumenta la cantidad de problemas. Es un dolor en el culo y no puedes tomar decisiones. Los esfuerzos por hacer una elección sin remordimientos, por el contrario, resultarán en obstáculos para elegir.

#######

People usually think that when they make a choice, they will be able to make a better choice by choosing from several. So we try to gather a lot of information when we need to make a choice. However, as the number of choices increases, the amount of trouble also increases. It's a pain in the ass and you can't make decisions. Efforts to make a choice without regrets will, on the contrary, result in hindrance in choosing.
g_text_translate.id:
Orang biasanya berpikir bahwa ketika mereka membuat pilihan, mereka akan dapat membuat pilihan yang lebih baik dengan memilih dari beberapa. Jadi kami mencoba mengumpulkan banyak informasi ketika kami perlu membuat pilihan. Namun, karena jumlah pilihan meningkat, jumlah masalah juga meningkat. Ini menyebalkan dan Anda tidak bisa membuat keputusan. Upaya menentukan pilihan tanpa penyesalan justru akan mengakibatkan hambatan dalam memilih.

#######

People usually think that when they make a choice, they will be able to make a better choice by choosing from several. So we try to gather a lot of information when we need to make a choice. However, as the number of choices increases, the amount of trouble also increases. It's a pain in the ass and you can't make decisions. Efforts to make a choice without regrets will, on the contrary, result in hindrance in choosing.
g_text_translate.ja:
人は何かを選ぶとき、いくつかの中から選ぶことでより良い選択ができると考えがちです。そのため、選択を行う必要がある場合は、多くの情報を収集しようとします。しかし、選択肢が増えれば増えるほど、トラブルも増えていきます。それはお尻の痛みであり、あなたは決断を下すことができません.後悔のない選択をしようとすると、かえって選択の妨げになります。

#######

People usually think that when they make a choice, they will be able to make a better choice by choosing from several. So we try to gather a lot of information when we need to make a choice. However, as the number of choices increases, the amount of trouble also increases. It's a pain in the ass and you can't make decisions. Efforts to make a choice without regrets will, on the contrary, result in hindrance in choosing.
g_text_translate.de:
Die Leute denken normalerweise, dass sie, wenn sie eine Wahl treffen, in der Lage sind, eine bessere Wahl zu treffen, indem sie aus mehreren wählen. Deshalb versuchen wir, viele Informationen zu sammeln, wenn wir eine Wahl treffen müssen. Mit zunehmender Anzahl an Auswahlmöglichkeiten nimmt jedoch auch die Menge an Schwierigkeiten zu. Es ist ein Schmerz im Arsch und du kannst keine Entscheidungen treffen. Die Bemühungen, eine Wahl ohne Reue zu treffen, werden im Gegenteil dazu führen, dass die Wahl behindert wird.

#######

g_text_translate.zh-CN:

g_text_translate.hi:
लोग आमतौर पर सोचते हैं कि जब वे कोई विकल्प चुनते हैं, तो वे कई में से चुनकर बेहतर विकल्प चुन सकेंगे। इसलिए जब हमें कोई विकल्प चुनने की आवश्यकता होती है तो हम बहुत सारी जानकारी इकट्ठा करने का प्रयास करते हैं। हालाँकि, जैसे-जैसे विकल्पों की संख्या बढ़ती है, परेशानी की मात्रा भी बढ़ती है। यह बहुत कष्टकारी है और आप निर्णय नहीं ले सकते। बिना पछतावे के चुनाव करने का प्रयास, इसके विपरीत, चयन में बाधा उत्पन्न करेगा।

Bu yüzden bir seçim yapmamız gerektiğinde çok fazla bilgi toplamaya çalışıyoruz. Ancak seçenek sayısı arttıkça sorunların miktarı da artıyor. Bu tam bir baş belası ve karar veremezsin. general.g_text: 한 과학자가 개인의 사회 공헌도에 대한 연구를 했다. 개인이 쏟을 수 있는 힘의 크기는 구성원의 수가 많아질수록 늘어날 것이라고 기대하고 연구를 진행했다. 하지만 연구 결과는 예상과 달랐다. 그룹의 구성원 수와 그들이 쏟아 부은 힘의 크기는 반비례했다. (   ) 2명으로 이루어진 그룹이 잠재적인 기대치를 가장 많이 사용한 것으로 나타났다.

g_text_translate.vi: Một nhà khoa học đã tiến hành một cuộc nghiên cứu về sự đóng góp của các cá nhân đối với xã hội. Nghiên cứu được thực hiện với kỳ vọng số lượng thành viên càng tăng thì sức mạnh mà một cá nhân có thể phát huy cũng càng tăng lên. Tuy nhiên, kết quả nghiên cứu không giống như mong đợi. Số lượng thành viên trong nhóm và sức mạnh mà họ bỏ ra tỷ lệ nghịch với nhau. (   ) người ta thấy rằng nhóm hai người lại có mức độ kỳ vọng tiềm năng cao nhất.
g_text_translate.en: A scientist conducted a study on the contribution of individuals to society. The research was conducted with the expectation that the amount of power that an individual can exert will increase as the number of members increases. However, the study results were not as expected. The number of group members and the power they exerted were inversely proportional to each other. Rather, it was found that the two-member group had the highest potential expectations.
g_text_translate.fr:
Un scientifique a mené une étude sur la contribution des individus à la société. La recherche a été menée dans l'espoir que la quantité de pouvoir qu'un individu peut exercer augmentera à mesure que le nombre de membres augmentera. Cependant, les résultats de l'étude n'étaient pas ceux attendus. Le nombre de membres du groupe et le pouvoir qu'ils exerçaient étaient inversement proportionnels l'un à l'autre. Au contraire, il a été constaté que le groupe de deux membres avait les attentes potentielles les plus élevées.

#######

A scientist conducted a study on the contribution of individuals to society. The research was conducted with the expectation that the amount of power that an individual can exert will increase as the number of members increases. However, the study results were not as expected. The number of group members and the power they exerted were inversely proportional to each other. Rather, it was found that the two-member group had the highest potential expectations.
g_text_translate.es:
Un científico realizó un estudio sobre la contribución de los individuos a la sociedad. La investigación se realizó con la expectativa de que la cantidad de poder que un individuo puede ejercer aumente a medida que aumenta el número de miembros. Sin embargo, los resultados del estudio no fueron los esperados. El número de miembros del grupo y el poder que ejercían eran inversamente proporcionales entre sí. Más bien, se encontró que el grupo de dos miembros tenía las expectativas potenciales más altas.

#######

The research was conducted with the expectation that the amount of power that an individual can exert will increase as the number of members increases. However, the study results were not as expected. The number of group members and the power they exerted were inversely proportional to each other. Rather, it was found that the two-member group had the highest potential expectations.
g_text_translate.id:
Seorang ilmuwan melakukan studi tentang kontribusi individu kepada masyarakat. Penelitian ini dilakukan dengan harapan bahwa jumlah kekuatan yang dapat diberikan oleh seorang individu akan meningkat seiring dengan bertambahnya jumlah anggota. Namun, hasil penelitian tidak seperti yang diharapkan. Jumlah anggota kelompok dan kekuatan yang mereka berikan berbanding terbalik satu sama lain. Sebaliknya, ditemukan bahwa kelompok dua anggota memiliki harapan potensial tertinggi.

#######

A scientist conducted a study on the contribution of individuals to society. The research was conducted with the expectation that the amount of power that an individual can exert will increase as the number of members increases. However, the study results were not as expected. The number of group members and the power they exerted were inversely proportional to each other. Rather, it was found that the two-member group had the highest potential expectations.
g_text_translate.ja:
ある科学者が、個人の社会への貢献に関する研究を行いました。個人が発揮できる力は、会員数が増えるほど大きくなるという期待のもとに研究を行いました。しかし、研究結果は予想通りではありませんでした。グループメンバーの数と彼らが発揮する力は互いに反比例していました。むしろ、2 人グループが潜在的な期待値が最も高いことがわかりました。

#######

A scientist conducted a study on the contribution of individuals to society. The research was conducted with the expectation that the amount of power that an individual can exert will increase as the number of members increases. However, the study results were not as expected. The number of group members and the power they exerted were inversely proportional to each other. g_text_translate.de:
Ein Wissenschaftler führte eine Studie über den Beitrag des Einzelnen zur Gesellschaft durch. Die Forschung wurde mit der Erwartung durchgeführt, dass die Macht, die ein Individuum ausüben kann, mit zunehmender Mitgliederzahl zunehmen wird. Die Studienergebnisse waren jedoch nicht wie erwartet. Die Anzahl der Gruppenmitglieder und die von ihnen ausgeübte Macht waren umgekehrt proportional zueinander. Vielmehr zeigte sich, dass die zweiköpfige Gruppe die höchsten potenziellen Erwartungen hatte.

#######

general.g_text: 현대 사회는 인구의 증가와 산업의 발전으로 인해서 환경오염이 심각한 수준에 이르렀다. 그 중에서도 수질 오염은 우리의 생존과 직결되는 중요한 문제이기 때문에 이에 대해 우려하는 사람들이 많다. 그러나 오염을 막기 위한 구체적인 노력은 부족해 보인다. 수질 오염을 방지하기 위해서는 (   )라는 말처럼 우리가 생활 속에서 할 수 있는 작은 노력부터 시작하는 것이 중요하다. 이러한 실천이 하나씩 이루어질 때 우리 자녀들이 깨끗한 물을 안심하고 마실 수 있게 될 것이다.

g_text_translate.vi: Trong xã hội hiện đại, ô nhiễm môi trường đã chạm tới mức nghiêm trọng do sự gia tăng dân số và sự phát triển của các ngành công nghiệp. Trong số đó, rất nhiều người lo ngại về vấn đề ô nhiễm nguồn nước vì đây là vấn đề quan trọng liên quan trực tiếp đến sự sống của con người. Tuy nhiên, những nỗ lực cụ thể để ngăn chặn ô nhiễm dường như vẫn chưa đủ. Giống như câu nói (   ), điều quan trọng là phải bắt đầu từ những nỗ lực nhỏ mà chúng ta có thể làm được trong cuộc sống hàng ngày. Khi những hành động thực tế như vậy được thực hiện thì con cái của chúng ta mới có thể an tâm uống những giọt nước sạch.
g_text_translate.en: In modern society, environmental pollution has reached serious levels due to population growth and the development of industries. Many people are concerned about water pollution because this is an important issue directly related to human life. However, concrete efforts to prevent pollution appear to be insufficient. It is important to start with the small efforts we can make in our lives, as it is said that even a one thousand kilometer journey begins with the first step. When such practical actions are taken, our children can safely drink drops of clean water.
g_text_translate.fr:
Dans la société moderne, la pollution de l'environnement a atteint des niveaux sérieux en raison de la croissance démographique et du développement des industries. Beaucoup de gens sont préoccupés par la pollution de l'eau car il s'agit d'un problème important directement lié à la vie humaine. Cependant, les efforts concrets de prévention de la pollution semblent insuffisants. Il est important de commencer par les petits efforts que nous pouvons faire dans notre vie, car on dit que même un voyage de mille kilomètres commence par le premier pas. Lorsque de telles mesures pratiques sont prises, nos enfants peuvent boire en toute sécurité des gouttes d'eau propre.

#######

In modern society, environmental pollution has reached serious levels due to population growth and the development of industries. Many people are concerned about water pollution because this is an important issue directly related to human life. However, concrete efforts to prevent pollution appear to be insufficient. It is important to start with the small efforts we can make in our lives, as it is said that even a one thousand kilometer journey begins with the first step. When such practical actions are taken, our children can safely drink drops of clean water.
g_text_translate.es:
En la sociedad moderna, la contaminación ambiental ha alcanzado niveles graves debido al crecimiento de la población y al desarrollo de las industrias. Muchas personas están preocupadas por la contaminación del agua porque este es un tema importante directamente relacionado con la vida humana. Sin embargo, los esfuerzos concretos para prevenir la contaminación parecen ser insuficientes. Es importante comenzar con los pequeños esfuerzos que podemos hacer en nuestra vida, ya que se dice que incluso un viaje de mil kilómetros comienza con el primer paso. Cuando se toman tales acciones prácticas, nuestros niños pueden beber gotas de agua limpia sin peligro.

#######

In modern society, environmental pollution has reached serious levels due to population growth and the development of industries. Many people are concerned about water pollution because this is an important issue directly related to human life. However, concrete efforts to prevent pollution appear to be insufficient. It is important to start with the small efforts we can make in our lives, as it is said that even a one thousand kilometer journey begins with the first step. When such practical actions are taken, our children can safely drink drops of clean water.
g_text_translate.id:
Dalam masyarakat modern, pencemaran lingkungan telah mencapai tingkat yang serius karena pertumbuhan penduduk dan perkembangan industri. Banyak orang prihatin dengan pencemaran air karena ini merupakan masalah penting yang berkaitan langsung dengan kehidupan manusia. Namun, upaya konkrit untuk mencegah polusi tampaknya tidak cukup. Penting untuk memulai dengan upaya kecil yang dapat kita lakukan dalam hidup kita, seperti yang dikatakan bahwa perjalanan seribu kilometer pun dimulai dengan langkah pertama. Ketika tindakan praktis seperti itu diambil, anak-anak kita dapat dengan aman minum setetes air bersih.

#######

In modern society, environmental pollution has reached serious levels due to population growth and the development of industries. Many people are concerned about water pollution because this is an important issue directly related to human life. However, concrete efforts to prevent pollution appear to be insufficient. It is important to start with the small efforts we can make in our lives, as it is said that even a one thousand kilometer journey begins with the first step. When such practical actions are taken, our children can safely drink drops of clean water.
g_text_translate.ja:
現代社会では、人口増加や産業の発展により、環境汚染が深刻なレベルに達しています。水質汚染は人の命に直結する重要な問題であるため、多くの人が懸念しています。しかし、公害防止への具体的な取り組みは不十分と思われます。千キロも最初の一歩からと言われているように、小さな努力から始めることが大切です。そのような実際的な行動が取られるとき、私たちの子供たちはきれいな水を安全に飲むことができます.

#######

In modern society, environmental pollution has reached serious levels due to population growth and the development of industries. Many people are concerned about water pollution because this is an important issue directly related to human life. However, concrete efforts to prevent pollution appear to be insufficient. It is important to start with the small efforts we can make in our lives, as it is said that even a one thousand kilometer journey begins with the first step. When such practical actions are taken, our children can safely drink drops of clean water.
g_text_translate.de:
In der modernen Gesellschaft hat die Umweltverschmutzung aufgrund des Bevölkerungswachstums und der Entwicklung von Industrien ein ernstes Ausmaß erreicht. Viele Menschen sind besorgt über die Wasserverschmutzung, da dies ein wichtiges Thema ist, das in direktem Zusammenhang mit dem menschlichen Leben steht. Konkrete Bemühungen zur Vermeidung von Umweltverschmutzung scheinen jedoch unzureichend zu sein. Es ist wichtig, mit den kleinen Anstrengungen zu beginnen, die wir in unserem Leben unternehmen können, denn es heißt, dass auch eine Reise von tausend Kilometern mit dem ersten Schritt beginnt. Wenn solche praktischen Maßnahmen ergriffen werden, können unsere Kinder sicher Tropfen sauberes Wasser trinken.

#######

In modern society, environmental pollution has reached serious levels due to population growth and the development of industries. Many people are concerned about water pollution because this is an important issue directly related to human life. However, concrete efforts to prevent pollution appear to be insufficient. It is important to start with the small efforts we can make in our lives, as it is said that even a one thousand kilometer journey begins with the first step. When such practical actions are taken, our children can safely drink drops of clean water.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
在现代社会，由于人口的增长和工业的发展，环境污染已经达到了严重的程度。许多人关心水污染，因为这是直接关系到人类生活的重要问题。然而，防止污染的具体努力似乎还不够。重要的是从我们在生活中所能做的微小的努力开始，因为有人说，即使是一千公里的旅程，也是从第一步开始的。当采取这样的实际行动时，我们的孩子可以安全地喝上几滴干净的水。

g_text_translate.zh-TW:
在現代社會，由於人口的增長和工業的發展，環境污染已經達到了嚴重的程度。許多人關心水污染，因為這是直接關係到人類生活的重要問題。然而，防止污染的具體努力似乎還不夠。重要的是從我們在生活中所能做的微小的努力開始，因為有人說，即使是一千公里的旅程，也是從第一步開始的。當採取這樣的實際行動時，我們的孩子可以安全地喝上幾滴乾淨的水。

g_text_translate.it:
Nella società moderna, l'inquinamento ambientale ha raggiunto livelli gravi a causa della crescita della popolazione e dello sviluppo delle industrie. Molte persone sono preoccupate per l'inquinamento delle acque perché questo è un problema importante direttamente correlato alla vita umana. Tuttavia, gli sforzi concreti per prevenire l'inquinamento sembrano insufficienti. È importante iniziare dai piccoli sforzi che possiamo fare nella nostra vita, poiché si dice che anche un viaggio di mille chilometri inizi con il primo passo. Quando vengono intraprese tali azioni pratiche, i nostri bambini possono tranquillamente bere gocce di acqua pulita.

g_text_translate.ru:
В современном обществе загрязнение окружающей среды достигло серьезного уровня из-за роста населения и развития промышленности. Многие люди обеспокоены загрязнением воды, поскольку это важная проблема, напрямую связанная с жизнью человека. Однако конкретные усилия по предотвращению загрязнения кажутся недостаточными. Важно начинать с небольших усилий, которые мы можем предпринять в своей жизни, ведь говорят, что даже путешествие в тысячу километров начинается с первого шага. Когда предпринимаются такие практические действия, наши дети могут спокойно пить капли чистой воды.

g_text_translate.th:
ในสังคมยุคใหม่ มลภาวะต่อสิ่งแวดล้อมถึงระดับร้ายแรงอันเนื่องมาจากการเติบโตของจำนวนประชากรและการพัฒนาของอุตสาหกรรม หลายๆ คนมีความกังวลเกี่ยวกับมลพิษทางน้ำ เนื่องจากนี่เป็นประเด็นสำคัญที่เกี่ยวข้องโดยตรงกับชีวิตมนุษย์ อย่างไรก็ตาม ความพยายามอย่างเป็นรูปธรรมในการป้องกันมลพิษดูเหมือนจะยังไม่เพียงพอ สิ่งสำคัญคือต้องเริ่มต้นด้วยความพยายามเล็กๆ น้อยๆ ที่เราสามารถทำได้ในชีวิต ดังที่กล่าวกันว่าแม้การเดินทางหนึ่งพันกิโลเมตรจะต้องเริ่มต้นด้วยก้าวแรก เมื่อดำเนินการดังกล่าวแล้ว ลูกหลานของเราก็สามารถดื่มน้ำสะอาดได้อย่างปลอดภัย

g_text_translate.pt:
Na sociedade moderna, a poluição ambiental atingiu níveis graves devido ao crescimento populacional e ao desenvolvimento das indústrias. Muitas pessoas estão preocupadas com a poluição da água porque esta é uma questão importante e diretamente relacionada à vida humana. Contudo, os esforços concretos para prevenir a poluição parecem ser insuficientes. É importante começar pelos pequenos esforços que podemos fazer na nossa vida, pois diz-se que mesmo uma viagem de mil quilómetros começa com o primeiro passo. Quando tais ações práticas são tomadas, nossos filhos podem beber gotas de água limpa com segurança.

g_text_translate.hi:
आधुनिक समाज में जनसंख्या वृद्धि और उद्योगों के विकास के कारण पर्यावरण प्रदूषण गंभीर स्तर पर पहुँच गया है। जल प्रदूषण को लेकर बहुत से लोग चिंतित हैं क्योंकि यह सीधे तौर पर मानव जीवन से जुड़ा एक महत्वपूर्ण मुद्दा है। हालाँकि, प्रदूषण रोकने के ठोस प्रयास नाकाफ़ी नज़र आ रहे हैं। हम अपने जीवन में जो छोटे-छोटे प्रयास कर सकते हैं, उनसे शुरुआत करना महत्वपूर्ण है, क्योंकि कहा जाता है कि एक हजार किलोमीटर की यात्रा भी पहले कदम से शुरू होती है। जब ऐसे व्यावहारिक कदम उठाए जाते हैं, तो हमारे बच्चे सुरक्षित रूप से साफ पानी की बूंदें पी सकते हैं।

#######

g_text_translate.tr:
Modern toplumda nüfus artışına ve sanayilerin gelişmesine bağlı olarak çevre kirliliği ciddi boyutlara ulaşmıştır. Pek çok insan su kirliliğinden endişe duyuyor çünkü bu doğrudan insan hayatını ilgilendiren önemli bir konu. Ancak kirliliğin önlenmesine yönelik somut çabalar yetersiz görünmektedir. Bin kilometrelik bir yolculuğun bile ilk adımla başladığı söylendiği için hayatımızda yapabileceğimiz küçük çabalarla başlamak önemlidir. Bu tür pratik önlemler alındığında çocuklarımız damla damla temiz suyu güvenle içebilirler.

general.g_text: 대부분의 상품은 고유 번호가 있어서 정품을 쉽게 확인할 수 있다. 그러나 미술품은 그렇지 않아서 진품 확인이 힘들다. (   ) 미술 작품이 진짜인지를 확인해야 하는 상황이라면 미술품 감정 과정이 필요하다. 미술품을 감정할 때에는 전문가 감정과 과학적 감정이 함께 사용되는데 이때 출처나 예술 기법, 서명 등이 고려된다. 이러한 방법은 고미술품에서 현대 작품에 이르기까지 광범위하게 적용되고 있다.

g_text_translate.vi: Đa số các sản phẩm đều có mã số định danh nên có thể dễ dàng nhận biết đâu là hàng chính hãng. Tuy nhiên, các tác phẩm mỹ thuật thì không như vậy nên rất khó để xác định đâu là tác phẩm thật. (  ) thật sự phải kiểm tra xem tác phẩm mỹ thuật đó có phải là thật hay không thì sẽ cần tới quá trình giám định tác phẩm. Khi giám định các tác phẩm mỹ thuật, các chuyên gia sẽ sử dụng cả sự giám định của bản thân và giám định mang tính khoa học. Nguồn gốc, kỹ xảo nghệ thuật, chữ ký,... cũng sẽ được xem xét một cách kỹ lưỡng. Phương pháp này được áp dụng rộng rãi từ các sản phẩm mỹ thuật cổ cho đến các tác phẩm hiện đại.
g_text_translate.en: Most products have a serial number, so you can easily identify the genuine product. However, art works are not so, so it is difficult to check the authenticity. If you need to verify that a work of art is genuine, you need an art appraisal process. When appraising a work of art, both expert and scientific appraisal are used, taking into account the source, art technique, and signature. This method is widely applied from antiques to modern works.
g_text_translate.fr:
La plupart des produits ont un numéro de série, ce qui vous permet d'identifier facilement le produit d'origine. Cependant, les œuvres d'art ne le sont pas, il est donc difficile de vérifier l'authenticité. Si vous avez besoin de vérifier qu'une œuvre d'art est authentique, vous avez besoin d'un processus d'évaluation de l'art. Lors de l'évaluation d'une œuvre d'art, une évaluation à la fois experte et scientifique est utilisée, en tenant compte de la source, de la technique artistique et de la signature. Cette méthode est largement appliquée des antiquités aux œuvres modernes.

#######

Most products have a serial number, so you can easily identify the genuine product. However, art works are not so, so it is difficult to check the authenticity. If you need to verify that a work of art is genuine, you need an art appraisal process. When appraising a work of art, both expert and scientific appraisal are used, taking into account the source, art technique, and signature. This method is widely applied from antiques to modern works.
g_text_translate.es:
La mayoría de los productos tienen un número de serie, por lo que puede identificar fácilmente el producto original. Sin embargo, las obras de arte no lo son, por lo que es difícil comprobar la autenticidad. Si necesita verificar que una obra de arte es genuina, necesita un proceso de tasación de arte. Al evaluar una obra de arte, se utilizan tanto la evaluación de expertos como la científica, teniendo en cuenta la fuente, la técnica del arte y la firma. Este método se aplica ampliamente desde las antigüedades hasta las obras modernas.

#######

Most products have a serial number, so you can easily identify the genuine product. However, art works are not so, so it is difficult to check the authenticity. If you need to verify that a work of art is genuine, you need an art appraisal process. When appraising a work of art, both expert and scientific appraisal are used, taking into account the source, art technique, and signature. This method is widely applied from antiques to modern works.
g_text_translate.id:
Sebagian besar produk memiliki nomor seri, sehingga Anda dapat dengan mudah mengidentifikasi produk asli. Namun, karya seni tidak demikian, sehingga sulit untuk diperiksa keasliannya. Jika Anda perlu memverifikasi bahwa sebuah karya seni itu asli, Anda memerlukan proses penilaian seni. Dalam menilai suatu karya seni, digunakan penilaian ahli dan ilmiah, dengan memperhatikan sumber, teknik seni, dan tanda tangan. Cara ini banyak diterapkan mulai dari barang antik hingga karya modern.

#######

Most products have a serial number, so you can easily identify the genuine product. However, art works are not so, so it is difficult to check the authenticity. If you need to verify that a work of art is genuine, you need an art appraisal process. When appraising a work of art, both expert and scientific appraisal are used, taking into account the source, art technique, and signature. This method is widely applied from antiques to modern works.
g_text_translate.ja:
ほとんどの製品にはシリアルナンバーが記載されているため、正規品を簡単に識別できます。ただ、美術品はそうではないので、真贋を確かめるのは難しいです。芸術作品が本物であることを確認する必要がある場合は、美術品の鑑定プロセスが必要です。芸術作品を鑑定する際には、出典、美術技法、署名を考慮して、専門家による鑑定と科学的鑑定の両方が使用されます。この技法は骨董品から現代作品まで幅広く応用されています。

#######

g_text_translate.de:
Die meisten Produkte haben eine Seriennummer, sodass Sie das Originalprodukt leicht identifizieren können. Kunstwerke sind dies jedoch nicht, daher ist es schwierig, die Echtheit zu überprüfen. Wenn Sie überprüfen müssen, ob ein Kunstwerk echt ist, benötigen Sie ein Kunstbewertungsverfahren. Bei der Begutachtung eines Kunstwerks werden sowohl die fachliche als auch die wissenschaftliche Begutachtung unter Berücksichtigung der Quelle, der Kunsttechnik und der Signatur herangezogen. Diese Methode ist weit verbreitet, von Antiquitäten bis hin zu modernen Werken.

#######

g_text_translate.it:
La maggior parte dei prodotti ha un numero di serie, in modo da poter identificare facilmente il prodotto originale. Tuttavia, le opere d'arte non lo sono, quindi è difficile verificarne l'autenticità. Se hai bisogno di verificare che un'opera d'arte sia autentica, hai bisogno di un processo di valutazione dell'arte. Quando si valuta un'opera d'arte, vengono utilizzate sia la valutazione esperta che quella scientifica, tenendo conto della fonte, della tecnica artistica e della firma. Questo metodo è ampiamente applicato dall'antiquariato alle opere moderne.

#######

Most products have a serial number, so you can easily identify the genuine product. However, art works are not so, so it is difficult to check the authenticity. If you need to verify that a work of art is genuine, you need an art appraisal process. When appraising a work of art, both expert and scientific appraisal are used, taking into account the source, art technique, and signature. This method is widely applied from antiques to modern works.
g_text_translate.ru:
Большинство продуктов имеют серийный номер, поэтому вы можете легко определить подлинный продукт. Однако произведения искусства не таковы, поэтому проверить подлинность сложно. Если вам необходимо убедиться в подлинности произведения искусства, вам необходим процесс оценки искусства. При оценке произведения искусства используются как экспертная, так и научная оценка с учетом источника, художественной техники и подписи. Этот метод широко применяется от антиквариата до современных произведений.

#######

Most products have a serial number, so you can easily identify the genuine product. However, art works are not so, so it is difficult to check the authenticity. If you need to verify that a work of art is genuine, you need an art appraisal process. When appraising a work of art, both expert and scientific appraisal are used, taking into account the source, art technique, and signature. This method is widely applied from antiques to modern works.

Na avaliação de uma obra de arte, utiliza-se tanto a avaliação especializada quanto a científica, levando em consideração a fonte, a técnica artística e a assinatura. Este método é amplamente aplicado desde antiguidades até obras modernas.

g_text_translate.hi:
अधिकांश उत्पादों पर एक सीरियल नंबर होता है, जिससे आप आसानी से असली उत्पाद की पहचान कर सकते हैं। हालाँकि, कलाकृतियाँ ऐसी नहीं होती हैं, इसलिए प्रामाणिकता की जाँच करना कठिन होता है। यदि आपको यह सत्यापित करने की आवश्यकता है कि कला का एक काम वास्तविक है, तो आपको एक कला मूल्यांकन प्रक्रिया की आवश्यकता है। कला के किसी कार्य का मूल्यांकन करते समय, स्रोत, कला तकनीक और हस्ताक्षर को ध्यान में रखते हुए विशेषज्ञ और वैज्ञानिक मूल्यांकन दोनों का उपयोग किया जाता है। यह पद्धति प्राचीन वस्तुओं से लेकर आधुनिक कार्यों तक व्यापक रूप से लागू की जाती है।

Bir sanat eserinin gerçek olduğunu doğrulamanız gerekiyorsa, bir sanat değerlendirme sürecine ihtiyacınız var. Bir sanat eserini değerlendirirken kaynak, sanat tekniği ve imza dikkate alınarak hem uzman hem de bilimsel değerlendirmeden yararlanılır. Bu yöntem antikalardan modern eserlere kadar yaygın olarak uygulanmaktadır.

general.g_text: 운동선수가 실수에 대한 부담감을 가지게 되면 경기에서 좋은 성적을 거두기가 어렵다. 그렇기 때문에 감독은 선수를 지도할 때 실수를 떠올리게 하는 직접적인 말을 (   ) 않아야 한다. 예를 들어 스케이트 선수들은 넘어지면 안 된다는 부담감이 크다. 그러므로 감독은 선수에게 넘어지지 말라는 말 대신에 중심을 잡고 스케이트를 타라고 주의를 주는 것이 좋다.

g_text_translate.vi: Nếu một vận động viên cảm thấy nặng nề với sơ xuất của mình thì rất khó có thể đạt được kết quả tốt trong trận đấu. Vì vậy mà khi chỉ đạo các cầu thủ, huấn luyện viên không được (  ) những lời trực tiếp khiến họ nhớ đến sơ xuất. Ví dụ như, sự lo lắng về việc bị ngã của các vận động viên trượt băng là rất lớn. Vì vậy các huấn luyện viên nên bảo họ chú ý trượt băng thay vì nói với họ rằng đừng để bị ngã.
g_text_translate.en: When an athlete becomes burdened with mistakes, it is difficult to achieve good results in competition. That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.fr:
Lorsqu'un athlète est accablé d'erreurs, il est difficile d'obtenir de bons résultats en compétition. C'est pourquoi les entraîneurs ne doivent pas dire des mots directs qui rappellent aux joueurs leurs erreurs lorsqu'ils les entraînent. Par exemple, les patineurs ressentent beaucoup de pression pour ne pas tomber. Par conséquent, il est préférable que l'entraîneur avertisse les joueurs de rester en équilibre et de patiner au lieu de leur dire de ne pas tomber.

#######

When an athlete becomes burdened with mistakes, it is difficult to achieve good results in competition. That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.es:
Cuando un atleta se carga de errores, es difícil lograr buenos resultados en la competencia. Es por eso que los entrenadores no deben decir palabras directas que les recuerden a los jugadores los errores cuando los entrenan. Por ejemplo, los patinadores sienten mucha presión para no caerse. Por lo tanto, es mejor que el entrenador advierta a los jugadores que mantengan el equilibrio y patinen en lugar de decirles que no se caigan.

#######

When an athlete becomes burdened with mistakes, it is difficult to achieve good results in competition. That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.id:
Ketika seorang atlet menjadi terbebani dengan kesalahan, sulit untuk mencapai hasil yang baik dalam kompetisi. Itu sebabnya pelatih tidak boleh mengucapkan kata-kata langsung yang mengingatkan pemain akan kesalahan saat melatih mereka. Misalnya, skater merasakan banyak tekanan untuk tidak jatuh. Oleh karena itu, lebih baik pelatih memperingatkan para pemain untuk tetap seimbang dan meluncur daripada menyuruh mereka untuk tidak jatuh.

#######

When an athlete becomes burdened with mistakes, it is difficult to achieve good results in competition. That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.ja:
アスリートがミスに悩まされると、競技で良い結果を出すことは難しくなります。そのため、コーチは、選手を指導する際にミスを思い出させる直接的な言葉を言うべきではありません。たとえば、スケーターは転ばないようにという大きなプレッシャーを感じます。したがって、コーチは選手に転ばないように言うよりも、バランスを保ってスケートをするように選手に警告する方がよい.

#######

When an athlete becomes burdened with mistakes, it is difficult to achieve good results in competition. That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.de:
Wenn ein Athlet mit Fehlern belastet wird, ist es schwierig, im Wettkampf gute Ergebnisse zu erzielen. Deshalb sollten Trainer beim Coaching keine direkten Worte sagen, die Spieler an Fehler erinnern. Zum Beispiel verspüren Skater einen großen Druck, nicht zu stürzen. Daher ist es für den Trainer besser, die Spieler zu warnen, das Gleichgewicht zu halten und zu skaten, anstatt ihnen zu sagen, dass sie nicht stürzen sollen.

#######

When an athlete becomes burdened with mistakes, it is difficult to achieve good results in competition. That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
运动员一旦犯错，就很难在比赛中取得好成绩。这就是为什么教练在指导球员时不应该直接说出提醒球员错误的话。例如，滑冰者感到很大的压力不要摔倒。因此，教练最好警告球员保持平衡并滑冰，而不是告诉他们不要摔倒。

#######

When an athlete becomes burdened with mistakes, it is difficult to achieve good results in competition. That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
運動員一旦犯錯，就很難在比賽中取得好成績。這就是為什麼教練在指導球員時不應該直接說出提醒球員錯誤的話。例如，滑冰者感到很大的壓力不要摔倒。因此，教練最好警告球員保持平衡並滑冰，而不是告訴他們不要摔倒。

#######

When an athlete becomes burdened with mistakes, it is difficult to achieve good results in competition. That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.it:
Quando un atleta si carica di errori, è difficile ottenere buoni risultati in gara. Ecco perché gli allenatori non dovrebbero dire parole dirette che ricordino ai giocatori gli errori quando li allenano. Ad esempio, i pattinatori sentono molta pressione per non cadere. Pertanto, è meglio per l'allenatore avvertire i giocatori di rimanere in equilibrio e pattinare invece di dire loro di non cadere.

#######

When an athlete becomes burdened with mistakes, it is difficult to achieve good results in competition. That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.ru:
Когда спортсмен обременен ошибками, ему сложно добиться хороших результатов на соревнованиях. Именно поэтому тренерам не следует произносить прямые слова, напоминающие игрокам об ошибках при их тренерской работе. Например, фигуристы испытывают сильное давление, чтобы не упасть. Поэтому тренеру лучше предупредить игроков, чтобы они сохраняли равновесие и катались, а не говорить им, чтобы они не падали.

#######

When an athlete becomes burdened with mistakes, it is difficult to achieve good results in competition. That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.

เมื่อนักกีฬาต้องแบกรับภาระจากความผิดพลาด เป็นเรื่องยากที่จะบรรลุผลการแข่งขันที่ดี นั่นเป็นเหตุผลที่โค้ชไม่ควรพูดคำพูดโดยตรงเพื่อเตือนผู้เล่นถึงข้อผิดพลาดเมื่อฝึกสอนพวกเขา ตัวอย่างเช่น นักสเก็ตรู้สึกกดดันมากที่จะไม่ล้ม ดังนั้นจึงเป็นการดีกว่าที่โค้ชจะเตือนผู้เล่นให้รักษาสมดุลและเล่นสเก็ต แทนที่จะบอกไม่ให้ล้ม

#######

Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.pt:
Quando um atleta fica sobrecarregado de erros, fica difícil conseguir bons resultados na competição. É por isso que os treinadores não devem dizer palavras diretas que lembrem os jogadores dos erros ao treiná-los. Por exemplo, os patinadores sentem muita pressão para não cair. Portanto, é melhor que o treinador avise os jogadores para se manterem equilibrados e patinarem, em vez de dizer-lhes para não caírem.

#######

That's why coaches should not say direct words that remind players of mistakes when coaching them. For example, skaters feel a lot of pressure not to fall. Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.hi:
जब एक एथलीट गलतियों से बोझिल हो जाता है, तो प्रतियोगिता में अच्छे परिणाम प्राप्त करना मुश्किल हो जाता है। इसीलिए कोचों को सीधे ऐसे शब्द नहीं कहने चाहिए जो खिलाड़ियों को कोचिंग देते समय उनकी गलतियों की याद दिलाते हों। उदाहरण के लिए, स्केटर्स को न गिरने का बहुत दबाव महसूस होता है। इसलिए, कोच के लिए यह बेहतर है कि वह खिलाड़ियों को गिरने न देने के लिए कहने के बजाय संतुलन बनाए रखने और स्केटिंग करने की चेतावनी दे।

#######

Therefore, it is better for the coach to warn the players to stay on balance and skate instead of telling them not to fall.
g_text_translate.tr:
Bir sporcu hatalarla yükümlü hale geldiğinde yarışmalarda iyi sonuçlar elde etmek zordur. Bu nedenle antrenörler, antrenörlük yaparken oyunculara hataları hatırlatacak doğrudan sözler söylememelidir. Örneğin patenciler düşmemek için çok fazla baskı hissederler. Bu nedenle antrenörün oyunculara düşmemelerini söylemek yerine dengede kalmaları ve kaymaları konusunda uyarması daha doğru olacaktır.

q_answer: 감독은 선수가 실수를 반복하지 않도록 지도해야 한다.

선수는 넘어져도 몇 번이고 다시 일어나려는 의지가 있어야 한다.
선수는 긍정적인 생각을 해서 경기에 대한 부담감을 없애야 한다.

3. Les joueurs doivent avoir la volonté de se relever encore et encore même s'ils tombent.
4. Les joueurs doivent penser positivement pour supprimer le fardeau du jeu.

지도하다 : Guider, instruire

general.g_text: 활쏘기는 쉬워 보이지만 판단력과 인내심이 필요한 운동이다. 활쏘기에서는 활을 쏘는 순간이 제일 중요하다. ( ) 언제 활을 쏘아야 할지 판단하는 것이 핵심이다. 또한 활을 쏘는 그 순간까지 숨을 멈추고 기다리는 인내심이 요구된다. 그렇기 때문에 판단력이 부족한 사람이나 인내심이 필요한 사람에게 매우 좋은 운동이라고 할 수 있다.

g_text_translate.vi: Bắn cung nhìn có vẻ dễ dàng nhưng lại là môn thể thao đòi hỏi khả năng phán đoán và sự kiên nhẫn. Trong bắn cung, thời điểm cung được bắn ra là quan trọng nhất. (   ) trọng tâm là phải phán đoán được khi nào thì nên bắn cung. Ngoài ra, bắn cung cũng đòi hỏi sự kiên nhẫn chờ đợi và nín thở cho đến khi cung được bắn đi. Vì vậy, đây có thể coi là môn thể thao rất có ích cho những người thiếu khả năng phán đoán hay người cần sự kiên nhẫn.
g_text_translate.en: Archery looks easy, but it is a sport that requires judgment and patience. In archery, the moment the bow is fired is the most important. In particular, deciding when to shoot the bow is key. In addition, archery also requires waiting patiently and holding your breath until the bow is fired. Therefore, this can be considered a very useful sport for those who lack judgment or who need patience.
g_text_translate.fr:
Le tir à l'arc semble facile, mais c'est un sport qui demande du jugement et de la patience. En tir à l'arc, le moment où l'arc est tiré est le plus important. En particulier, décider quand tirer à l'arc est essentiel. De plus, le tir à l'arc nécessite également d'attendre patiemment et de retenir son souffle jusqu'à ce que l'arc soit tiré. Par conséquent, cela peut être considéré comme un sport très utile pour ceux qui manquent de jugement ou qui ont besoin de patience.

#######

Archery looks easy, but it is a sport that requires judgment and patience. In archery, the moment the bow is fired is the most important. In particular, deciding when to shoot the bow is key. In addition, archery also requires waiting patiently and holding your breath until the bow is fired. Therefore, this can be considered a very useful sport for those who lack judgment or who need patience.
g_text_translate.es:
El tiro con arco parece fácil, pero es un deporte que requiere juicio y paciencia. En el tiro con arco, el momento en que se dispara el arco es el más importante. En particular, decidir cuándo disparar el arco es clave. Además, el tiro con arco también requiere esperar pacientemente y contener la respiración hasta que se dispare el arco. Por lo tanto, este puede considerarse un deporte muy útil para quienes carecen de criterio o necesitan paciencia.

#######

In addition, archery also requires waiting patiently and holding your breath until the bow is fired. Therefore, this can be considered a very useful sport for those who lack judgment or who need patience.

Oleh karena itu, ini dapat dianggap sebagai olahraga yang sangat berguna bagi mereka yang kurang penilaian atau yang membutuhkan kesabaran.

g_text_translate.ja:
アーチェリーは簡単に見えますが、判断力と忍耐力が求められるスポーツです。アーチェリーでは、弓を放つ瞬間が最も重要です。特に、弓を引くタイミングが重要です。さらに、アーチェリーでは、弓が発射されるまで息を止めて辛抱強く待つ必要があります。したがって、これは判断力のない人や忍耐力が必要な人にとって非常に役立つスポーツと見なすことができます.

#######

Archery looks easy, but it is a sport that requires judgment and patience. In archery, the moment the bow is fired is the most important. In particular, deciding when to shoot the bow is key. In addition, archery also requires waiting patiently and holding your breath until the bow is fired. Therefore, this can be considered a very useful sport for those who lack judgment or who need patience.
g_text_translate.de:
Bogenschießen sieht einfach aus, aber es ist ein Sport, der Urteilsvermögen und Geduld erfordert. Beim Bogenschießen ist der Moment, in dem der Bogen abgefeuert wird, der wichtigste. Insbesondere die Entscheidung, wann der Bogen geschossen wird, ist entscheidend. Darüber hinaus erfordert das Bogenschießen auch geduldiges Warten und Anhalten des Atems, bis der Bogen abgefeuert ist. Daher kann dies als sehr nützlicher Sport für diejenigen angesehen werden, denen es an Urteilsvermögen mangelt oder die Geduld brauchen.

#######

general.g_text: 최근 한 할아버지가 거리를 청소하면서 모은 돈 100여 만 원을 장학금으로 내놓았다. (    )이라고 지난 5년 동안 바닥에 버려진 10원짜리 동전을 하나하나씩 주워 모은 것이다. 사람들은 큰돈이 있어야만 다른 사람을 도와 줄 수 있다고 생각한다. 하지만 참된 기부란 돈의 액수가 중요한 것이 아니라 다른 사람을 향한 사랑의 마음이다.

g_text_translate.vi: Gần đây, một ông cụ đã bỏ ra khoảng 1 triệu won mà ông tích lũy được khi dọn dẹp đường phố làm học bổng. Như câu nói (   ), đây là số tiền ông tích góp được bằng cách nhặt từng đồng xu bị bỏ rơi trên mặt đất trong suốt năm năm qua. Mọi người thường nghĩ rằng phải có nhiều tiền thì mới giúp đỡ được người khác. Tuy nhiên, sự quyên góp thực sự không nằm ở số tiền mà điều quan trọng là tấm lòng yêu thương người khác.
g_text_translate.en: Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.fr:
Récemment, un vieil homme a donné environ 1 million de won qu'il avait accumulés en nettoyant les rues comme bourse. Comme le dit le dicton, beaucoup de mickles font des muckles, c'est la somme d'argent qu'il a accumulée en ramassant chaque centime qui a été abandonné sur le terrain au cours des 5 dernières années. Les gens pensent souvent qu'il faut beaucoup d'argent pour aider les autres. Cependant, le véritable don n'est pas dans le montant mais dans le cœur de l'amour pour les autres.

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.es:
Recientemente, un anciano regaló alrededor de 1 millón de wones que había acumulado mientras limpiaba las calles como beca. Como dice el dicho, many a mickle make a muckle, esta es la cantidad de dinero que ha acumulado recogiendo cada centavo que ha sido abandonado en el suelo durante los últimos 5 años. La gente suele pensar que se necesita mucho dinero para ayudar a los demás. Sin embargo, la verdadera donación no está en la cantidad sino en el corazón de amor por los demás.

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.id:
Baru-baru ini, seorang lelaki tua memberikan sekitar 1 juta won yang telah dia kumpulkan saat membersihkan jalanan sebagai beasiswa. Seperti pepatah banyak mickle membuat muckle, ini adalah jumlah uang yang dia kumpulkan dengan memungut setiap sen yang telah ditinggalkan di tanah selama 5 tahun terakhir. Orang sering berpikir bahwa dibutuhkan banyak uang untuk membantu orang lain. Namun, donasi yang sesungguhnya bukanlah dalam jumlah tetapi dalam hati kasih kepada sesama.

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.ja:
最近、あるおじいさんが、街を掃除して貯めた約100万ウォンを奨学金として寄付した。多くのミックルがマックルを作るということわざのように、これは彼が過去 5 年間に地面に捨てられたすべてのペニーを拾うことによって蓄積した金額です。人々は、他人を助けるには多額の費用がかかると考えがちです。しかし、本当の寄付は金額ではなく、他者への愛の心にあります。

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.de:
Kürzlich verschenkte ein alter Mann etwa 1 Million Won, die er beim Straßenputzen angesammelt hatte, als Stipendium. Wie das Sprichwort manch ein Mickle macht, ist dies die Menge an Geld, die er angesammelt hat, indem er jeden Pfennig aufhob, der in den letzten 5 Jahren auf dem Boden liegen gelassen wurde. Die Leute denken oft, dass es viel Geld braucht, um anderen zu helfen. Die eigentliche Spende liegt jedoch nicht in der Höhe, sondern im Herzen der Liebe zu anderen.

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
最近，一位老人把清扫街道时积累的约100万韩元作为奖学金赠送了出去。俗话说一毛钱一毛，这就是他捡起过去5年被遗弃在地上的每一分钱所积累的钱。人们常常认为帮助别人需要很多钱。然而，真正的捐赠不在数量，而在于对他人的爱。

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
最近，一位老人把清掃街道時積累的約100萬韓元作為獎學金贈送了出去。俗話說一毛錢一毛，這就是他撿起過去5年被遺棄在地上的每一分錢所積累的錢。人們常常認為幫助別人需要很多錢。然而，真正的捐贈不在數量，而在於對他人的愛。

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.it:
Di recente, un anziano ha donato circa 1 milione di won che aveva accumulato mentre puliva le strade come borsa di studio. Come dice il detto many a mickle does a muckle, questa è la quantità di denaro che ha accumulato raccogliendo ogni centesimo che è stato abbandonato a terra negli ultimi 5 anni. Le persone spesso pensano che ci vogliano molti soldi per aiutare gli altri. Tuttavia, la vera donazione non sta nell'importo ma nel cuore dell'amore per gli altri.

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.ru:
Недавно пожилой мужчина отдал в качестве стипендии около 1 миллиона вон, которые он накопил во время уборки улиц. Как говорится, «много денег — это мусор», это сумма денег, которую он накопил, собирая каждую копейку, брошенную на земле за последние 5 лет. Люди часто думают, что чтобы помочь другим, нужно много денег. Однако настоящее пожертвование заключается не в сумме, а в сердце любви к другим.

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.th:
เมื่อเร็ว ๆ นี้ ชายชราคนหนึ่งมอบเงินประมาณ 1 ล้านวอนที่เขาสะสมไว้ขณะทำความสะอาดถนนเป็นทุนการศึกษา ดังสุภาษิตที่ว่า mickle มักทำ muckle นี่คือจำนวนเงินที่เขาสะสมโดยการเก็บเงินทุกเพนนีที่ถูกทิ้งไว้บนพื้นในช่วง 5 ปีที่ผ่านมา ผู้คนมักคิดว่าต้องใช้เงินเป็นจำนวนมากเพื่อช่วยเหลือผู้อื่น อย่างไรก็ตาม การบริจาคที่แท้จริงไม่ใช่จำนวนเงินแต่อยู่ที่ใจแห่งความรักที่มีต่อผู้อื่น

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.pt:
Recentemente, um velho doou como bolsa de estudos cerca de 1 milhão de won que acumulou enquanto limpava as ruas. Como diz o ditado, muitos mickle fazem muckle, esta é a quantidade de dinheiro que ele acumulou ao recolher cada centavo que foi abandonado no chão durante os últimos 5 anos. Muitas vezes as pessoas pensam que é preciso muito dinheiro para ajudar os outros. Porém, a verdadeira doação não está na quantia, mas no coração de amor ao próximo.

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.hi:
हाल ही में, एक बूढ़े व्यक्ति ने सड़कों की सफ़ाई के दौरान जमा की गई लगभग 1 मिलियन की राशि छात्रवृत्ति के रूप में दे दी। जैसा कि कहा जाता है कि बहुत से लोग गंदगी फैलाते हैं, यह वह धनराशि है जो उन्होंने पिछले 5 वर्षों के दौरान जमीन पर छोड़े गए हर पैसे को इकट्ठा करके जमा की है। लोग अक्सर सोचते हैं कि दूसरों की मदद करने के लिए बहुत सारा पैसा लगता है। हालाँकि, असली दान राशि में नहीं बल्कि दूसरों के लिए दिल में प्यार है।

#######

Recently, an old man gave away about 1 million won that he had accumulated while cleaning the streets as a scholarship. As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.
g_text_translate.tr:
Geçtiğimiz günlerde yaşlı bir adam sokakları temizlerken biriktirdiği yaklaşık 1 milyon wonu burs olarak dağıttı. Pek çok mickle'ın mırıldandığı söylendiği gibi, bu onun son 5 yılda yere bırakılan her kuruşu toplayarak biriktirdiği para miktarıdır. İnsanlar genellikle başkalarına yardım etmenin çok para gerektirdiğini düşünürler. Ancak asıl bağış, miktarda değil, başkalarına duyulan sevginin kalbindedir.

#######

As the saying many a mickle makes a muckle, this is the amount of money he has accumulated by picking up every penny that has been abandoned on the ground during the past 5 years. People often think that it takes a lot of money to help others. However, the real donation is not in the amount but in the heart of love for others.

general.g_text: 요즘 아빠들은 아이들에게 친구 같은 존재가 되고 싶어한다. (    ) 아이가 어릴 때는 친구 같은 아빠가 필요하다. 서로 사랑하는 마음을 표현하는 과정을 통해 부모와 자식 간의 신뢰가 깊어질 수 있기 때문이다. 그런데 아이의 인성이 완성되는 청소년기에는 ‘권위 있는 아빠’의 역할도 중요하다. 아빠의 권위 있는 말과 행동은 아이의 삶에 판단 기준이 되어 아이가 바른 길로 가는 데 도움을 줄 수 있기 때문이다.

g_text_translate.vi: Dạo gần đây, các ông bố muốn làm bạn với con cái của họ. (  ) khi đứa trẻ còn nhỏ, chúng cần một người bố giống như bạn bè. Lý do là bởi thông qua quá trình thể hiện tình cảm yêu thương lẫn nhau, niềm tin giữa bố mẹ và con cái sẽ trở nên to lớn hơn. Tuy nhiên, vai trò của "người bố có quyền uy" cũng rất quan trọng trong giai đoạn thanh thiếu niên khi nhân cách của đứa trẻ đang hình thành. Bởi vì lời nói và hành động có uy lực của người bố sẽ trở thành tiêu chuẩn để đứa trẻ phán đoán trong cuộc sống và có thể giúp nó đi trên con đường đúng đắn.
g_text_translate.en: Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. However, the role of the 'authoritative father' is also important during adolescence when a child's personality is forming. Because the father's powerful words and actions will become the standard for the child to judge in life and can help him on the right path.
g_text_translate.fr:
Dernièrement, les pères veulent être amis avec leurs enfants. Bien sûr, quand les enfants sont jeunes, ils ont besoin d'un père qui est comme un ami. La raison en est que, grâce au processus d'expression de l'amour mutuel, la confiance entre parents et enfants deviendra plus grande. Cependant, le rôle du « père autoritaire » est également important à l'adolescence lorsque la personnalité de l'enfant se forme. Parce que les paroles et les actions puissantes du père deviendront la norme pour que l'enfant puisse juger dans la vie et peuvent l'aider sur le bon chemin.

#######

Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. However, the role of the 'authoritative father' is also important during adolescence when a child's personality is forming. Because the father's powerful words and actions will become the standard for the child to judge in life and can help him on the right path.
g_text_translate.es:
Últimamente, los padres quieren ser amigos de sus hijos. Por supuesto, cuando los niños son pequeños, necesitan un padre que sea como un amigo. La razón es porque a través del proceso de expresar amor mutuo, la confianza entre padres e hijos será mayor. Sin embargo, el papel del 'padre autoritario' también es importante durante la adolescencia, cuando se está formando la personalidad del niño. Porque las poderosas palabras y acciones del padre se convertirán en el estándar para que el niño juzgue en la vida y pueden ayudarlo en el camino correcto.

#######

Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. However, the role of the 'authoritative father' is also important during adolescence when a child's personality is forming. Because the father's powerful words and actions will become the standard for the child to judge in life and can help him on the right path.
g_text_translate.id:
Akhir-akhir ini, para ayah ingin berteman dengan anak-anaknya. Tentu saja, ketika anak-anak masih kecil, mereka membutuhkan seorang ayah yang seperti teman. Pasalnya, melalui proses saling mengungkapkan rasa cinta, rasa percaya antara orang tua dan anak akan semakin besar. Namun, peran 'ayah yang berwibawa' juga penting selama masa remaja ketika kepribadian anak sedang terbentuk. Karena kata-kata dan tindakan ayah yang kuat akan menjadi standar bagi anak untuk menilai dalam hidup dan dapat membantunya di jalan yang benar.

#######

Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. However, the role of the 'authoritative father' is also important during adolescence when a child's personality is forming. Because the father's powerful words and actions will become the standard for the child to judge in life and can help him on the right path.
g_text_translate.ja:
最近、父親は子供と友達になりたいと思っています。もちろん、子どもが小さいうちは、友達のような父親が必要です。その理由は、お互いの愛を表現する過程を通じて、親子間の信頼がより大きくなるからです。しかし、「権威ある父親」の役割は、子どもの個性が形成される思春期にも重要です。父親の力強い言葉と行動は、子供が人生で判断する基準となり、正しい道を歩むのに役立つからです。

#######

Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. However, the role of the 'authoritative father' is also important during adolescence when a child's personality is forming. Because the father's powerful words and actions will become the standard for the child to judge in life and can help him on the right path.
g_text_translate.de:
In letzter Zeit wollen Väter mit ihren Kindern befreundet sein. Wenn Kinder klein sind, brauchen sie natürlich einen Vater, der wie ein Freund ist. Der Grund dafür ist, dass durch den Prozess des Ausdrucks gegenseitiger Liebe das Vertrauen zwischen Eltern und Kindern größer wird. Die Rolle des „autoritativen Vaters“ ist aber auch während der Pubertät wichtig, wenn sich die Persönlichkeit eines Kindes bildet. Denn die kraftvollen Worte und Taten des Vaters werden zum Maßstab für das Urteilsvermögen des Kindes im Leben und können ihm auf dem richtigen Weg helfen.

#######

Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. However, the role of the 'authoritative father' is also important during adolescence when a child's personality is forming. Because the father's powerful words and actions will become the standard for the child to judge in life and can help him on the right path.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
最近，父亲们想和他们的孩子成为朋友。当然，在孩子还小的时候，他们需要一个像朋友一样的父亲。原因是通过表达爱意的过程，父母和孩子之间的信任会变得更大。然而，在孩子个性形成的青春期，“权威父亲”的角色也很重要。因为父亲有力的言行，会成为孩子判断人生的标准，可以帮助他走上正确的道路。

#######

Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. However, the role of the 'authoritative father' is also important during adolescence when a child's personality is forming. Because the father's powerful words and actions will become the standard for the child to judge in life and can help him on the right path.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
最近，父親們想和他們的孩子成為朋友。當然，在孩子還小的時候，他們需要一個像朋友一樣的父親。原因是通過表達愛意的過程，父母和孩子之間的信任會變得更大。然而，在孩子個性形成的青春期，“權威父親”的角色也很重要。因為父親有力的言行，會成為孩子判斷人生的標準，可以幫助他走上正確的道路。

#######

Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. However, the role of the 'authoritative father' is also important during adolescence when a child's personality is forming. Because the father's powerful words and actions will become the standard for the child to judge in life and can help him on the right path.
g_text_translate.it:
Ultimamente, i padri vogliono essere amici dei propri figli. Certo, quando i figli sono piccoli, hanno bisogno di un padre che sia come un amico. Il motivo è perché attraverso il processo di espressione dell'amore reciproco, la fiducia tra genitori e figli diventerà maggiore. Tuttavia, il ruolo del "padre autorevole" è importante anche durante l'adolescenza, quando si forma la personalità del bambino. Perché le parole e le azioni potenti del padre diventeranno lo standard per il bambino da giudicare nella vita e possono aiutarlo sulla retta via.

#######

Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. However, the role of the 'authoritative father' is also important during adolescence when a child's personality is forming. Because the father's powerful words and actions will become the standard for the child to judge in life and can help him on the right path.
g_text_translate.ru:
В последнее время отцы хотят дружить со своими детьми. Конечно, когда дети маленькие, им нужен отец, который будет им как друг. Причина в том, что благодаря процессу выражения взаимной любви доверие между родителями и детьми станет больше. Однако роль «авторитетного отца» важна и в подростковом возрасте, когда формируется личность ребенка. Потому что сильные слова и действия отца станут для ребенка эталоном в жизни и смогут помочь ему на правильном пути.

#######

Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. However, the role of the 'authoritative father' is also important during adolescence when a child's personality is forming. Because the father's powerful words and actions will become the standard for the child to judge in life and can help him on the right path.

#######

Lately, fathers want to be friends with their children. Of course, when children are young, they need a father who is like a friend. The reason is because through the process of expressing mutual love, the trust between parents and children will become greater. g_text_translate.pt:
Ultimamente, os pais querem ser amigos dos filhos. É claro que, quando os filhos são pequenos, precisam de um pai que seja como um amigo. A razão é porque através do processo de expressão do amor mútuo, a confiança entre pais e filhos se tornará maior. Contudo, o papel do “pai autoritário” também é importante durante a adolescência, quando a personalidade da criança está em formação. Porque as palavras e ações poderosas do pai se tornarão o padrão para o filho julgar na vida e poderão ajudá-lo no caminho certo.

#######

g_text_translate.hi:
हाल ही में, पिता अपने बच्चों से दोस्ती करना चाहते हैं। बेशक, जब बच्चे छोटे होते हैं, तो उन्हें एक ऐसे पिता की ज़रूरत होती है जो एक दोस्त की तरह हो। इसका कारण यह है कि आपसी प्रेम व्यक्त करने की प्रक्रिया से माता-पिता और बच्चों के बीच विश्वास अधिक हो जाएगा। हालाँकि, किशोरावस्था के दौरान जब बच्चे के व्यक्तित्व का निर्माण हो रहा होता है तो 'आधिकारिक पिता' की भूमिका भी महत्वपूर्ण होती है। क्योंकि पिता के शक्तिशाली शब्द और कार्य बच्चे के लिए जीवन में निर्णय लेने का मानक बनेंगे और उसे सही रास्ते पर लाने में मदद कर सकते हैं।

g_text_translate.tr:
Son zamanlarda babalar çocuklarıyla arkadaş olmak istiyor. Elbette çocuklar küçükken arkadaş gibi bir babaya ihtiyaç duyarlar. Bunun nedeni, karşılıklı sevgiyi ifade etme süreci sayesinde ebeveynler ve çocuklar arasındaki güvenin daha da artmasıdır. Ancak çocuğun kişiliğinin oluştuğu ergenlik döneminde 'otoriter baba'nın rolü de önemlidir. Çünkü babanın güçlü sözleri ve eylemleri, çocuğun hayatta yargılaması için standart olacak ve ona doğru yolda yardımcı olabilecektir.
