g_text_translate.hi:
सभी को समान अवसर देने का मतलब यह नहीं है कि समाज निष्पक्ष है। ऐसा इसलिए है क्योंकि समान अवसर दिए जाने पर भी, जन्मजात प्रतिभा या योग्यता में अंतर के कारण ऐसे परिणाम उत्पन्न हो सकते हैं जिनका प्रयास से कोई लेना-देना नहीं है। यदि आप इसकी तुलना 100-मीटर स्प्रिंट से करते हैं, तो बहुत अच्छी शारीरिक स्थिति वाले या उसके बिना किसी व्यक्ति को एक ही शुरुआती लाइन पर दौड़ाना उचित नहीं है। बेशक, इन दौड़ों में उत्कृष्ट शारीरिक स्थिति वाले लोगों को फायदा होता है।

#######

Giving equal opportunities to everyone does not necessarily mean that the society is fair. This is because even if the same opportunity is given, results that have nothing to do with effort can be produced due to differences in innate talent or aptitude. If you compare it to a 100-meter sprint, it is not fair to have someone with or without a very good physical condition run on the same starting line. In these races, of course, those with excellent physical conditions have an advantage.
g_text_translate.tr:
Herkese eşit fırsatlar verilmesi toplumun adil olduğu anlamına gelmez. Çünkü aynı fırsat verilse bile doğuştan gelen yetenek veya yatkınlık farklılıklarından dolayı emekle ilgisi olmayan sonuçlar üretilebilmektedir. Bunu 100 metrelik bir sprintle karşılaştırırsanız, fiziksel durumu çok iyi olan veya olmayan birinin aynı başlangıç ​​çizgisinde koşması adil değil. Bu yarışlarda elbette fiziki durumu iyi olanların avantajı var.

#######

Giving equal opportunities to everyone does not necessarily mean that the society is fair. This is because even if the same opportunity is given, results that have nothing to do with effort can be produced due to differences in innate talent or aptitude. If you compare it to a 100-meter sprint, it is not fair to have someone with or without a very good physical condition run on the same starting line. In these races, of course, those with excellent physical conditions have an advantage.

사회에서 타고난 재능과 소질의 차이를 인정할 수는 없다.

4. Herkese aynı fırsat verilirse adil bir toplum olduğu söylenebilir.
--------------------
Paragrafın son iki cümlesine göre doğru cevap 3'tür.

#######

Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. Those who are in good condition should help those who are not.
2. Society cannot recognize the difference between natural talent and aptitude.
3. It is unfair that people with outstanding conditions have an advantage.
4. If everyone is given the same opportunity, it can be said to be a fair society.
--------------------
Based on the last two sentences of the paragraph, 3 is the correct answer.

general.g_text: 가정에서 여자들은 어렸을 때부터 여자답게 처신하도록 길러지고, 남자들은 남자답게 행동하도록 강요받는다. 가정 교육뿐만 아니라 학교에서 배우는 교과서와 교육 제도 또한 성차별을 정당화시킨다. 여성 해방의 주체는 여성이다. 하지만 이는 남성에게도 중요한 문제다. 여자가 해방되어 남자와 평등한 위치에 서게 될 때 (        ) 남자도 가부 장적 이념의 구속에서 해방될 수 있다.

g_text_translate.vi: Trong gia đình, nữ giới được nuôi dạy để cư xử nữ tính ngay từ khi còn nhỏ, và nam giới buộc phải cư xử nam tính. Không chỉ giáo dục gia đình, mà sách giáo khoa và hệ thống giáo dục ở trường học cũng chính đáng hóa cho sự phân biệt giới tính. Chủ thể của sự giải phóng phụ nữ là phụ nữ. Nhưng nó cũng là một vấn đề quan trọng đối với nam giới. (        ) phụ nữ được giải phóng và đứng ngang hàng với nam giới, thì nam giới mới cũng có thể được giải phóng khỏi sự kìm hãm của hệ tư tưởng gia trưởng.
g_text_translate.en: In the home, women are raised to behave like women from childhood, and men are forced to act like men. Not only home education, but also the textbooks and education systems learned at school justify gender discrimination. The subject of women's liberation is women. But it's also an issue for men. Only when women are liberated and stand on an equal footing with men can men be liberated from the restraints of patriarchal ideology.
g_text_translate.it:
In casa, le donne vengono educate a comportarsi come donne fin dall'infanzia, e gli uomini sono costretti a comportarsi come uomini. Non solo l’istruzione domestica, ma anche i libri di testo e i sistemi educativi appresi a scuola giustificano la discriminazione di genere. Il tema della liberazione delle donne sono le donne. Ma è un problema anche per gli uomini. Solo quando le donne saranno liberate e si troveranno su un piano di parità con gli uomini, gli uomini potranno essere liberati dai vincoli dell’ideologia patriarcale.

#######

In the home, women are raised to behave like women from childhood, and men are forced to act like men. Not only home education, but also the textbooks and education systems learned at school justify gender discrimination. The subject of women's liberation is women. But it's also an issue for men. Only when women are liberated and stand on an equal footing with men can men be liberated from the restraints of patriarchal ideology.
g_text_translate.fr:
À la maison, les femmes sont élevées pour se comporter comme des femmes dès leur enfance, et les hommes sont forcés d’agir comme des hommes. Non seulement l’enseignement à domicile, mais aussi les manuels et les systèmes éducatifs appris à l’école justifient la discrimination fondée sur le sexe. Le sujet de la libération des femmes, ce sont les femmes. Mais c'est aussi un problème pour les hommes. Ce n’est que lorsque les femmes seront libérées et seront sur un pied d’égalité avec les hommes que les hommes pourront être libérés des contraintes de l’idéologie patriarcale.

#######

In the home, women are raised to behave like women from childhood, and men are forced to act like men. Not only home education, but also the textbooks and education systems learned at school justify gender discrimination. The subject of women's liberation is women. But it's also an issue for men. Only when women are liberated and stand on an equal footing with men can men be liberated from the restraints of patriarchal ideology.
g_text_translate.es:
En el hogar, a las mujeres se les educa para que se comporten como mujeres desde la infancia, y a los hombres se les obliga a actuar como hombres. No sólo la educación en casa, sino también los libros de texto y los sistemas educativos aprendidos en la escuela justifican la discriminación de género. El tema de la liberación de la mujer son las mujeres. Pero también es un problema para los hombres. Sólo cuando las mujeres sean liberadas y estén en pie de igualdad con los hombres, podrán los hombres liberarse de las restricciones de la ideología patriarcal.

#######

In the home, women are raised to behave like women from childhood, and men are forced to act like men. Not only home education, but also the textbooks and education systems learned at school justify gender discrimination. The subject of women's liberation is women. But it's also an issue for men. Only when women are liberated and stand on an equal footing with men can men be liberated from the restraints of patriarchal ideology.
g_text_translate.id:
Di rumah, perempuan dibesarkan untuk berperilaku seperti perempuan sejak masa kanak-kanak, dan laki-laki dipaksa untuk bertindak seperti laki-laki. Tidak hanya pendidikan di rumah, tetapi juga buku teks dan sistem pendidikan yang dipelajari di sekolah membenarkan diskriminasi gender. Subyek pembebasan perempuan adalah perempuan. Namun hal ini juga menjadi masalah bagi pria. Hanya ketika perempuan dibebaskan dan berdiri sejajar dengan laki-laki barulah laki-laki bisa terbebas dari kekangan ideologi patriarki.

#######

In the home, women are raised to behave like women from childhood, and men are forced to act like men. Not only home education, but also the textbooks and education systems learned at school justify gender discrimination. The subject of women's liberation is women. But it's also an issue for men. Only when women are liberated and stand on an equal footing with men can men be liberated from the restraints of patriarchal ideology.
g_text_translate.ja:
家庭では、女性は子供の頃から女性らしく振る舞うように育てられ、男性は男性らしく振る舞うことを強制されます。家庭教育だけでなく、学校で学ぶ教科書や教育制度も性差別を正当化します。ウーマンリブの主題は女性です。しかし、それは男性にとっても問題です。女性が解放され、男性と対等な立場に立つときのみ、男性は家父長制イデオロギーの束縛から解放されます。

#######

In the home, women are raised to behave like women from childhood, and men are forced to act like men. Not only home education, but also the textbooks and education systems learned at school justify gender discrimination. The subject of women's liberation is women. But it's also an issue for men. Only when women are liberated and stand on an equal footing with men can men be liberated from the restraints of patriarchal ideology.
g_text_translate.de:
Zu Hause werden Frauen von Kindheit an dazu erzogen, sich wie Frauen zu verhalten, und Männer werden gezwungen, sich wie Männer zu verhalten. Nicht nur der häusliche Unterricht, sondern auch die in der Schule erlernten Lehrbücher und Bildungssysteme rechtfertigen Geschlechterdiskriminierung. Das Thema der Frauenbefreiung sind Frauen. Aber es ist auch ein Problem für Männer. Nur wenn Frauen befreit sind und den Männern gleichgestellt sind, können Männer von den Zwängen der patriarchalen Ideologie befreit werden.

#######

In the home, women are raised to behave like women from childhood, and men are forced to act like men. Not only home education, but also the textbooks and education systems learned at school justify gender discrimination. The subject of women's liberation is women. But it's also an issue for men. Only when women are liberated and stand on an equal footing with men can men be liberated from the restraints of patriarchal ideology.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
在家庭中，女性从小就被教育要像女性一样行事，而男性则被迫像男性一样行事。不仅是家庭教育，在学校学到的教科书和教育制度也证明了性别歧视的合理性。妇女解放的主体是妇女。但这对男性来说也是一个问题。只有女性得到解放，与男性处于平等地位，男性才能从父权思想的束缚中解放出来。

#######

在家庭中，女性從小就被教育要像女性一樣行事，而男性則被迫像男性一樣行事。不僅是家庭教育，在學校學到的教科書和教育制度也證明了性別歧視的合理性。婦女解放的主體是婦女。但這對男性來說也是一個問題。只有女性得到解放，與男性處於平等地位，男性才能從父權思想的束縛中解放出來。

В семье женщин с детства воспитывают вести себя как женщины, а мужчин заставляют вести себя как мужчины. Не только домашнее образование, но также учебники и системы образования, изучаемые в школе, оправдывают гендерную дискриминацию. Субъектом женского освобождения являются женщины. Но это также проблема и для мужчин. Только когда женщины будут освобождены и станут на равных с мужчинами, мужчины смогут освободиться от ограничений патриархальной идеологии.

घर में महिलाओं को बचपन से ही महिलाओं की तरह व्यवहार करने के लिए पाला जाता है और पुरुषों को पुरुषों की तरह व्यवहार करने के लिए मजबूर किया जाता है। न केवल घरेलू शिक्षा, बल्कि स्कूल में सीखी गई पाठ्यपुस्तकें और शिक्षा प्रणालियाँ भी लैंगिक भेदभाव को उचित ठहराती हैं। नारी मुक्ति का विषय नारी है। लेकिन यह पुरुषों के लिए भी एक मुद्दा है। केवल जब महिलाएं स्वतंत्र होंगी और पुरुषों के साथ बराबरी पर खड़ी होंगी तभी पुरुषों को पितृसत्तात्मक विचारधारा के बंधनों से मुक्त किया जा सकेगा।

क्योंकि जब महिलाएं स्वतंत्र होंगी और पुरुषों के बराबर होंगी तभी पुरुषों को पितृसत्तात्मक विचारधारा की बंदिशों से मुक्ति मिल सकेगी। अतः 4 सबसे उचित उत्तर है।

#######

Choose the right one to put in (   ).
1. Not so much
2. Still
3. By force
4. Only when
--------------------
Because only when women are liberated and equal to men can men be liberated from the restraints of patriarchal ideology. So 4 is the most reasonable answer.

general.g_text: 속담 속에 나타난 동물의 이미지를 보면 중립적인 경우가 가장 많고, 부정적 이미지, 긍정적 이미지가 그 뒤를 잇는다. (        ) 긍정적 이미지보다 부정적 이미지가 더 많은 것은 속담이 가지는 특징인 교훈성 때문이다. 한국 속담에서 개미와 벌은 근면한 동물로, 굼벵이와 늑대는 게으른 동물로 나타난다. 또한 개는 책임감 있는 동물로, 원숭이는 변덕스럽고 자만심에 가득 찬 동물로 그려진다.

g_text_translate.vi: Nếu nhìn vào hình ảnh của động vật xuất hiện trong tục ngữ thì có nhiều trường hợp trung lập nhất, tiếp theo là hình ảnh tiêu cực rồi đến hình ảnh tích cực. (        ) hình ảnh tiêu cực nhiều hơn hình ảnh tích cực là do tính giáo huấn - nét đặc trưng của tục ngữ. Trong tục ngữ Hàn Quốc, kiến và ong là những động vật siêng năng, trong khi nhộng và sói là những động vật lười biếng. Ngoài ra, chó được miêu tả là động vật có trách nhiệm, trong khi khỉ là động vật thất thường và tự mãn.
g_text_translate.en: If you look at the images of animals in proverbs, most of them are neutral, followed by negative and positive images. The reason why there are more negative images than positive images is because of the instructive nature of proverbs. In Korean proverbs, ants and bees are industrious animals, and larvas and wolves are lazy animals. Also, the dog is portrayed as a responsible animal, and the monkey as a capricious and conceited animal.
g_text_translate.it:
Se guardi le immagini degli animali nei proverbi, la maggior parte di esse sono neutre, seguite da immagini negative e positive. Il motivo per cui ci sono più immagini negative che immagini positive è la natura istruttiva dei proverbi. Nei proverbi coreani, le formiche e le api sono animali operosi, e le larve e i lupi sono animali pigri. Inoltre, il cane è ritratto come un animale responsabile e la scimmia come un animale capriccioso e presuntuoso.

#######

If you look at the images of animals in proverbs, most of them are neutral, followed by negative and positive images. The reason why there are more negative images than positive images is because of the instructive nature of proverbs. In Korean proverbs, ants and bees are industrious animals, and larvas and wolves are lazy animals. Also, the dog is portrayed as a responsible animal, and the monkey as a capricious and conceited animal.
g_text_translate.fr:
Si vous regardez les images d'animaux dans les proverbes, la plupart d'entre elles sont neutres, suivies d'images négatives et positives. La raison pour laquelle il y a plus d’images négatives que d’images positives est due au caractère instructif des proverbes. Dans les proverbes coréens, les fourmis et les abeilles sont des animaux industrieux, tandis que les larves et les loups sont des animaux paresseux. En outre, le chien est dépeint comme un animal responsable et le singe comme un animal capricieux et vaniteux.

#######

If you look at the images of animals in proverbs, most of them are neutral, followed by negative and positive images. The reason why there are more negative images than positive images is because of the instructive nature of proverbs. In Korean proverbs, ants and bees are industrious animals, and larvas and wolves are lazy animals. Also, the dog is portrayed as a responsible animal, and the monkey as a capricious and conceited animal.
g_text_translate.es:
Si nos fijamos en las imágenes de animales en los proverbios, la mayoría son neutrales, seguidas de imágenes negativas y positivas. La razón por la que hay más imágenes negativas que positivas es por la naturaleza instructiva de los proverbios. En los proverbios coreanos, las hormigas y las abejas son animales trabajadores, y las larvas y los lobos son animales perezosos. Además, el perro es retratado como un animal responsable y el mono como un animal caprichoso y engreído.

#######

Also, the dog is portrayed as a responsible animal, and the monkey as a capricious and conceited animal.
g_text_translate.id:
Jika melihat gambar binatang dalam peribahasa, sebagian besar bersifat netral, disusul gambar negatif dan positif. Alasan mengapa ada lebih banyak gambaran negatif daripada gambaran positif adalah karena sifat instruktif dari peribahasa. Dalam pepatah Korea, semut dan lebah adalah hewan yang rajin, sedangkan larva dan serigala adalah hewan yang malas. Selain itu, anjing digambarkan sebagai hewan yang bertanggung jawab, dan monyet sebagai hewan yang berubah-ubah dan sombong.

#######

The reason why there are more negative images than positive images is because of the instructive nature of proverbs. In Korean proverbs, ants and bees are industrious animals, and larvas and wolves are lazy animals. Also, the dog is portrayed as a responsible animal, and the monkey as a capricious and conceited animal.
g_text_translate.ja:
ことわざに登場する動物のイメージを見ると、ほとんどが中立的なイメージで、次にネガティブなイメージとポジティブなイメージが続きます。ポジティブなイメージよりもネガティブなイメージが多いのは、ことわざの教訓的な性質のためです。韓国のことわざでは、アリとミツバチは勤勉な動物、幼虫とオオカミは怠け者の動物です。また、犬は責任感のある動物として描かれ、猿は気まぐれでうぬぼれた動物として描かれています。

Also, the dog is portrayed as a responsible animal, and the monkey as a capricious and conceited animal.
g_text_translate.de:
Wenn man sich die Tierbilder in Sprichwörtern ansieht, sind die meisten davon neutral, gefolgt von negativen und positiven Bildern. Der Grund dafür, dass es mehr negative als positive Bilder gibt, liegt im lehrreichen Charakter von Sprichwörtern. In koreanischen Sprichwörtern sind Ameisen und Bienen fleißige Tiere und Larven und Wölfe faule Tiere. Außerdem wird der Hund als verantwortungsbewusstes Tier dargestellt und der Affe als launisches und eingebildetes Tier.

#######

If you look at the images of animals in proverbs, most of them are neutral, followed by negative and positive images. The reason why there are more negative images than positive images is because of the instructive nature of proverbs. In Korean proverbs, ants and bees are industrious animals, and larvas and wolves are lazy animals. Also, the dog is portrayed as a responsible animal, and the monkey as a capricious and conceited animal.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
如果你看一下谚语中的动物形象，大多数都是中性的，其次是负面和正面的形象。之所以负面形象多于正面形象，是因为谚语的教育性。在韩国谚语中，蚂蚁和蜜蜂是勤劳的动物，幼虫和狼是懒惰的动物。此外，狗被描绘成负责任的动物，而猴子则被描绘成反复无常、自负的动物。

g_text_translate.ru:
Если посмотреть на образы животных в пословицах, то большинство из них нейтральные, за ними следуют отрицательные и положительные образы. Причина, по которой отрицательных образов больше, чем положительных, заключается в поучительном характере пословиц. В корейских пословицах муравьи и пчелы — трудолюбивые животные, а личинки и волки — ленивые животные. general.g_text: 쌀 재배에 필요한 재료의 가격과 인건비가 (        ) 30~40%나 올랐는데 이에 비해 쌀값은 10% 가까이 하락하여 농민들의 어려움과 고통이 날로 커지고 있다. 이는 빵, 라면, 피자 등과 같은 밀가루 식품의 소비 증가와 관련이 깊은데 밀가루가 쌀을 대신하는 비율이 점점 커져 쌀값이 하락한 것이다. 쌀을 원료로 하는 다양한 식품을 개발하여 밀가루 소비를 쌀 소비로 전환해야 한다.

g_text_translate.vi: Giá nguyên liệu và giá nhân công cần cho việc trồng lúa tăng (        ) 30 - 40%, trong khi giá lúa giảm gần 10% ngày càng làm tăng thêm khó khăn, khổ sở của người nông dân. Điều này liên quan mật thiết đến việc tăng tiêu thụ các sản phẩm lúa mì như bánh mì, mì gói và bánh pizza,... và tỷ lệ lúa mì thay thế gạo dần tăng lên dẫn đến giá gạo giảm. Cần phải chuyển đổi tiêu thụ bột mì thành tiêu thụ gạo bằng cách phát triển các loại thực phẩm khác nhau làm từ gạo.
g_text_translate.en: While the price of materials and labor costs for rice cultivation have risen by 30-40%, the price of rice has fallen by nearly 10%, increasing the difficulties and suffering of farmers day by day. This is closely related to the increase in the consumption of wheat products such as bread, ramen, and pizza, and the growing proportion of flour replacing rice, causing the price of rice to fall. It is necessary to convert wheat flour consumption into rice consumption by developing various foods that use rice as a raw material.
g_text_translate.it:
Mentre il prezzo dei materiali e della manodopera per la coltivazione del riso è aumentato del 30-40%, il prezzo del riso è sceso di quasi il 10%, aumentando giorno dopo giorno le difficoltà e la sofferenza dei coltivatori. Ciò è strettamente correlato all’aumento del consumo di prodotti a base di grano come pane, ramen e pizza, e alla crescente percentuale di farina che sostituisce il riso, causando la caduta del prezzo del riso. È necessario convertire il consumo di farina di frumento in consumo di riso sviluppando vari alimenti che utilizzino il riso come materia prima.

#######

While the price of materials and labor costs for rice cultivation have risen by 30-40%, the price of rice has fallen by nearly 10%, increasing the difficulties and suffering of farmers day by day. This is closely related to the increase in the consumption of wheat products such as bread, ramen, and pizza, and the growing proportion of flour replacing rice, causing the price of rice to fall. It is necessary to convert wheat flour consumption into rice consumption by developing various foods that use rice as a raw material.
g_text_translate.fr:
Alors que le prix des matériaux et les coûts de main-d'œuvre pour la culture du riz ont augmenté de 30 à 40 %, le prix du riz a chuté de près de 10 %, augmentant chaque jour les difficultés et les souffrances des agriculteurs. Ceci est étroitement lié à l’augmentation de la consommation de produits à base de blé tels que le pain, les ramen et la pizza, et à la proportion croissante de farine remplaçant le riz, entraînant une baisse du prix du riz. Il est nécessaire de convertir la consommation de farine de blé en consommation de riz en développant divers aliments utilisant le riz comme matière première.

#######

While the price of materials and labor costs for rice cultivation have risen by 30-40%, the price of rice has fallen by nearly 10%, increasing the difficulties and suffering of farmers day by day. This is closely related to the increase in the consumption of wheat products such as bread, ramen, and pizza, and the growing proportion of flour replacing rice, causing the price of rice to fall. It is necessary to convert wheat flour consumption into rice consumption by developing various foods that use rice as a raw material.
g_text_translate.es:
Mientras que el precio de los materiales y los costos laborales para el cultivo de arroz han aumentado entre un 30% y un 40%, el precio del arroz ha caído casi un 10%, aumentando día a día las dificultades y el sufrimiento de los agricultores. Esto está estrechamente relacionado con el aumento del consumo de productos derivados del trigo, como pan, ramen y pizza, y con la creciente proporción de harina que reemplaza al arroz, lo que provoca una caída del precio del arroz. Es necesario convertir el consumo de harina de trigo en consumo de arroz mediante el desarrollo de diversos alimentos que utilicen el arroz como materia prima.

#######

While the price of materials and labor costs for rice cultivation have risen by 30-40%, the price of rice has fallen by nearly 10%, increasing the difficulties and suffering of farmers day by day. This is closely related to the increase in the consumption of wheat products such as bread, ramen, and pizza, and the growing proportion of flour replacing rice, causing the price of rice to fall. It is necessary to convert wheat flour consumption into rice consumption by developing various foods that use rice as a raw material.
g_text_translate.id:
Walaupun harga bahan baku dan biaya tenaga kerja untuk budidaya padi telah meningkat sebesar 30-40%, harga beras telah turun hampir 10%, sehingga semakin menambah kesulitan dan penderitaan para petani dari hari ke hari. Hal ini erat kaitannya dengan peningkatan konsumsi produk gandum seperti roti, ramen, dan pizza, serta semakin besarnya proporsi tepung pengganti beras sehingga menyebabkan harga beras turun. Konversi konsumsi tepung terigu menjadi konsumsi beras perlu dilakukan dengan mengembangkan berbagai pangan yang menggunakan bahan baku beras.

#######

While the price of materials and labor costs for rice cultivation have risen by 30-40%, the price of rice has fallen by nearly 10%, increasing the difficulties and suffering of farmers day by day. This is closely related to the increase in the consumption of wheat products such as bread, ramen, and pizza, and the growing proportion of flour replacing rice, causing the price of rice to fall. It is necessary to convert wheat flour consumption into rice consumption by developing various foods that use rice as a raw material.
g_text_translate.ja:
米作りの資材や人件費が３～４割上昇する一方、米価は１割近く下落し、農家の困難と苦しみは日に日に増している。これは、パンやラーメン、ピザなどの小麦製品の消費量が増え、米に代わる小麦粉の割合が増え、米の価格が下落していることと密接に関係している。米を原料としたさまざまな食品の開発により、小麦粉の消費を米の消費に転換する必要がある。

#######

While the price of materials and labor costs for rice cultivation have risen by 30-40%, the price of rice has fallen by nearly 10%, increasing the difficulties and suffering of farmers day by day. This is closely related to the increase in the consumption of wheat products such as bread, ramen, and pizza, and the growing proportion of flour replacing rice, causing the price of rice to fall. It is necessary to convert wheat flour consumption into rice consumption by developing various foods that use rice as a raw material.
g_text_translate.de:
Während die Material- und Arbeitskosten für den Reisanbau um 30–40 % gestiegen sind, ist der Reispreis um fast 10 % gesunken, was die Schwierigkeiten und das Leid der Landwirte von Tag zu Tag vergrößert. Dies hängt eng mit dem Anstieg des Konsums von Weizenprodukten wie Brot, Ramen und Pizza sowie dem wachsenden Anteil von Mehl als Ersatz für Reis zusammen, was zu sinkenden Reispreisen führt. Es ist notwendig, den Verzehr von Weizenmehl in den Verzehr von Reis umzuwandeln, indem verschiedene Lebensmittel entwickelt werden, die Reis als Rohstoff verwenden.

#######

While the price of materials and labor costs for rice cultivation have risen by 30-40%, the price of rice has fallen by nearly 10%, increasing the difficulties and suffering of farmers day by day. g_text_translate.zh-CN:
在水稻种植的材料价格和劳动力成本上涨30-40%的同时，稻米价格却下降了近10%，农民的困难与痛苦日益增加。这与面包、拉面、披萨等小麦制品消费增加，面粉替代大米比例不断加大，导致大米价格下跌密切相关。要通过开发以大米为原料的各种食品，将小麦粉消费转化为大米消费。

g_text_translate.ru:
В то время как цены на материалы и затраты на рабочую силу для выращивания риса выросли на 30-40%, цена на рис упала почти на 10%, день ото дня увеличивая трудности и страдания фермеров. Это тесно связано с увеличением потребления продуктов из пшеницы, таких как хлеб, рамен и пицца, а также с растущей долей замены риса мукой, что приводит к падению цен на рис. Необходимо конвертировать потребление пшеничной муки в потребление риса путем разработки различных продуктов питания, в которых рис используется в качестве сырья.

g_text_translate.th:
แม้ว่าราคาวัสดุและค่าแรงในการเพาะปลูกข้าวจะสูงขึ้น 30-40% แต่ราคาข้าวก็ลดลงเกือบ 10% ทำให้ชาวนาลำบากและทนทุกข์มากขึ้นทุกวัน ซึ่งมีความเกี่ยวข้องอย่างใกล้ชิดกับการบริโภคผลิตภัณฑ์ข้าวสาลีที่เพิ่มขึ้น เช่น ขนมปัง ราเมน และพิซซ่า และสัดส่วนแป้งที่ใช้แทนข้าวที่เพิ่มขึ้น ทำให้ราคาข้าวลดลง มีความจำเป็นต้องแปลงการบริโภคแป้งสาลีให้เป็นการบริโภคข้าวโดยการพัฒนาอาหารต่างๆ ที่ใช้ข้าวเป็นวัตถุดิบ

Isto está intimamente relacionado com o aumento do consumo de produtos de trigo, como pão, ramen e pizza, e com a crescente proporção de farinha que substitui o arroz, fazendo com que o preço do arroz caia. É necessário converter o consumo de farinha de trigo em consumo de arroz, desenvolvendo diversos alimentos que utilizam o arroz como matéria-prima.

g_text_translate.hi:
जहाँ चावल की खेती के लिए सामग्री की कीमत और श्रम लागत में 30-40% की वृद्धि हुई है, वहीं चावल की कीमत में लगभग 10% की गिरावट आई है, जिससे किसानों की कठिनाइयाँ और पीड़ा दिन-ब-दिन बढ़ती जा रही है। इसका ब्रेड, रेमन और पिज्जा जैसे गेहूं उत्पादों की खपत में वृद्धि और चावल की जगह आटे के बढ़ते अनुपात से गहरा संबंध है, जिससे चावल की कीमत में गिरावट आई है। कच्चे माल के रूप में चावल का उपयोग करने वाले विभिन्न खाद्य पदार्थों को विकसित करके गेहूं के आटे की खपत को चावल की खपत में बदलना आवश्यक है।

Bu durum ekmek, ramen, pizza gibi buğday ürünlerinin tüketiminin artması ve pirinç yerine un kullanımının artmasıyla pirincin fiyatının düşmesiyle yakından alakalı. content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 밀가루로 만든 음식의 소비가 늘고 쌀의 소비가 줄었다.
쌀을 재배하는 데 필요한 경비가 줄어들고 있다.
생산비가 많이 들어가는 쌀 대신 밀가루를 많이 먹어야 한다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn.
1. Giá gạo tăng khiến thu nhập của nông dân tăng lên.
2. Tiêu thụ thực phẩm làm từ bột mì tăng lên và tiêu thụ gạo giảm.
3. Chi phí cần thiết để trồng lúa đang giảm dần.
4. Phải ăn nhiều bột mì thay vì gạo - thứ tốn nhiều chi phí sản xuất.
--------------------
Tỷ lệ lúa mì thay thế gạo dần tăng lên dẫn đến giá gạo giảm. Điều này có nghĩa là tiêu thụ thực phẩm làm từ bột mì tăng lên và tiêu thụ gạo giảm. 2 là đáp án đúng.
explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. The rise in the price of rice increased the income of farmers.
2. Consumption of flour-based foods increased and consumption of rice decreased.
3. The cost of growing rice is decreasing.
4. You should eat a lot of flour instead of rice, which costs a lot to produce.
--------------------
The proportion of wheat replacing rice gradually increased leading to a decrease in rice prices. This means that the consumption of flour-based foods increased and the consumption of rice decreased. 2 is the correct answer.
explain.it:
Scegli quello che corrisponde al contenuto del paragrafo.
1. L’aumento del prezzo del riso ha aumentato il reddito degli agricoltori.
2. È aumentato il consumo di alimenti a base di farina ed è diminuito il consumo di riso.
3. Il costo della coltivazione del riso sta diminuendo.
4. Dovresti mangiare molta farina invece del riso, la cui produzione costa molto.
--------------------
La percentuale di grano che sostituisce il riso è gradualmente aumentata, portando ad una diminuzione dei prezzi del riso. Ciò significa che il consumo di alimenti a base di farina è aumentato e quello di riso è diminuito. 2 è la risposta corretta.

#######

Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. The rise in the price of rice increased the income of farmers.
2. Consumption of flour-based foods increased and consumption of rice decreased.
3. The cost of growing rice is decreasing.
4. You should eat a lot of flour instead of rice, which costs a lot to produce.
--------------------
The proportion of wheat replacing rice gradually increased leading to a decrease in rice prices. This means that the consumption of flour-based foods increased and the consumption of rice decreased. 2 is the correct answer.
explain.fr:
Choisissez celui qui correspond au contenu du paragraphe.
1. La hausse du prix du riz a augmenté les revenus des agriculteurs.
2. La consommation d’aliments à base de farine a augmenté et celle de riz a diminué.
3. Le coût de la culture du riz diminue.
4. Vous devriez manger beaucoup de farine au lieu du riz, qui coûte cher à produire.
--------------------
La proportion de blé remplaçant le riz a progressivement augmenté, entraînant une baisse des prix du riz. Cela signifie que la consommation d’aliments à base de farine a augmenté et que celle de riz a diminué. 2 est la bonne réponse.

The proportion of wheat replacing rice gradually increased leading to a decrease in rice prices. This means that the consumption of flour-based foods increased and the consumption of rice decreased. 2 is the correct answer.
explain.es:
Elija el que coincida con el contenido del párrafo.
1. El aumento del precio del arroz aumentó los ingresos de los agricultores.
2. Aumentó el consumo de alimentos a base de harina y disminuyó el consumo de arroz.
3. El costo del cultivo de arroz está disminuyendo.
4. Deberías comer mucha harina en lugar de arroz, cuya producción cuesta mucho.
--------------------
La proporción de trigo que reemplazó al arroz aumentó gradualmente, lo que provocó una disminución de los precios del arroz. Esto significa que aumentó el consumo de alimentos a base de harina y disminuyó el consumo de arroz. 2 es la respuesta correcta.

explain.ja:
段落の内容と一致するものを選択してください。
1. 米価の上昇により農家の収入が増加した。
2. 小麦粉ベースの食品の消費が増加し、米の消費が減少しました。
3. 米の栽培コストは下がっています。
4. 生産コストが高い米の代わりに小麦粉をたくさん食べるべきです。
--------------------
米に代わる小麦の割合が徐々に増加し、米価格の下落につながった。これは、小麦粉ベースの食品の消費が増加し、米の消費が減少したことを意味します。 2が正解です。

1. Der Anstieg des Reispreises erhöhte das Einkommen der Landwirte.
2. Der Verzehr von Lebensmitteln auf Mehlbasis nahm zu und der Verzehr von Reis nahm ab.
3. Die Kosten für den Reisanbau sinken.
4. Anstelle von Reis, dessen Herstellung viel kostet, sollte man viel Mehl essen.
--------------------
Der Anteil von Weizen an der Stelle von Reis nahm allmählich zu, was zu einem Rückgang der Reispreise führte. Dies bedeutet, dass der Verzehr mehlbasierter Lebensmittel zunahm und der Verzehr von Reis zurückging. 2 ist die richtige Antwort.

explain.zh-CN:
选择与段落内容相匹配的一项。
1、米价上涨，增加了农民收入。
2、面类食品消费增加，大米消费减少。
3、水稻种植成本下降。
4.你应该吃大量的面粉而不是大米，因为大米的生产成本很高。
--------------------

explain.ru:
Выберите тот, который соответствует содержанию абзаца.

explain.tr:
Paragrafın içeriğine uygun olanı seçin.
1. Pirinç fiyatlarındaki artış çiftçilerin gelirini artırdı.
2. Un bazlı gıdaların tüketimi arttı, pirinç tüketimi azaldı.
3. Pirinç yetiştirmenin maliyeti düşüyor.
4. Üretimi yüksek maliyetli olan pirinç yerine bol miktarda un yemelisiniz.
--------------------
Pirincin yerini alan buğdayın oranının giderek artması, pirinç fiyatlarında düşüşe neden oldu. Bu da un bazlı gıda tüketiminin arttığı, pirinç tüketiminin ise azaldığı anlamına geliyor. 2 doğru cevaptır.

#######

Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. The rise in the price of rice increased the income of farmers.
2. Consumption of flour-based foods increased and consumption of rice decreased.
3. The cost of growing rice is decreasing.
4. You should eat a lot of flour instead of rice, which costs a lot to produce.
--------------------
The proportion of wheat replacing rice gradually increased leading to a decrease in rice prices. This means that the consumption of flour-based foods increased and the consumption of rice decreased. 2 is the correct answer.

general.g_text: 한국에서 삼신할머니는 아이를 낳고 기르는 일을 주관하는 여신이다. (        ) 아이를 갖게 해 주는 신이라 하여 옛날부터 아이를 기다리는 사람들에게 숭배의 대상이 되었다. 한국에서 이러한 신앙이 자리 잡은 데에는 자손에 대한 전통 사상이 큰 역할을 했다. 대를 이을 아들을 낳지 못하는 여인들이 평생을 죄인처럼 지내야 했던 사회적 관습 속에서 아이가 없는 여인들이 무엇에라도 빌고 싶은 마음을 가지는 것은 당연한 일이었다.

g_text_translate.vi: Ở Hàn Quốc, bà mụ là nữ thần phụ trách việc sinh nở và nuôi dạy con cái. (        ) vì đây được cho là vị thần làm cho người mẹ có mang nên vị thần này từ xưa đã được tôn thờ bởi những người đang chờ đợi một đứa trẻ. Những tư tưởng truyền thống về con cháu đóng một vai trò quan trọng trong việc thiết lập niềm tin này ở Hàn Quốc. Trong phong tục xã hội mà những người phụ nữ không thể sinh con trai để nối dõi phải sống như những tội nhân suốt đời, việc những người phụ nữ không có con cái mang tâm lý muốn cầu xin vào bất cứ thứ gì là một điều đương nhiên.
g_text_translate.en: In Korea, samsinhalmeoni is the goddess in charge of giving birth and raising children. She was especially worshiped by those who were expecting a child since ancient times, as she was said to be the god of childbearing. Traditional ideas about offspring played a major role in the establishment of this faith in Korea. It was natural for women without children to pray to anything in the social custom that women who could not give birth to sons to inherit had to spend their entire lives as sinners.
g_text_translate.it:
In Corea, samsinhalmeoni è la dea incaricata di dare alla luce e allevare i bambini. Fin dall'antichità era particolarmente venerata da coloro che aspettavano un bambino, poiché si diceva che fosse la dea della maternità. Le idee tradizionali sulla prole hanno svolto un ruolo importante nello stabilire questa fede in Corea. Era naturale per le donne senza figli pregare per qualsiasi cosa prevista dalla consuetudine sociale secondo cui le donne che non potevano dare alla luce figli maschi da ereditare dovevano trascorrere l'intera vita come peccatrici.

#######

In Korea, samsinhalmeoni is the goddess in charge of giving birth and raising children. She was especially worshiped by those who were expecting a child since ancient times, as she was said to be the god of childbearing. Traditional ideas about offspring played a major role in the establishment of this faith in Korea. It was natural for women without children to pray to anything in the social custom that women who could not give birth to sons to inherit had to spend their entire lives as sinners.
g_text_translate.fr:
En Corée, samsinhalmeoni est la déesse chargée de donner naissance et d'élever les enfants. Elle était particulièrement vénérée par ceux qui attendaient un enfant depuis l’Antiquité, car on disait qu’elle était le dieu de la procréation. Les idées traditionnelles sur la progéniture ont joué un rôle majeur dans l'établissement de cette foi en Corée. Il était naturel que les femmes sans enfants prient pour quoi que ce soit dans la coutume sociale selon laquelle les femmes qui ne pouvaient pas donner naissance à des fils pour hériter devaient passer toute leur vie dans des pécheurs.

#######

Traditional ideas about offspring played a major role in the establishment of this faith in Korea. It was natural for women without children to pray to anything in the social custom that women who could not give birth to sons to inherit had to spend their entire lives as sinners.
g_text_translate.es:
En Corea, samsinhalmeoni es la diosa encargada de dar a luz y criar a los hijos. Ella era especialmente adorada por aquellos que esperaban un hijo desde la antigüedad, ya que se decía que era el dios de la maternidad. Las ideas tradicionales sobre la descendencia jugaron un papel importante en el establecimiento de esta fe en Corea. Era natural que las mujeres sin hijos rezaran ante cualquier cosa, ya que la costumbre social era que las mujeres que no podían tener hijos varones para heredar tenían que pasar toda su vida como pecadoras.

#######

Di Korea, samsinhalmeoni adalah dewi yang bertugas melahirkan dan membesarkan anak. Dia secara khusus disembah oleh mereka yang mengharapkan seorang anak sejak zaman kuno, karena dia dikatakan sebagai dewa melahirkan anak. Gagasan tradisional tentang keturunan memainkan peran utama dalam pembentukan kepercayaan ini di Korea. Wajar bagi perempuan yang tidak memiliki anak untuk berdoa kepada apa pun dalam adat istiadat masyarakat bahwa perempuan yang tidak dapat melahirkan anak laki-laki untuk mewarisi harus menghabiskan seluruh hidup mereka sebagai orang berdosa.

g_text_translate.de:
In Korea ist Samsinhalmeoni die Göttin, die für die Geburt und Erziehung von Kindern zuständig ist. Sie wurde seit der Antike besonders von denen verehrt, die ein Kind erwarteten, da sie als Gott des Gebärens gilt. Traditionelle Vorstellungen über Nachkommen spielten eine große Rolle bei der Etablierung dieses Glaubens in Korea. Es war für Frauen ohne Kinder selbstverständlich, zu irgendetwas zu beten, da es in der Gesellschaft üblich war, dass Frauen, die keine Söhne zur Welt bringen konnten, ihr ganzes Leben als Sünderinnen verbringen mussten.

g_text_translate.ru:
В Корее Самсинхалмеони — богиня, отвечающая за рождение и воспитание детей. Ей с древних времен особенно поклонялись те, кто ждал ребенка, так как считали ее богиней деторождения. Традиционные представления о потомстве сыграли важную роль в утверждении этой веры в Корее. Çocuk doğurma tanrısı olduğu söylendiğinden, antik çağlardan beri özellikle çocuk bekleyenler tarafından tapınılmıştır. Kore'de bu inancın yerleşmesinde çocuk sahibi olma konusundaki geleneksel düşünceler büyük rol oynamıştır. Çocuksuz kadınların, miras alacak erkek çocuk doğuramayan kadınların tüm hayatlarını günahkar olarak geçirmek zorunda kalması gibi toplumsal gelenekte herhangi bir şey için dua etmesi doğaldı.

general.g_text: 음악을 들으면서 공부를 한다고 해서 학습 능률이 떨어지는 것은 아니다. 사람마다 다를 수 있기 때문이다. 음악을 들으면서 공부를 하는 것이 그냥 공부하는 것보다 더 효과적인 경우가 많다. 음악을 듣다 보면 공부가 지루한 줄을 모르게 되고 음악에 맞춰 몸이나 다리를 흔들면 운동도 된다. (        ) 졸음을 쫓는데도 아주 좋은 방법이 된다.

g_text_translate.vi: Vừa học vừa nghe nhạc không có nghĩa là hiệu quả học tập của bạn bị hạ thấp. Vì nó có thể khác nhau ở mỗi người. Vừa học vừa nghe nhạc nhiều khi còn hiệu quả hơn là chỉ học. Nếu bạn nghe nhạc, bạn sẽ không thấy rằng học tập là nhàm chán, và nếu bạn lắc người hoặc chân của bạn theo âm nhạc, bạn có thể tập thể dục. (        ) đó cũng là một cách tuyệt vời để xua đuổi cơn buồn ngủ.
g_text_translate.en: Studying while listening to music does not impair learning efficiency. Because each person can be different. Studying while listening to music is often more effective than just studying. If you listen to music, you will not know that studying is boring, and if you shake your body or legs to the music, you can exercise. Plus, it's a great way to ward off drowsiness.
g_text_translate.it:
Studiare ascoltando musica non compromette l’efficienza dell’apprendimento. Perché ogni persona può essere diversa. Studiare ascoltando musica è spesso più efficace che limitarsi a studiare. Se ascolti la musica, non saprai che studiare è noioso, e se scuoti il ​​corpo o le gambe al ritmo della musica, puoi esercitarti. Inoltre, è un ottimo modo per scongiurare la sonnolenza.

#######

Studying while listening to music does not impair learning efficiency. Because each person can be different. Studying while listening to music is often more effective than just studying. If you listen to music, you will not know that studying is boring, and if you shake your body or legs to the music, you can exercise. Plus, it's a great way to ward off drowsiness.
g_text_translate.fr:
Étudier en écoutant de la musique ne nuit pas à l’efficacité de l’apprentissage. Parce que chaque personne peut être différente. Étudier en écoutant de la musique est souvent plus efficace que simplement étudier. Si vous écoutez de la musique, vous ne saurez pas qu'étudier est ennuyeux, et si vous secouez votre corps ou vos jambes au son de la musique, vous pouvez faire de l'exercice. De plus, c'est un excellent moyen d'éviter la somnolence.

#######

Studying while listening to music does not impair learning efficiency. Because each person can be different. Studying while listening to music is often more effective than just studying. If you listen to music, you will not know that studying is boring, and if you shake your body or legs to the music, you can exercise. Plus, it's a great way to ward off drowsiness.
g_text_translate.es:
Estudiar mientras se escucha música no perjudica la eficiencia del aprendizaje. Porque cada persona puede ser diferente. Estudiar mientras se escucha música suele ser más eficaz que simplemente estudiar. Si escuchas música no sabrás que estudiar es aburrido, y si mueves el cuerpo o las piernas al ritmo de la música, podrás hacer ejercicio. Además, es una excelente manera de protegerse de la somnolencia.

#######

Studying while listening to music does not impair learning efficiency. Because each person can be different. Studying while listening to music is often more effective than just studying. If you listen to music, you will not know that studying is boring, and if you shake your body or legs to the music, you can exercise. Plus, it's a great way to ward off drowsiness.
g_text_translate.id:
Belajar sambil mendengarkan musik tidak mengganggu efisiensi belajar. Karena setiap orang bisa berbeda-beda. Belajar sambil mendengarkan musik seringkali lebih efektif dibandingkan sekedar belajar. Jika Anda mendengarkan musik, Anda tidak akan tahu bahwa belajar itu membosankan, dan jika Anda menggoyangkan tubuh atau kaki Anda mengikuti musik, Anda bisa berolahraga. Selain itu, ini cara yang bagus untuk mengusir rasa kantuk.

#######

Studying while listening to music does not impair learning efficiency. Because each person can be different. Studying while listening to music is often more effective than just studying. If you listen to music, you will not know that studying is boring, and if you shake your body or legs to the music, you can exercise. Plus, it's a great way to ward off drowsiness.
g_text_translate.ja:
音楽を聴きながら勉強しても学習効率は損なわれません。人はそれぞれ異なる可能性があるからです。音楽を聴きながら勉強すると、ただ勉強するよりも効果的な場合が多いです。音楽を聴けば勉強がつまらないということもなくなり、音楽に合わせて体や足を揺らせば運動にもなります。さらに、眠気を避けるのに最適な方法です。

#######

g_text_translate.de:
Das Lernen beim Musikhören beeinträchtigt die Lerneffizienz nicht. Denn jeder Mensch kann anders sein. Lernen beim Musikhören ist oft effektiver als nur Lernen. Wenn Sie Musik hören, wissen Sie nicht, dass Lernen langweilig ist, und wenn Sie Ihren Körper oder Ihre Beine zur Musik schütteln, können Sie trainieren. Außerdem ist es eine großartige Möglichkeit, Schläfrigkeit abzuwehren.

g_text_translate.pt:
Estudar ouvindo música não prejudica a eficiência do aprendizado. Porque cada pessoa pode ser diferente. Estudar enquanto ouve música costuma ser mais eficaz do que apenas estudar. Se você ouvir música, não saberá que estudar é chato, e se você balançar o corpo ou as pernas ao som da música, poderá se exercitar. Além disso, é uma ótima maneira de evitar a sonolência.

#######

Studying while listening to music does not impair learning efficiency. Because each person can be different. Studying while listening to music is often more effective than just studying. If you listen to music, you will not know that studying is boring, and if you shake your body or legs to the music, you can exercise. Plus, it's a great way to ward off drowsiness.
g_text_translate.hi:
संगीत सुनते हुए पढ़ाई करने से सीखने की क्षमता ख़राब नहीं होती है। क्योंकि हर व्यक्ति अलग हो सकता है. संगीत सुनते हुए अध्ययन करना अक्सर केवल अध्ययन करने से अधिक प्रभावी होता है। यदि आप संगीत सुनते हैं, तो आपको पता नहीं चलेगा कि पढ़ाई उबाऊ है, और यदि आप संगीत की धुन पर अपने शरीर या पैरों को हिलाते हैं, तो आप व्यायाम कर सकते हैं। साथ ही, यह उनींदापन से बचने का एक शानदार तरीका है।

#######

Studying while listening to music does not impair learning efficiency. Because each person can be different. Studying while listening to music is often more effective than just studying. If you listen to music, you will not know that studying is boring, and if you shake your body or legs to the music, you can exercise. Plus, it's a great way to ward off drowsiness.
g_text_translate.tr:
Müzik dinlerken ders çalışmak öğrenme verimliliğini etkilemez. Çünkü her insan farklı olabilir. Müzik dinlerken ders çalışmak çoğu zaman ders çalışmaktan daha etkilidir. Müzik dinlerseniz ders çalışmanın sıkıcı olduğunu bilmezsiniz ve müzikle vücudunuzu veya bacaklarınızı sallarsanız egzersiz yapabilirsiniz. Ayrıca, uyuşukluğu önlemenin harika bir yoludur.

#######

Studying while listening to music does not impair learning efficiency. Because each person can be different. Studying while listening to music is often more effective than just studying. If you listen to music, you will not know that studying is boring, and if you shake your body or legs to the music, you can exercise. Plus, it's a great way to ward off drowsiness.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn.
1. Nếu quan tâm đến âm nhạc thì không thể học được.
2. Nghe nhạc quá lâu sẽ trở nên nhàm chán. 
3. Vừa nghe nhạc vừa học có thể có hiệu quả.
4. Nếu lắc lư cơ thể theo nhạc thì năng suất sẽ giảm.
--------------------
Vừa học vừa nghe nhạc không có nghĩa là hiệu quả học tập của bạn bị hạ thấp, tức là cũng có thể có hiệu quả. 3 là đáp án đúng.
explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. You can't study if you pay attention to music.
2. Listening to music for too long gets boring.
3. Studying while listening to music can be effective.
4. If you shake your body to the music, your efficiency decreases.
--------------------
Studying while listening to music does not mean that the learning efficiency will be low, it can also be effective. 3 is the correct answer.

--------------------
Studiare ascoltando musica non significa che l'efficienza dell'apprendimento sarà bassa, può anche essere efficace. 3 è la risposta corretta.

Paragrafın içeriğine uygun olanı seçin.
1. Müziğe dikkat ederseniz ders çalışamazsınız.
2. Çok uzun süre müzik dinlemek sıkıcı olur.
3. Müzik dinlerken ders çalışmak etkili olabilir.
4. Müzik eşliğinde vücudunuzu sallarsanız verimliliğiniz düşer.
--------------------
Müzik dinlerken ders çalışmak öğrenme veriminin düşük olacağı anlamına gelmez, aynı zamanda etkili de olabilir. 3 doğru cevaptır.

#######

Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. You can't study if you pay attention to music.
2. Listening to music for too long gets boring.
3. Studying while listening to music can be effective.
4. If you shake your body to the music, your efficiency decreases.
--------------------
Studying while listening to music does not mean that the learning efficiency will be low, it can also be effective. 3 is the correct answer.

general.g_text: 오존층의 파괴로 자외선에 과다 노출이 되면 가축이 잘 자라지 못하고, 농작물의 수확량이 감소하게 되며 플랑크톤을 비롯한 생태계도 영향을 받는다. (        ) 자외선은 사람에게도 영향을 끼친다. 사람이 자외선에 노출되면 피부암에 걸릴 위험이 높아지며 눈에도 손상을 입힌다. 특히, 자외선은 아이들의 눈에 더 큰 영향을 끼친다. 성인의 눈은 자외선을 일부 흡수하지만, 아이들의 경우 자외선을 곧바로 통과시켜 눈의 망막이 직접 자극받으므로 큰 피해를 입을 수 있다.

g_text_translate.vi: Việc tiếp xúc quá nhiều với tia UV do tầng ozon bị phá hủy khiến gia súc khó phát triển, năng suất nông sản giảm, các hệ sinh thái trong đó có sinh vật phù du cũng bị ảnh hưởng. (        ) tia UV còn ảnh hưởng đến con người. Tiếp xúc với tia UV làm tăng nguy cơ ung thư da và gây hại cho mắt. Đặc biệt, tia UV có ảnh hưởng lớn hơn đến mắt của trẻ em. Mắt người trưởng thành hấp thụ một phần tia UV, nhưng đối với trẻ em, tia UV đi qua trực tiếp và võng mạc của mắt bị kích thích trực tiếp, có thể gây tổn thương lớn.
g_text_translate.en: Excessive exposure to ultraviolet rays due to the destruction of the ozone layer will prevent livestock from growing well, reduce crop yields, and affect plankton and other ecosystems. In addition, ultraviolet rays also affect people. Exposure to ultraviolet rays increases the risk of skin cancer and damages the eyes. In particular, ultraviolet rays have a greater effect on children's eyes. Adults' eyes absorb some ultraviolet rays, but in the case of children, ultraviolet rays pass through directly and the retina of the eyes is directly stimulated, so they can suffer great damage.
g_text_translate.it:
L’eccessiva esposizione ai raggi ultravioletti dovuta alla distruzione dello strato di ozono impedirà al bestiame di crescere bene, ridurrà i raccolti e influenzerà il plancton e altri ecosistemi. Inoltre, i raggi ultravioletti colpiscono anche le persone. L’esposizione ai raggi ultravioletti aumenta il rischio di cancro della pelle e danneggia gli occhi. In particolare, i raggi ultravioletti hanno un effetto maggiore sugli occhi dei bambini. Gli occhi degli adulti assorbono alcuni raggi ultravioletti, ma nel caso dei bambini i raggi ultravioletti passano direttamente e la retina degli occhi viene stimolata direttamente, quindi possono subire gravi danni.

#######

Excessive exposure to ultraviolet rays due to the destruction of the ozone layer will prevent livestock from growing well, reduce crop yields, and affect plankton and other ecosystems. In addition, ultraviolet rays also affect people. Exposure to ultraviolet rays increases the risk of skin cancer and damages the eyes. In particular, ultraviolet rays have a greater effect on children's eyes. Adults' eyes absorb some ultraviolet rays, but in the case of children, ultraviolet rays pass through directly and the retina of the eyes is directly stimulated, so they can suffer great damage.
g_text_translate.fr:
Une exposition excessive aux rayons ultraviolets due à la destruction de la couche d’ozone empêchera le bétail de bien se développer, réduira les rendements des cultures et affectera le plancton et d’autres écosystèmes. De plus, les rayons ultraviolets affectent également les personnes. L'exposition aux rayons ultraviolets augmente le risque de cancer de la peau et endommage les yeux. Les rayons ultraviolets ont notamment un effet plus important sur les yeux des enfants. Les yeux des adultes absorbent une partie des rayons ultraviolets, mais dans le cas des enfants, les rayons ultraviolets les traversent directement et la rétine des yeux est directement stimulée, ce qui peut entraîner de graves dommages.

#######

Excessive exposure to ultraviolet rays due to the destruction of the ozone layer will prevent livestock from growing well, reduce crop yields, and affect plankton and other ecosystems. In addition, ultraviolet rays also affect people. Exposure to ultraviolet rays increases the risk of skin cancer and damages the eyes. In particular, ultraviolet rays have a greater effect on children's eyes. Adults' eyes absorb some ultraviolet rays, but in the case of children, ultraviolet rays pass through directly and the retina of the eyes is directly stimulated, so they can suffer great damage.
g_text_translate.es:
La exposición excesiva a los rayos ultravioleta debido a la destrucción de la capa de ozono impedirá que el ganado crezca bien, reducirá el rendimiento de los cultivos y afectará al plancton y otros ecosistemas. Además, los rayos ultravioleta también afectan a las personas. La exposición a los rayos ultravioleta aumenta el riesgo de cáncer de piel y daña los ojos. En particular, los rayos ultravioleta tienen un mayor efecto en los ojos de los niños. Los ojos de los adultos absorben algunos rayos ultravioleta, pero en el caso de los niños los rayos ultravioleta pasan directamente y la retina de los ojos se estimula directamente, por lo que pueden sufrir grandes daños.

g_text_translate.id:
Paparan sinar ultraviolet yang berlebihan akibat rusaknya lapisan ozon akan menghambat pertumbuhan ternak, menurunkan hasil panen, serta mempengaruhi plankton dan ekosistem lainnya. Selain itu, sinar ultraviolet juga mempengaruhi manusia. Paparan sinar ultraviolet meningkatkan risiko kanker kulit dan merusak mata. Secara khusus, sinar ultraviolet memiliki pengaruh yang lebih besar pada mata anak-anak. Mata orang dewasa menyerap sebagian sinar ultraviolet, namun pada kasus anak-anak, sinar ultraviolet langsung menembus dan merangsang retina mata secara langsung, sehingga dapat mengalami kerusakan parah.

g_text_translate.ja:
オゾン層の破壊により紫外線を過剰に浴びると、家畜の生育が阻害され、作物の収量が減少し、プランクトンなどの生態系に影響を与えます。また、紫外線は人体にも影響を与えます。紫外線にさらされると、皮膚がんのリスクが高まり、目に損傷を与えます。特に紫外線は子どもの目に大きな影響を与えます。大人の目はある程度の紫外線を吸収しますが、子供の場合は紫外線が直接透過し、目の網膜が直接刺激されるため大きなダメージを受けます。

#######

In particular, ultraviolet rays have a greater effect on children's eyes. Adults' eyes absorb some ultraviolet rays, but in the case of children, ultraviolet rays pass through directly and the retina of the eyes is directly stimulated, so they can suffer great damage.
g_text_translate.de:
Eine übermäßige Exposition gegenüber ultravioletten Strahlen aufgrund der Zerstörung der Ozonschicht beeinträchtigt das gute Wachstum der Nutztiere, verringert die Ernteerträge und beeinträchtigt das Plankton und andere Ökosysteme. Darüber hinaus wirken sich ultraviolette Strahlen auch auf den Menschen aus. Die Einwirkung ultravioletter Strahlung erhöht das Hautkrebsrisiko und schädigt die Augen. Insbesondere ultraviolette Strahlen wirken sich stärker auf die Augen von Kindern aus. Die Augen von Erwachsenen absorbieren einen Teil der ultravioletten Strahlen, aber bei Kindern dringen die ultravioletten Strahlen direkt durch und die Netzhaut der Augen wird direkt stimuliert, sodass sie großen Schaden erleiden können.

#######

g_text_translate.zh-CN:
由于臭氧层破坏而过度接触紫外线，会导致牲畜生长不良、农作物减产，并影响浮游生物和其他生态系统。此外，紫外线对人也有影响。暴露在紫外线下会增加患皮肤癌的风险并损害眼睛。尤其是紫外线对儿童眼睛的影响更大。成人的眼睛会吸收部分紫外线，但对于儿童来说，紫外线直接透过，眼睛的视网膜受到直接刺激，因此会受到很大的伤害。

g_text_translate.ru:
Чрезмерное воздействие ультрафиолетовых лучей из-за разрушения озонового слоя помешает хорошему росту скота, снизит урожайность сельскохозяйственных культур и повлияет на планктон и другие экосистемы. Кроме того, ультрафиолетовые лучи также влияют на людей. Воздействие ультрафиолетовых лучей увеличивает риск рака кожи и повреждает глаза. В частности, большее влияние на детские глаза оказывают ультрафиолетовые лучи. Глаза взрослых поглощают некоторое количество ультрафиолетовых лучей, но в случае детей ультрафиолетовые лучи проходят напрямую и непосредственно стимулируют сетчатку глаз, поэтому они могут пострадать от серьезных повреждений.

การได้รับรังสีอัลตราไวโอเลตมากเกินไปเนื่องจากการทำลายชั้นโอโซนจะทำให้ปศุสัตว์ไม่สามารถเจริญเติบโตได้ดี ลดผลผลิตพืชผล และส่งผลกระทบต่อแพลงก์ตอนและระบบนิเวศอื่นๆ นอกจากนี้รังสีอัลตราไวโอเลตยังส่งผลต่อผู้คนด้วย การได้รับรังสีอัลตราไวโอเลตจะเพิ่มความเสี่ยงต่อการเป็นมะเร็งผิวหนังและทำลายดวงตา โดยเฉพาะอย่างยิ่งรังสีอัลตราไวโอเลตมีผลกระทบต่อดวงตาของเด็กมากกว่า ดวงตาของผู้ใหญ่ดูดซับรังสีอัลตราไวโอเลตบางส่วน แต่ในกรณีของเด็ก รังสีอัลตราไวโอเลตจะทะลุผ่านโดยตรงและเรตินาของดวงตาจะถูกกระตุ้นโดยตรง ดังนั้นจึงอาจได้รับความเสียหายอย่างมาก

g_text_translate.hi:
ओजोन परत के विनाश के कारण पराबैंगनी किरणों के अत्यधिक संपर्क से पशुधन अच्छी तरह से विकसित नहीं हो पाएगा, फसल की पैदावार कम हो जाएगी और प्लवक और अन्य पारिस्थितिक तंत्र प्रभावित होंगे। इसके अलावा, पराबैंगनी किरणें भी लोगों को प्रभावित करती हैं। पराबैंगनी किरणों के संपर्क में आने से त्वचा कैंसर का खतरा बढ़ जाता है और आंखों को नुकसान पहुंचता है। खासतौर पर बच्चों की आंखों पर पराबैंगनी किरणों का ज्यादा असर होता है। वयस्कों की आंखें कुछ पराबैंगनी किरणों को अवशोषित करती हैं, लेकिन बच्चों के मामले में, पराबैंगनी किरणें सीधे गुजरती हैं और आंखों की रेटिना सीधे उत्तेजित होती है, इसलिए उन्हें बहुत नुकसान हो सकता है।

g_text_translate.tr:
Ozon tabakasının tahrip olması nedeniyle ultraviyole ışınlarına aşırı maruz kalmak, besi hayvanlarının iyi büyümesini engelleyecek, mahsul verimini düşürecek, plankton ve diğer ekosistemleri etkileyecektir. Ayrıca ultraviyole ışınlar da insanları etkilemektedir. Ultraviyole ışınlara maruz kalmak cilt kanseri riskini artırır ve gözlere zarar verir. Özellikle ultraviyole ışınlarının çocukların gözleri üzerinde etkisi daha fazladır. Yetişkinlerin gözleri ultraviyole ışınların bir kısmını emer, ancak çocuklarda ultraviyole ışınlar doğrudan geçerek gözlerin retinası doğrudan uyarılır ve bu nedenle büyük hasara uğrayabilirler.

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 오존층 파괴와 농작물의 수확량은 관계가 없다.
아이들의 눈은 자외선을 흡수해서 눈의 망막이 자극받는다.
자외선은 가축뿐만 아니라 사람에게도 영향을 미친다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn.
1. Sự phá hủy tầng ozone và sản lượng thu hoạch nông sản không liên quan.
2. Nếu tiếp xúc trực tiếp với tia UV thì sẽ bị ung thư da.
3. Mắt trẻ hấp thụ tia UV và võng mạc mắt bị kích thích.
4. Tia UV ảnh hưởng đến con người cũng như gia súc.
--------------------
Tia UV khiến gia súc khó phát triển, con người cũng bị tăng nguy cơ ung thư da và gây hại cho mắt. Như vậy 4 là đáp án đúng.
explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. There is no relationship between ozone layer destruction and crop yields.
2. Direct exposure to UV rays causes skin cancer.
3. Children's eyes absorb ultraviolet rays and the retina of the eyes is stimulated.
4. Ultraviolet rays affect humans as well as livestock.
--------------------
UV rays make it difficult for livestock to grow, humans also have an increased risk of skin cancer and damage to the eyes. So 4 is the correct answer.
explain.it:

3. Gli occhi dei bambini assorbono i raggi ultravioletti e la retina degli occhi viene stimolata.
4. I raggi ultravioletti colpiscono sia gli esseri umani che il bestiame.
--------------------
I raggi UV rendono difficile la crescita del bestiame, inoltre gli esseri umani corrono un rischio maggiore di cancro alla pelle e danni agli occhi. Quindi 4 è la risposta corretta.

--------------------
Les rayons UV rendent difficile la croissance du bétail et les humains courent également un risque accru de cancer de la peau et de lésions oculaires. Donc 4 est la bonne réponse.

general.g_text: 야구 경기를 보면 껌을 씹고 있는 선수들의 모습을 자주 볼 수 있다. 야구 선수들이 껌을 씹는 이유는 경기에 대한 긴장감을 줄이기 위해서이다. 껌을 씹는 것 말고도 크게 소리를 지르거나 눈을 감고 조용히 노래를 따라 하는 것도 마찬가지의 행동이다. (        ) 숨을 천천히 쉬는 것도 긴장을 푸는 좋은 방법 중의 하나이다.

g_text_translate.vi: Nếu xem các trận đấu bóng chày, bạn có thể thường thấy hình ảnh các cầu thủ nhai kẹo cao su. Lý do các cầu thủ bóng chày nhai kẹo cao su là để giảm cảm giác căng thẳng về trận đấu. Ngoài việc nhai kẹo cao su, hét to hoặc nhắm mắt và lặng lẽ hát theo nhạc cũng là hành động có mục đích tương tự. (        ) thở chậm cũng là một trong những cách tốt để giải tỏa căng thẳng.
g_text_translate.en: If you watch a baseball game, you can often see players chewing gum. The reason why baseball players chew gum is to reduce tension in the game. Aside from chewing gum, it's the same behavior to scream loudly or to sing along quietly with your eyes closed. And slow breathing is one of the best ways to relax.
g_text_translate.it:
Se guardi una partita di baseball, puoi spesso vedere i giocatori che masticano una gomma. Il motivo per cui i giocatori di baseball masticano gomme è per ridurre la tensione nel gioco. A parte masticare una gomma, urlare ad alta voce o cantare a bassa voce con gli occhi chiusi è lo stesso comportamento. E la respirazione lenta è uno dei modi migliori per rilassarsi.

#######

If you watch a baseball game, you can often see players chewing gum. The reason why baseball players chew gum is to reduce tension in the game. Aside from chewing gum, it's the same behavior to scream loudly or to sing along quietly with your eyes closed. And slow breathing is one of the best ways to relax.
g_text_translate.fr:

À part mâcher du chewing-gum, c'est le même comportement que de crier fort ou de chanter doucement les yeux fermés. Et respirer lentement est l’un des meilleurs moyens de se détendre.

Aparte de masticar chicle, el mismo comportamiento es gritar fuerte o cantar en voz baja con los ojos cerrados. Y la respiración lenta es una de las mejores formas de relajarse.

Selain mengunyah permen karet, berteriak keras atau bernyanyi pelan dengan mata tertutup juga merupakan perilaku yang sama. Dan pernapasan lambat adalah salah satu cara terbaik untuk bersantai.

Abgesehen vom Kaugummikauen ist es das gleiche Verhalten, laut zu schreien oder leise mit geschlossenen Augen mitzusingen. Und langsames Atmen ist eine der besten Möglichkeiten, sich zu entspannen.

#######

general.g_text: 도로에 쌓인 눈을 치우는 가장 유용한 방법은 제설제를 사용하는 것이다. 가장 오래전부터 사용했던 제설제는 염화나트륨이 주성분인 값싼 암염이다. 도로에 암염을 뿌려 두면 지나가는 자동차 타이어와의 마찰열에 의해 주변의 눈이 녹는다. (        ) 암염은 기온이 영하 7도 이하가 되면 제설 효과가 크게 줄어든다. 너무 추우면 소금물도 얼어 버리기 때문이다. 또한 눈이 녹아서 생긴 소금물은 특히 자동차나 철교 등의 철제 시설물을 부식시키기 때문에 심각한 사고를 유발할 수도 있다.

g_text_translate.vi: Cách dọn tuyết hữu ích nhất khi đi đường là sử dụng chất dọn tuyết. Chất dọn tuyết lâu đời nhất được sử dụng là muối mỏ rẻ tiền với thành phần chính là natri clorua. Khi rắc muối mỏ trên đường, tuyết xung quanh tan ra do nhiệt ma sát của muối với lốp xe ô tô chạy qua. (        ) tác dụng loại bỏ tuyết của muối mỏ bị giảm đi rất nhiều khi nhiệt độ xuống dưới âm 7 độ C. Bởi vì nếu quá lạnh, nước muối cũng sẽ đông lại. Ngoài ra, nước muối xuất hiện do tuyết tan đặc biệt có thể gây ra tai nạn nghiêm trọng vì nó ăn mòn các cơ sở vật chất bằng sắt như ô tô và cầu sắt.
g_text_translate.en: The most useful way to clear snow from roads is to use a snow remover. The snow remover that has been used for a long time is cheap rock salt whose main component is sodium chloride. When rock salt is sprinkled on the road, the surrounding snow melts due to the heat of friction with the tires of cars passing by. However, the effect of rock salt is greatly reduced when the temperature is below minus 7 degrees Celsius. If it is too cold, even salt water will freeze. In addition, salt water from melting snow can cause serious accidents, especially since it corrodes steel facilities such as automobiles and railroad bridges.
g_text_translate.it:
Il modo più utile per rimuovere la neve dalle strade è utilizzare uno spazzaneve. Lo sgombraneve utilizzato da molto tempo è il salgemma economico, il cui componente principale è il cloruro di sodio. Quando si sparge salgemma sulla strada, la neve circostante si scioglie a causa del calore derivante dall'attrito con i pneumatici delle auto che passano. Tuttavia, l'effetto del salgemma è notevolmente ridotto quando la temperatura è inferiore a meno 7 gradi Celsius. Se fa troppo freddo, anche l’acqua salata si congela. Inoltre, l’acqua salata derivante dallo scioglimento della neve può causare gravi incidenti, soprattutto perché corrode strutture in acciaio come automobili e ponti ferroviari.

#######

The most useful way to clear snow from roads is to use a snow remover. The snow remover that has been used for a long time is cheap rock salt whose main component is sodium chloride. When rock salt is sprinkled on the road, the surrounding snow melts due to the heat of friction with the tires of cars passing by. However, the effect of rock salt is greatly reduced when the temperature is below minus 7 degrees Celsius. If it is too cold, even salt water will freeze. In addition, salt water from melting snow can cause serious accidents, especially since it corrodes steel facilities such as automobiles and railroad bridges.
g_text_translate.fr:
Le moyen le plus utile de déneiger les routes est d’utiliser un déneigeur. Le déneigeur utilisé depuis longtemps est du sel gemme bon marché dont le composant principal est le chlorure de sodium. Lorsque du sel gemme est répandu sur la route, la neige environnante fond à cause de la chaleur de friction avec les pneus des voitures qui passent. Cependant, l’effet du sel gemme est considérablement réduit lorsque la température descend en dessous de moins 7 degrés Celsius. S’il fait trop froid, même l’eau salée gèlera. De plus, l’eau salée issue de la fonte des neiges peut provoquer de graves accidents, notamment parce qu’elle corrode les installations en acier telles que les automobiles et les ponts ferroviaires.

#######

The most useful way to clear snow from roads is to use a snow remover. The snow remover that has been used for a long time is cheap rock salt whose main component is sodium chloride. When rock salt is sprinkled on the road, the surrounding snow melts due to the heat of friction with the tires of cars passing by. However, the effect of rock salt is greatly reduced when the temperature is below minus 7 degrees Celsius. If it is too cold, even salt water will freeze. In addition, salt water from melting snow can cause serious accidents, especially since it corrodes steel facilities such as automobiles and railroad bridges.
g_text_translate.es:
La forma más útil de quitar la nieve de las carreteras es utilizar un quitanieves. El quitanieves que se utiliza desde hace mucho tiempo es la sal gema barata cuyo componente principal es el cloruro de sodio. Cuando se espolvorea sal gema sobre la carretera, la nieve circundante se derrite debido al calor de la fricción con los neumáticos de los coches que pasan. Sin embargo, el efecto de la sal gema se reduce considerablemente cuando la temperatura es inferior a -7 grados centígrados. Si hace demasiado frío, incluso el agua salada se congelará. Además, el agua salada procedente del derretimiento de la nieve puede provocar accidentes graves, sobre todo porque corroe las instalaciones de acero, como los automóviles y los puentes ferroviarios.

#######

g_text_translate.id:
Cara paling berguna untuk membersihkan salju dari jalanan adalah dengan menggunakan penghilang salju. Penghilang salju yang sudah lama digunakan adalah garam batu murah yang komponen utamanya adalah natrium klorida. Saat garam batu ditaburkan di jalan, salju di sekitarnya mencair akibat panas gesekan dengan ban mobil yang lewat. Namun, efek garam batu akan sangat berkurang ketika suhu berada di bawah minus 7 derajat Celcius. Jika terlalu dingin, air asin pun akan membeku. Selain itu, air asin dari salju yang mencair dapat menyebabkan kecelakaan serius, terutama karena dapat menimbulkan korosi pada fasilitas baja seperti mobil dan jembatan kereta api.

g_text_translate.ja:
道路の雪を取り除く最も便利な方法は、除雪機を使用することです。昔から使われている除雪剤は塩化ナトリウムを主成分とした安価な岩塩です。岩塩を道路に撒くと、通過する車のタイヤとの摩擦熱で周囲の雪が溶けます。ただし、氷点下7℃以下になると岩塩の効果は大きく減少します。寒すぎると塩水も凍ってしまいます。また、雪解け水による塩水は、特に自動車や鉄道橋などの鉄鋼施設を腐食させるため、重大な事故を引き起こす可能性があります。

g_text_translate.de:
Die nützlichste Methode, Schnee von Straßen zu räumen, ist die Verwendung eines Schneeräumers. Der seit langem verwendete Schneeräumer ist billiges Steinsalz, dessen Hauptbestandteil Natriumchlorid ist. Wenn Steinsalz auf die Straße gestreut wird, schmilzt der umgebende Schnee aufgrund der Reibungshitze mit den Reifen vorbeifahrender Autos. Allerdings lässt die Wirkung von Steinsalz bei Temperaturen unter minus 7 Grad Celsius stark nach. Ist es zu kalt, gefriert sogar Salzwasser. Darüber hinaus kann Salzwasser aus schmelzendem Schnee schwere Unfälle verursachen, insbesondere weil es Stahlanlagen wie Autos und Eisenbahnbrücken angreift.

#######

However, the effect of rock salt is greatly reduced when the temperature is below minus 7 degrees Celsius. If it is too cold, even salt water will freeze. g_text_translate.zh-CN:
清除道路积雪的最有用方法是使用除雪机。长期以来使用的除雪剂是廉价的岩盐，其主要成分是氯化钠。当岩盐撒在路上时，周围的雪会因与经过的汽车轮胎摩擦产生的热量而融化。但当温度低于-7摄氏度时，岩盐的作用就会大大减弱。如果太冷，即使是盐水也会结冰。此外，融雪产生的盐水会导致严重事故，特别是它会腐蚀汽车和铁路桥梁等钢铁设施。

清除道路積雪的最有用方法是使用除雪機。長期以來使用的除雪劑是廉價的岩鹽，其主要成分是氯化鈉。當岩鹽撒在路上時，周圍的雪會因與經過的汽車輪胎摩擦產生的熱量而融化。但當溫度低於-7攝氏度時，岩鹽的作用就會大大減弱。如果太冷，即使是鹽水也會結冰。此外，融雪產生的鹽水會導致嚴重事故，特別是它會腐蝕汽車和鐵路橋樑等鋼鐵設施。

g_text_translate.ru:
Самый эффективный способ расчистить дороги от снега – использовать снегоочиститель. Снегоочиститель, который используется уже давно, представляет собой дешевую каменную соль, основным компонентом которой является хлорид натрия. Когда дорогу посыпают каменной солью, окружающий снег тает из-за тепла трения о шины проезжающих мимо автомобилей. Однако действие каменной соли значительно снижается при температуре ниже минус 7 градусов по Цельсию. Если будет слишком холодно, даже соленая вода замерзнет. Кроме того, соленая вода от таяния снега может стать причиной серьезных аварий, особенно потому, что она разъедает стальные конструкции, такие как автомобили и железнодорожные мосты.

วิธีที่มีประโยชน์ที่สุดในการขจัดหิมะออกจากถนนคือการใช้เครื่องกำจัดหิมะ น้ำยากำจัดหิมะที่ใช้กันมานานคือเกลือสินเธาว์ราคาถูกซึ่งมีส่วนประกอบหลักคือโซเดียมคลอไรด์ เมื่อโรยเกลือสินเธาว์ลงบนถนน หิมะโดยรอบจะละลายเนื่องจากความร้อนจากการเสียดสีกับยางรถยนต์ที่วิ่งผ่านไปมา อย่างไรก็ตาม ผลกระทบของเกลือสินเธาว์จะลดลงอย่างมากเมื่ออุณหภูมิต่ำกว่าลบ 7 องศาเซลเซียส หากเย็นเกินไปแม้แต่น้ำเค็มก็จะแข็งตัว นอกจากนี้ น้ำเค็มจากหิมะละลายอาจทำให้เกิดอุบัติเหตุร้ายแรงได้ โดยเฉพาะอย่างยิ่งเนื่องจากน้ำเกลือกัดกร่อนโรงงานที่เป็นเหล็ก เช่น รถยนต์ และสะพานรถไฟ

In addition, salt water from melting snow can cause serious accidents, especially since it corrodes steel facilities such as automobiles and railroad bridges.
g_text_translate.tr:
Yollardaki karı temizlemenin en kullanışlı yolu kar temizleme makinesi kullanmaktır. Uzun süredir kullanılan kar temizleme maddesi ana bileşeni sodyum klorür olan ucuz kaya tuzudur. Yola kaya tuzu serpildiğinde, yoldan geçen arabaların lastiklerinin sürtünme ısısından dolayı çevredeki karlar erir. Ancak sıcaklık eksi 7 santigrat derecenin altına düştüğünde kaya tuzunun etkisi büyük ölçüde azalır. Çok soğuksa tuzlu su bile donar. Ayrıca eriyen karlardan kaynaklanan tuzlu su, özellikle otomobil ve demiryolu köprüleri gibi çelik tesisleri aşındırdığı için ciddi kazalara neden olabiliyor.

#######

The most useful way to clear snow from roads is to use a snow remover. The snow remover that has been used for a long time is cheap rock salt whose main component is sodium chloride. When rock salt is sprinkled on the road, the surrounding snow melts due to the heat of friction with the tires of cars passing by. However, the effect of rock salt is greatly reduced when the temperature is below minus 7 degrees Celsius. If it is too cold, even salt water will freeze. In addition, salt water from melting snow can cause serious accidents, especially since it corrodes steel facilities such as automobiles and railroad bridges.

1. कार के टायरों पर सेंधा नमक छिड़कने से बर्फीली सड़कों पर दुर्घटनाओं को रोका जा सकता है।
2. सेंधा नमक सस्ता तो होता है, लेकिन इसके कई साइड इफेक्ट्स भी होते हैं।
3. सेंधा नमक बर्फ हटाने के लिए इस्तेमाल किया जाने वाला एकमात्र बर्फ हटाने वाला उपकरण है।
4. सेंधा नमक -7 डिग्री सेल्सियस या उससे कम तापमान पर सबसे अच्छा बर्फ हटाने का प्रभाव दिखाता है।
------------------------
सेंधा नमक सस्ता होता है लेकिन इसके कई दुष्प्रभाव होते हैं जैसे तापमान शून्य से 7 डिग्री सेल्सियस नीचे होने पर प्रभाव कम हो जाना, दुर्घटनाओं का कारण बनना आसान आदि। 2 सही उत्तर है।

#######

Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. Spraying rock salt on car tires can prevent accidents in snowy roads.
2. Rock salt is cheap, but has many side effects.
3. Rock salt is the only snow remover used to clear snow.
4. Rock salt shows the best snow removal effect at -7 degrees Celsius or less.
--------------------
Rock salt is cheap but has many side effects such as reducing the effect when the temperature is below minus 7 degrees Celsius, easy to cause accidents, etc. 2 is the correct answer.
explain.tr:
Paragrafın içeriğine uygun olanı seçin.
1. Araba lastiklerine kaya tuzu sıkmak karlı yollarda kazaları önleyebilir.
2. Kaya tuzu ucuzdur ancak birçok yan etkisi vardır.
3. Kar temizlemede kullanılan tek kar temizleme aracı kaya tuzudur.
4. Kaya tuzu en iyi kar temizleme etkisini -7 santigrat derece veya daha düşük sıcaklıklarda gösterir.
--------------------
Kaya tuzu ucuzdur ancak sıcaklığın eksi 7 santigrat derecenin altına düştüğünde etkisini azaltması, kazalara yol açması kolay vb. gibi birçok yan etkisi vardır. Doğru cevap 2'dir.

#######

Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. Spraying rock salt on car tires can prevent accidents in snowy roads.
2. Rock salt is cheap, but has many side effects.
3. Rock salt is the only snow remover used to clear snow.
4. Rock salt shows the best snow removal effect at -7 degrees Celsius or less.
--------------------
Rock salt is cheap but has many side effects such as reducing the effect when the temperature is below minus 7 degrees Celsius, easy to cause accidents, etc. 2 is the correct answer.

general.g_text: 은행나무는 가로수로 널리 활용되어 주변에서 흔히 볼 수 있다. 도시의 기후와 토양에 잘 맞고 오염 물질과 병충해에 강하기 때문에 활용된 것이다. (        ) 환경오염이 아주 심했던 지역에서 가장 먼저 자라난 것도 바로 은행나무였다. 하지만 은행나무는 암나무에서 열리는 열매 냄새가 고약하다는 단점이 있다. 그래서 각 지방자치단체에서는 암나무 대신에 열매가 열리지 않는 수나무로 가로수를 단계적으로 교체하겠다고 발표를 하였다.

g_text_translate.vi: Cây ngân hạnh được sử dụng rộng rãi làm cây ven đường nên ta có thể thường nhìn thấy chúng xung quanh. Chúng được sử dụng vì phù hợp với khí hậu và đất đai của thành phố và chống chọi tốt với chất ô nhiễm và sâu bọ. (        ) loài cây sinh trưởng trước nhất ở khu vực từng bị ô nhiễm rất nghiêm trọng cũng chính là cây ngân hạnh. Tuy nhiên, cây ngân hạnh có một nhược điểm là quả từ cây cái có mùi hôi. Vì vậy, các chính quyền địa phương đã tuyên bố sẽ thay thế dần cây ven đường bằng cây đực không ra quả thay cho cây cái.
g_text_translate.en: The ginkgo tree is widely used as a street tree and is commonly seen in the surrounding area. It was used because it fits well with the city's climate and soil and is resistant to pollutants and pests. In fact, it was the ginkgo tree that grew first in an area where environmental pollution was very severe. However, the ginkgo tree has a disadvantage that the fruit from the female tree smells bad. Therefore, each local government announced that it would gradually replace the street trees with male trees with no fruit instead of female trees.
g_text_translate.it:
L'albero del ginkgo è ampiamente utilizzato come albero da strada ed è comunemente visto nell'area circostante. È stato utilizzato perché si adatta bene al clima e al suolo della città ed è resistente agli agenti inquinanti e ai parassiti. Infatti, fu l’albero del ginkgo a crescere per primo in una zona dove l’inquinamento ambientale era molto grave. Tuttavia, l'albero del ginkgo ha lo svantaggio che il frutto dell'albero femmina ha un cattivo odore. Pertanto, ogni governo locale ha annunciato che avrebbe gradualmente sostituito gli alberi lungo le strade con alberi maschi senza frutti invece che con alberi femminili.

#######

In fact, it was the ginkgo tree that grew first in an area where environmental pollution was very severe. However, the ginkgo tree has a disadvantage that the fruit from the female tree smells bad. g_text_translate.fr:
Le ginkgo est un arbre très utilisé dans les rues et on le voit souvent dans les environs. Il a été utilisé parce qu'il s'adapte bien au climat et au sol de la ville et qu'il est résistant aux polluants et aux parasites. En fait, c'est le ginkgo qui a poussé en premier dans une zone où la pollution environnementale était très grave. Cependant, le ginkgo a l'inconvénient que les fruits de l'arbre femelle sentent mauvais. Par conséquent, chaque gouvernement local a annoncé qu'il remplacerait progressivement les arbres de rue par des arbres mâles sans fruits au lieu d'arbres femelles.

#######

g_text_translate.es:
El árbol de ginkgo se usa ampliamente como árbol callejero y se ve comúnmente en los alrededores. Se utilizó porque se adapta bien al clima y al suelo de la ciudad y es resistente a contaminantes y plagas. De hecho, fue el árbol de ginkgo el que creció primero en una zona donde la contaminación ambiental era muy grave. Sin embargo, el árbol de ginkgo tiene la desventaja de que el fruto del árbol hembra huele mal. Por lo tanto, cada gobierno local anunció que reemplazaría gradualmente los árboles de la calle con árboles masculinos sin frutos en lugar de árboles femeninos.

g_text_translate.id:
Pohon ginkgo banyak digunakan sebagai pohon jalanan dan biasa terlihat di lingkungan sekitar. Penggunaannya karena cocok dengan iklim dan tanah kota serta tahan terhadap polutan dan hama. Bahkan, pohon ginkgolah yang pertama kali tumbuh di daerah yang pencemaran lingkungannya sangat parah. Namun pohon ginkgo memiliki kelemahan yaitu buah dari pohon betinanya berbau tidak sedap. Oleh karena itu, setiap pemerintah daerah mengumumkan bahwa mereka secara bertahap akan mengganti pohon-pohon jalanan dengan pohon jantan yang tidak berbuah, dan menggantinya dengan pohon betina.

g_text_translate.ja:
イチョウの木は街路樹として広く利用されており、周辺地域でよく見られます。都市の気候や土壌によく合い、汚染物質や害虫に強いことから使われた。実は、環境汚染がひどい地域に最初に生えたのはイチョウの木でした。しかし、イチョウの木には雌木の実が臭いという欠点があります。このため、各自治体は街路樹を雌木から実のない雄木に順次植え替えていくと発表した。

g_text_translate.de:
Der Ginkgobaum wird häufig als Straßenbaum genutzt und ist in der Umgebung häufig anzutreffen. Es wurde verwendet, weil es gut zum Klima und Boden der Stadt passt und resistent gegen Schadstoffe und Schädlinge ist. Tatsächlich war es der Ginkgobaum, der zuerst in einem Gebiet wuchs, in dem die Umweltverschmutzung sehr stark war. Allerdings hat der Ginkgobaum den Nachteil, dass die Früchte des weiblichen Baumes unangenehm riechen. Daher kündigte jede Kommunalverwaltung an, die Straßenbäume nach und nach durch männliche Bäume ohne Früchte anstelle weiblicher Bäume zu ersetzen.

g_text_translate.zh-CN:
银杏树被广泛用作行道树，在周边地区很常见。之所以使用它，是因为它非常适合城市的气候和土壤，并且能抵抗污染物和害虫。事实上，在环境污染非常严重的地区，银杏树是最先生长出来的。然而，银杏树有一个缺点，那就是雌树结出的果实气味难闻。因此，各地方政府宣布将逐步将行道树更换为不结果实的雄树，而不是雌树。

Дерево гинкго широко используется в качестве уличного дерева, и его часто можно увидеть в окрестностях. g_text_translate.hi:
जिन्कगो पेड़ का इस्तेमाल सड़क के पेड़ के रूप में व्यापक रूप से किया जाता है और इसे आमतौर पर आस-पास के इलाकों में देखा जाता है। इसका इस्तेमाल इसलिए किया गया क्योंकि यह शहर की जलवायु और मिट्टी के साथ अच्छी तरह से फिट बैठता है और प्रदूषकों और कीटों के लिए प्रतिरोधी है। वास्तव में, यह जिन्कगो पेड़ ही था जो सबसे पहले ऐसे क्षेत्र में उगा था जहाँ पर्यावरण प्रदूषण बहुत गंभीर था। हालाँकि, जिन्कगो पेड़ का एक नुकसान यह है कि मादा पेड़ के फल से बदबू आती है। इसलिए, प्रत्येक स्थानीय सरकार ने घोषणा की कि वह धीरे-धीरे सड़क के पेड़ों को मादा पेड़ों के बजाय बिना फल वाले नर पेड़ों से बदल देगी।

Ginkgo ağacı yaygın olarak sokak ağacı olarak kullanılmakta ve çevrede yaygın olarak görülmektedir. Şehrin iklimine ve toprağına iyi uyum sağlaması, kirleticilere ve zararlılara karşı dayanıklı olması nedeniyle kullanıldı. Aslında, çevre kirliliğinin çok şiddetli olduğu bir bölgede ilk yetişen ginkgo ağacıydı. Ancak ginkgo ağacının bir dezavantajı dişi ağacın meyvesinin kötü kokmasıdır. Bu nedenle her yerel yönetim, sokak ağaçlarını kademeli olarak dişi ağaçlar yerine meyvesi olmayan erkek ağaçlarla değiştireceğini duyurdu.
