general.g_text: 사람이 사는 곳에는 어디든지 쓰레기가 생기게 마련이다. 인구가 증가하고 산업이 발달하면서, 각종 쓰레기의 양이 증가하였고 그 종류도 다양해졌다. 게다가 유독한 산업 폐기물까지 생태계 안에 쌓이고 있다. 더 늦기 전에 쓰레기를 자원이라고 생각하고 관리해야 한다. 또한 쓰레기를 줄이거나 되살려 쓰는 등 다양한 방법으로 지구의 앞날에 대비해야 한다. (        ) 우리의 지구는 넘쳐나는 쓰레기로 엉망이 될 것이다.

g_text_translate.vi: Nơi con người sinh sống đương nhiên sẽ xuất hiện rác thải ở bất cứ đâu. Khi dân số tăng lên và công nghiệp phát triển, lượng rác thải ngày càng tăng và chủng loại cũng trở nên đa dạng. Ngoài ra, chất thải công nghiệp độc hại cũng đang tích tụ trong hệ sinh thái. Phải coi rác là tài nguyên và quản lý trước khi quá muộn. Ngoài ra, chúng ta phải chuẩn bị cho tương lai của trái đất bằng nhiều cách khác nhau như giảm lượng rác thải hoặc tái sử dụng chúng. (        ) thì trái đất của chúng ta sẽ trở nên hỗn loạn vì rác tràn ra.
g_text_translate.en: Wherever people live, there is always garbage. As the population increased and industries developed, the amount of various kinds of garbage increased and the types of garbage also diversified. In addition, toxic industrial waste is also accumulating in the ecosystem. Before it's too late, we need to think of garbage as a resource and manage it. In addition, we must prepare for the future of the earth in various ways, such as reducing or reusing waste. Otherwise, our planet will be littered with overflowing garbage.
g_text_translate.it:
Ovunque vivano le persone, c'è sempre spazzatura. Con l’aumento della popolazione e lo sviluppo delle industrie, la quantità di vari tipi di rifiuti è aumentata e anche i tipi di rifiuti si sono diversificati. Inoltre, nell’ecosistema si accumulano anche rifiuti industriali tossici. Prima che sia troppo tardi, dobbiamo pensare ai rifiuti come a una risorsa e gestirla. Inoltre, dobbiamo prepararci per il futuro della terra in vari modi, ad esempio riducendo o riutilizzando i rifiuti. Altrimenti il ​​nostro pianeta sarà disseminato di spazzatura traboccante.

#######

Wherever people live, there is always garbage. As the population increased and industries developed, the amount of various kinds of garbage increased and the types of garbage also diversified. In addition, toxic industrial waste is also accumulating in the ecosystem. Before it's too late, we need to think of garbage as a resource and manage it. In addition, we must prepare for the future of the earth in various ways, such as reducing or reusing waste. Otherwise, our planet will be littered with overflowing garbage.
g_text_translate.fr:
Partout où les gens vivent, il y a toujours des déchets. À mesure que la population augmentait et que les industries se développaient, la quantité de divers types de déchets augmentait et les types de déchets se diversifiaient également. De plus, les déchets industriels toxiques s’accumulent également dans l’écosystème. Avant qu’il ne soit trop tard, nous devons considérer les déchets comme une ressource et les gérer. De plus, nous devons préparer l’avenir de la terre de diverses manières, comme par exemple en réduisant ou en réutilisant les déchets. Sinon, notre planète sera jonchée de déchets débordants.

#######

Wherever people live, there is always garbage. As the population increased and industries developed, the amount of various kinds of garbage increased and the types of garbage also diversified. In addition, toxic industrial waste is also accumulating in the ecosystem. Before it's too late, we need to think of garbage as a resource and manage it. In addition, we must prepare for the future of the earth in various ways, such as reducing or reusing waste. Otherwise, our planet will be littered with overflowing garbage.
g_text_translate.es:
Dondequiera que viva la gente, siempre hay basura. A medida que la población aumentó y las industrias se desarrollaron, la cantidad de diversos tipos de basura aumentó y los tipos de basura también se diversificaron. Además, en el ecosistema también se acumulan residuos industriales tóxicos. Antes de que sea demasiado tarde, debemos pensar en la basura como un recurso y gestionarla. Además, debemos prepararnos para el futuro de la tierra de diversas formas, como reduciendo o reutilizando los residuos. De lo contrario, nuestro planeta quedará plagado de basura desbordante.

#######

Wherever people live, there is always garbage. As the population increased and industries developed, the amount of various kinds of garbage increased and the types of garbage also diversified. In addition, toxic industrial waste is also accumulating in the ecosystem. Before it's too late, we need to think of garbage as a resource and manage it. In addition, we must prepare for the future of the earth in various ways, such as reducing or reusing waste. Otherwise, our planet will be littered with overflowing garbage.
g_text_translate.id:
Dimanapun orang tinggal, selalu ada sampah. Seiring bertambahnya jumlah penduduk dan berkembangnya industri, jumlah berbagai jenis sampah semakin meningkat dan jenis sampah pun semakin beragam. Selain itu, limbah industri beracun juga menumpuk di ekosistem. Sebelum terlambat, kita perlu menganggap sampah sebagai sumber daya dan mengelolanya. Selain itu, kita harus mempersiapkan masa depan bumi dengan berbagai cara, seperti mengurangi atau menggunakan kembali sampah. Jika tidak, planet kita akan dipenuhi sampah yang melimpah.

#######

Wherever people live, there is always garbage. As the population increased and industries developed, the amount of various kinds of garbage increased and the types of garbage also diversified. In addition, toxic industrial waste is also accumulating in the ecosystem. Before it's too late, we need to think of garbage as a resource and manage it. In addition, we must prepare for the future of the earth in various ways, such as reducing or reusing waste. Otherwise, our planet will be littered with overflowing garbage.
g_text_translate.ja:
人が住んでいるところには必ずゴミがあります。人口の増加や産業の発展に伴い、さまざまなゴミの量が増加し、ゴミの種類も多様化しました。さらに、有害な産業廃棄物も生態系に蓄積されています。手遅れになる前に、私たちはゴミを資源として考え、管理する必要があります。また、廃棄物の削減や再利用など、さまざまな面で地球の将来に備える必要があります。そうしないと、私たちの地球はゴミであふれてしまいます。

#######

Wherever people live, there is always garbage. As the population increased and industries developed, the amount of various kinds of garbage increased and the types of garbage also diversified. In addition, toxic industrial waste is also accumulating in the ecosystem. Before it's too late, we need to think of garbage as a resource and manage it. In addition, we must prepare for the future of the earth in various ways, such as reducing or reusing waste. Otherwise, our planet will be littered with overflowing garbage.
g_text_translate.de:
Wo Menschen leben, gibt es immer Müll. Mit dem Bevölkerungswachstum und der Entwicklung der Industrie nahm die Menge der verschiedenen Müllarten zu und auch die Müllarten diversifizierten sich. Darüber hinaus sammeln sich auch giftige Industrieabfälle im Ökosystem an. Bevor es zu spät ist, müssen wir Müll als Ressource betrachten und damit umgehen. Darüber hinaus müssen wir uns auf verschiedene Weise auf die Zukunft der Erde vorbereiten, beispielsweise durch die Reduzierung oder Wiederverwendung von Abfällen. Andernfalls wird unser Planet mit überfließendem Müll übersät sein.

#######

Wherever people live, there is always garbage. As the population increased and industries developed, the amount of various kinds of garbage increased and the types of garbage also diversified. g_text_translate.zh-CN:
凡是有人居住的地方，总会有垃圾。随着人口的增加和工业的发展，各种垃圾的数量增加，垃圾的种类也多样化。此外，有毒工业废物也在生态系统中积累。在为时已晚之前，我们需要将垃圾视为一种资源并对其进行管理。此外，我们必须以各种方式为地球的未来做好准备，例如减少或再利用废物。否则，我们的星球将布满垃圾。

g_text_translate.pt:
Onde quer que as pessoas vivam, sempre há lixo. Além disso, resíduos industriais tóxicos também se acumulam no ecossistema. Antes que seja tarde demais, precisamos pensar no lixo como um recurso e gerenciá-lo. Além disso, devemos preparar-nos para o futuro da Terra de várias maneiras, tais como a redução ou a reutilização de resíduos. Caso contrário, nosso planeta ficará repleto de lixo transbordante.

लोग जहां भी रहते हैं वहां कूड़ा-कचरा तो रहता ही है। जैसे-जैसे जनसंख्या बढ़ी और उद्योगों का विकास हुआ, विभिन्न प्रकार के कचरे की मात्रा में वृद्धि हुई और कचरे के प्रकार में भी विविधता आई। इसके अलावा, जहरीला औद्योगिक कचरा भी पारिस्थितिकी तंत्र में जमा हो रहा है। इससे पहले कि बहुत देर हो जाए, हमें कचरे को एक संसाधन के रूप में सोचना होगा और उसका प्रबंधन करना होगा। इसके अलावा, हमें विभिन्न तरीकों से पृथ्वी के भविष्य के लिए तैयारी करनी चाहिए, जैसे कचरे को कम करना या पुन: उपयोग करना। अन्यथा, हमारा ग्रह अत्यधिक कूड़े-कचरे से अटा पड़ा रहेगा।

1. Lượng rác thải khác nhau tùy theo nơi con người sinh sống.
2. Để bảo vệ hệ sinh thái, việc quản lý thích hợp rác thải là cấp bách.
3. Đã tìm ra cách giảm lượng rác thải.
4. Ô nhiễm không khí ngày càng nghiêm trọng do chất thải công nghiệp độc hại.
--------------------
Phải coi rác là tài nguyên và quản lý trước khi quá muộn, tức là việc quản lý thích hợp rác thải là cấp bách để bảo vệ hệ sinh thái. 2 là đáp án đúng.
explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. The amount of garbage varies depending on where people live.
2. Proper management of waste is urgently needed to protect the ecosystem.
3. People found a way to reduce waste.
4. Air pollution is getting worse due to toxic industrial waste.
--------------------
We need to think of garbage as a resource and manage it before it's too late, i.e. proper waste management is urgently needed to protect the ecosystem. 2 is the correct answer.
explain.it:
Scegli quello che corrisponde al contenuto del paragrafo.
1. La quantità di rifiuti varia a seconda di dove vivono le persone.
2. È urgentemente necessaria una corretta gestione dei rifiuti per proteggere l’ecosistema.
3. Le persone hanno trovato un modo per ridurre gli sprechi.
4. L’inquinamento atmosferico sta peggiorando a causa dei rifiuti industriali tossici.
--------------------
Dobbiamo pensare ai rifiuti come a una risorsa e gestirli prima che sia troppo tardi, ovvero sia urgentemente necessaria una corretta gestione dei rifiuti per proteggere l'ecosistema. 2 è la risposta corretta.

Choose the one that matches the content of the paragraph.
1. The amount of garbage varies depending on where people live.
2. Proper management of waste is urgently needed to protect the ecosystem.
3. People found a way to reduce waste.
4. Air pollution is getting worse due to toxic industrial waste.
--------------------
We need to think of garbage as a resource and manage it before it's too late, i.e. proper waste management is urgently needed to protect the ecosystem. 2 is the correct answer.
explain.ja:
段落の内容と一致するものを選択してください。
1. ゴミの量は住んでいる場所によって異なります。
2. 生態系を保護するには、廃棄物の適切な管理が緊急に必要です。
3. 人々は廃棄物を減らす方法を見つけました。
4. 有害産業廃棄物により大気汚染が悪化しています。
--------------------
私たちはゴミを資源として考え、手遅れになる前に管理する必要があります。つまり、生態系を保護するために適切な廃棄物管理が緊急に必要です。 2が正解です。

general.g_text: 물건을 사용한 후, 쓰레기를 종류별로 분리해서 배출해야 한다. 쓰레기는 크게 종이, 캔, 플라스틱, 스티로폼, 폐형광등이나 폐건전지, 유리병 등으로 분류할 수 있다. 먼저 신문지, 우유팩 등의 종이는 반드시 묶어서 배출해야 한다. 그리고 스티로폼은 투명 비닐봉지에 넣거나 묶어서 배출한다. (        ) 버릴 때는 스티로폼에 부착된 스티커나 이물질을 반드시 제거해야 한다. 그 밖에 캔이나 플라스틱, 유리병은 투명 비닐봉지에 넣어서 배출한다. 또한 폐형광등과 폐건전지는 전용 수거함에 버려야 한다.

g_text_translate.vi: Sau khi sử dụng đồ vật, rác phải được phân loại theo chủng loại và vứt bỏ. Rác thải có thể được phân loại thành giấy, lon, nhựa, xốp, đèn huỳnh quang phế thải hay pin phế thải và chai thủy tinh. Đầu tiên, giấy như giấy báo, túi sữa… phải được buộc lại và vứt bỏ. Và xốp được cho vào túi nhựa trong suốt hoặc buộc lại và vứt bỏ. (        ) khi vứt, phải loại bỏ nhãn dán hoặc vật lạ gắn trên xốp. Ngoài ra, lon, nhựa và chai thủy tinh được bỏ vào túi nhựa trong suốt và vứt bỏ. Ngoài ra, đèn huỳnh quang phế thải hay pin phế thải phải được vứt vào thùng thu gom chuyên dụng.
g_text_translate.en: After using the objects, the garbage must be separated by type and disposed of. Garbage can be largely classified into paper, cans, plastics, Styrofoam, waste fluorescent lamps, waste batteries, and glass bottles. First, paper such as newspapers and milk cartons must be bundled and discharged. And Styrofoam is put in a transparent plastic bag or tied up and discharged. Also, when discarding, be sure to remove any stickers or foreign substances attached to the Styrofoam. In addition, cans, plastic, and glass bottles must be disposed of in a transparent plastic bag. In addition, waste fluorescent lamps and waste batteries must be disposed of in a dedicated collection box.
g_text_translate.it:
Dopo aver utilizzato gli oggetti, i rifiuti devono essere separati per tipologia e smaltiti. I rifiuti possono essere in gran parte classificati in carta, lattine, plastica, polistirolo, lampade fluorescenti usate, batterie usate e bottiglie di vetro. Innanzitutto, la carta, come i giornali e i cartoni del latte, deve essere raggruppata e scaricata. E il polistirolo viene messo in un sacchetto di plastica trasparente o legato e scaricato. Inoltre, quando lo scarti, assicurati di rimuovere eventuali adesivi o sostanze estranee attaccate al polistirolo. Inoltre, le lattine, le bottiglie di plastica e di vetro devono essere smaltite in un sacchetto di plastica trasparente. Inoltre, le lampade fluorescenti usate e le batterie usate devono essere smaltite in un contenitore di raccolta dedicato.

#######

After using the objects, the garbage must be separated by type and disposed of. Garbage can be largely classified into paper, cans, plastics, Styrofoam, waste fluorescent lamps, waste batteries, and glass bottles. First, paper such as newspapers and milk cartons must be bundled and discharged. And Styrofoam is put in a transparent plastic bag or tied up and discharged. Also, when discarding, be sure to remove any stickers or foreign substances attached to the Styrofoam. In addition, cans, plastic, and glass bottles must be disposed of in a transparent plastic bag. In addition, waste fluorescent lamps and waste batteries must be disposed of in a dedicated collection box.
g_text_translate.fr:
Après avoir utilisé les objets, les déchets doivent être triés par type et éliminés. Les déchets peuvent être largement classés en papier, canettes, plastiques, polystyrène, lampes fluorescentes usagées, piles usagées et bouteilles en verre. Premièrement, le papier tel que les journaux et les briques de lait doit être regroupé et évacué. Et la mousse de polystyrène est mise dans un sac en plastique transparent ou attachée et déchargée. De plus, lors de la mise au rebut, assurez-vous de retirer tous les autocollants ou substances étrangères attachés à la mousse de polystyrène. De plus, les canettes, bouteilles en plastique et en verre doivent être jetées dans un sac en plastique transparent. De plus, les lampes fluorescentes usagées et les piles usagées doivent être jetées dans une boîte de collecte dédiée.

#######

After using the objects, the garbage must be separated by type and disposed of. Garbage can be largely classified into paper, cans, plastics, Styrofoam, waste fluorescent lamps, waste batteries, and glass bottles. First, paper such as newspapers and milk cartons must be bundled and discharged. And Styrofoam is put in a transparent plastic bag or tied up and discharged. Also, when discarding, be sure to remove any stickers or foreign substances attached to the Styrofoam. In addition, cans, plastic, and glass bottles must be disposed of in a transparent plastic bag. In addition, waste fluorescent lamps and waste batteries must be disposed of in a dedicated collection box.
g_text_translate.es:
Después de utilizar los objetos, la basura debe separarse por tipos y eliminarse. La basura se puede clasificar en gran medida en papel, latas, plásticos, poliestireno, lámparas fluorescentes usadas, pilas usadas y botellas de vidrio. En primer lugar, se deben agrupar y descargar papeles como periódicos y cartones de leche. Y la espuma de poliestireno se mete en una bolsa de plástico transparente o se amarra y se descarga. Además, al desecharlo, asegúrese de quitar las pegatinas o sustancias extrañas adheridas a la espuma de poliestireno. Además, las latas, botellas de plástico y vidrio deben desecharse en una bolsa de plástico transparente. Además, las lámparas fluorescentes y las pilas usadas deben eliminarse en un contenedor de recogida específico.

#######

After using the objects, the garbage must be separated by type and disposed of. Garbage can be largely classified into paper, cans, plastics, Styrofoam, waste fluorescent lamps, waste batteries, and glass bottles. g_text_translate.id:
Setelah benda tersebut digunakan, sampah harus dipisahkan berdasarkan jenisnya dan dibuang. Sampah sebagian besar dapat diklasifikasikan menjadi kertas, kaleng, plastik, styrofoam, limbah lampu neon, limbah baterai, dan botol kaca. Pertama, kertas seperti koran dan karton susu harus dibundel dan dibuang. Dan styrofoam dimasukkan ke dalam kantong plastik transparan atau diikat dan dibuang. Selain itu, saat membuang, pastikan untuk menghilangkan stiker atau benda asing yang menempel pada Styrofoam. Selain itu, kaleng, plastik, dan botol kaca harus dibuang ke dalam kantong plastik transparan. Selain itu, limbah lampu neon dan limbah baterai harus dibuang ke kotak pengumpulan khusus.

g_text_translate.ja:
使用後はゴミを種類ごとに分別して処分してください。ごみは大きく分けて、紙、缶、プラスチック、発泡スチロール、廃蛍光灯、廃電池、ガラスびんなどがあります。まず、新聞紙や牛乳パックなどの紙類を束ねて排出する必要があります。そして発泡スチロールは透明ビニール袋に入れるか縛って排出します。また、廃棄する際は発泡スチロールに付着したシールや異物を必ず取り除いてください。また、缶、ペットボトル、ガラス瓶は透明なビニール袋に入れて出してください。また、廃蛍光灯、廃電池は専用の回収ボックスに捨ててください。

#######

g_text_translate.de:
Nach der Nutzung der Gegenstände muss der Müll sortenrein getrennt und entsorgt werden. Müll lässt sich größtenteils in Papier, Dosen, Kunststoffe, Styropor, Altleuchtstofflampen, Altbatterien und Glasflaschen einteilen. Zunächst muss Papier wie Zeitungen und Milchkartons gebündelt und ausgeschleust werden. Und Styropor wird in eine durchsichtige Plastiktüte gesteckt oder zusammengebunden und entladen. Achten Sie beim Entsorgen außerdem darauf, alle am Styropor haftenden Aufkleber oder Fremdkörper zu entfernen. Darüber hinaus müssen Dosen, Plastik- und Glasflaschen in einer durchsichtigen Plastiktüte entsorgt werden. Darüber hinaus müssen verbrauchte Leuchtstofflampen und Altbatterien in einer speziellen Sammelbox entsorgt werden.

#######

After using the objects, the garbage must be separated by type and disposed of. g_text_translate.zh-CN:
使用后的垃圾必须按类型分类并处理。垃圾主要分为纸张、罐头、塑料、泡沫塑料、废荧光灯、废电池和玻璃瓶。首先，报纸、牛奶盒等纸张必须被捆扎并排出。将泡沫塑料放入透明塑料袋中或捆扎起来排出。另外，丢弃时，请务必除去聚苯乙烯泡沫塑料上附着的任何贴纸或异物。此外，罐头、塑料瓶和玻璃瓶必须放入透明塑料袋中处理。此外，废弃荧光灯和废电池必须放入专用收集箱内处理。

#######

After using the objects, the garbage must be separated by type and disposed of. Garbage can be largely classified into paper, cans, plastics, Styrofoam, waste fluorescent lamps, waste batteries, and glass bottles. First, paper such as newspapers and milk cartons must be bundled and discharged. And Styrofoam is put in a transparent plastic bag or tied up and discharged. Also, when discarding, be sure to remove any stickers or foreign substances attached to the Styrofoam. In addition, cans, plastic, and glass bottles must be disposed of in a transparent plastic bag. g_text_translate.zh-TW:
使用後的垃圾必須按類型分類並處理。垃圾主要分為紙張、罐頭、塑料、泡沫塑料、廢熒光燈、廢電池和玻璃瓶。首先，報紙、牛奶盒等紙張必須被捆紮並排出。將泡沫塑料放入透明塑料袋中或捆紮起來排出。另外，丟棄時，請務必除去聚苯乙烯泡沫塑料上附著的任何貼紙或異物。此外，罐頭、塑料瓶和玻璃瓶必須放入透明塑料袋中處理。此外，廢棄熒光燈和廢電池必須放入專用收集箱內處理。

#######

After using the objects, the garbage must be separated by type and disposed of. Garbage can be largely classified into paper, cans, plastics, Styrofoam, waste fluorescent lamps, waste batteries, and glass bottles. g_text_translate.ru:
После использования объектов мусор необходимо разделить по типам и утилизировать. Мусор можно разделить на бумагу, банки, пластик, пенопласт, отработанные люминесцентные лампы, отработанные батарейки и стеклянные бутылки. Во-первых, бумагу, такую ​​как газеты и пакеты из-под молока, необходимо связать и выгрузить. А пенопласт кладут в прозрачный полиэтиленовый пакет или завязывают и выгружают. Кроме того, при выбрасывании обязательно удалите с пенопласта все наклейки и посторонние вещества. Кроме того, консервные банки, пластиковые и стеклянные бутылки необходимо утилизировать в прозрачный полиэтиленовый пакет. Кроме того, отработанные люминесцентные лампы и использованные батарейки необходимо выбрасывать в специальный контейнер для сбора.

g_text_translate.pt:
Após a utilização dos objetos, o lixo deve ser separado por tipo e descartado. O lixo pode ser amplamente classificado em papel, latas, plásticos, isopor, resíduos de lâmpadas fluorescentes, resíduos de baterias e garrafas de vidro. Primeiro, papéis como jornais e caixas de leite devem ser empacotados e descarregados. E o isopor é colocado em um saco plástico transparente ou amarrado e descartado. Além disso, ao descartar, certifique-se de remover quaisquer adesivos ou substâncias estranhas coladas no isopor. Além disso, latas, garrafas plásticas e de vidro devem ser descartadas em saco plástico transparente. Além disso, os resíduos de lâmpadas fluorescentes e baterias usadas devem ser descartados em uma caixa de coleta dedicada.

#######

After using the objects, the garbage must be separated by type and disposed of. g_text_translate.hi:
वस्तुओं का उपयोग करने के बाद, कचरे को प्रकार के आधार पर अलग किया जाना चाहिए और उसका निपटान किया जाना चाहिए। कचरे को बड़े पैमाने पर कागज, डिब्बे, प्लास्टिक, स्टायरोफोम, बेकार फ्लोरोसेंट लैंप, बेकार बैटरी और कांच की बोतलों में वर्गीकृत किया जा सकता है। सबसे पहले, समाचार पत्र और दूध के डिब्बों जैसे कागज को बंडल करके डिस्चार्ज किया जाना चाहिए। और स्टायरोफोम को एक पारदर्शी प्लास्टिक बैग में डाल दिया जाता है या बांध दिया जाता है और डिस्चार्ज कर दिया जाता है। इसके अलावा, त्यागते समय, स्टायरोफोम से जुड़े किसी भी स्टिकर या विदेशी पदार्थ को हटाना सुनिश्चित करें। इसके अलावा, डिब्बे, प्लास्टिक और कांच की बोतलों का निपटान एक पारदर्शी प्लास्टिक बैग में किया जाना चाहिए। इसके अलावा, बेकार फ्लोरोसेंट लैंप और बेकार बैटरियों का निपटान एक समर्पित संग्रह बॉक्स में किया जाना चाहिए।

g_text_translate.tr:
Nesneler kullanıldıktan sonra çöplerin türlerine göre ayrılarak bertaraf edilmesi gerekmektedir. Çöpler büyük ölçüde kağıt, teneke kutu, plastik, strafor, atık floresan lambalar, atık piller ve cam şişeler şeklinde sınıflandırılabilir. Öncelikle gazete, süt kutusu gibi kağıtların paketlenip boşaltılması gerekiyor. Strafor ise şeffaf plastik bir torbaya konur veya bağlanarak boşaltılır. Ayrıca, atarken Straforun üzerinde bulunan çıkartmaları veya yabancı maddeleri çıkardığınızdan emin olun. Ayrıca teneke kutular, plastik ve cam şişeler şeffaf bir plastik torbaya atılmalıdır. Ayrıca atık floresan lambalar ve atık piller özel bir toplama kutusuna atılmalıdır.

2. 附着在聚苯乙烯泡沫塑料上的贴纸或异物可以直接丢弃。
3、报纸必须捆扎排放。
4. 玻璃瓶应按原样扔掉，以保护环境。
--------------------
报纸、牛奶盒等纸张必须捆扎并排放。 3 是正确答案。

#######

3. Newspaper must be bundled and discharged.
4. Glass bottles should be thrown away in their original form to help the environment.
--------------------
Paper such as newspapers and milk cartons must be bundled and discharged. 3 is the correct answer.

general.g_text: 폐기물로 분류되어 소각처리 되었던 폐현수막이 생활용품으로 사용되고 있다. 일례로 한 자치구 자원봉사센터에서는 폐현수막으로 '힐링 장바구니'를 만들어 주부들에게 나누어 주었다. 이 장바구니는 비록 폐현수막으로 만들어졌지만 누구도 그것이 현수막으로 만든 가방이란 것을 몰랐다. 오히려 장바구니가 너무나 예뻐서 주부들이 아주 좋아했다고 한다. 폐현수막은 쏟아져 나오고 올해와 같이 선거가 있을 때는 더욱 늘어난다. (        ) 쓸모없이 버려지는 폐현수막을 그냥 소각 처리한다면 소각 처리 비용도 발생하고 환경도 오염된다. 따라서 폐현수막의 재활용은 소각 비용을 절감하고 환경도 보호하는 좋은 본보기가 될 것이다.

g_text_translate.vi: Băng rôn phế thải, thứ từng được phân loại là rác thải và xử lý bằng cách đốt, đang được sử dụng làm đồ dùng sinh hoạt. Lấy ví dụ, một trung tâm tình nguyện ở một quận tự trị nọ đã làm ra 'giỏ đi chợ chữa lành' từ các băng rôn phế thải và phân phát cho các bà nội trợ. Mặc dù giỏ đi chợ này được làm từ băng rôn phế thải, nhưng không ai biết rằng đó là một chiếc giỏ làm bằng băng rôn cả. Trái lại, chiếc giỏ đi chợ rất đẹp nên các bà nội trợ nói rằng rất thích. Các băng rôn phế thải đang tràn lan và càng nhiều hơn khi có cuộc bầu cử như năm nay. (        ) xử lý bằng cách cứ thế đốt các băng rôn phế thải vô dụng bị vứt bỏ thì chi phí đốt sẽ cao và gây ô nhiễm môi trường. Vì vậy, việc tái chế các băng rôn rác thải sẽ là một ví dụ điển hình trong việc giảm chi phí đốt rác và bảo vệ môi trường.
g_text_translate.en: Waste banners that were classified as waste and incinerated are used as household items. For example, a volunteer center in an autonomous district made 'healing shopping bags' out of waste banners and distributed them to housewives. Although these shopping bags were made of discarded banners, no one knew that they were bags made of banners. Rather, it is said that housewives really liked the bag because it was so pretty. Waste banners are pouring out, and when there is an election like this year, it increases even more. If waste banners that are discarded useless are simply incinerated, incineration costs are incurred and the environment is polluted. Therefore, recycling waste banners will be a good example to reduce incineration costs and protect the environment.
g_text_translate.it:
Gli striscioni dei rifiuti classificati come rifiuti e inceneriti vengono utilizzati come articoli domestici. Ad esempio, un centro di volontariato in un distretto autonomo ha realizzato delle "borse della spesa curative" con striscioni dei rifiuti e le ha distribuite alle casalinghe. Sebbene queste borse della spesa fossero fatte di striscioni scartati, nessuno sapeva che fossero borse fatte di striscioni. Piuttosto, si dice che alle casalinghe la borsa piacesse molto perché era così carina. Gli striscioni dei rifiuti si riversano a fiumi, e quando ci sono elezioni come quest'anno, aumentano ancora di più. Se gli striscioni dei rifiuti abbandonati inutilizzabili vengono semplicemente inceneriti, si sostengono i costi dell'incenerimento e l'ambiente viene inquinato. Pertanto, gli striscioni per il riciclaggio dei rifiuti saranno un buon esempio per ridurre i costi di incenerimento e proteggere l’ambiente.

#######

Waste banners that were classified as waste and incinerated are used as household items. For example, a volunteer center in an autonomous district made 'healing shopping bags' out of waste banners and distributed them to housewives. Although these shopping bags were made of discarded banners, no one knew that they were bags made of banners. Rather, it is said that housewives really liked the bag because it was so pretty. Waste banners are pouring out, and when there is an election like this year, it increases even more. If waste banners that are discarded useless are simply incinerated, incineration costs are incurred and the environment is polluted. Therefore, recycling waste banners will be a good example to reduce incineration costs and protect the environment.
g_text_translate.fr:
Les banderoles de déchets classées comme déchets et incinérées sont utilisées comme articles ménagers. Par exemple, un centre de bénévoles dans un district autonome a fabriqué des « sacs de guérison » à partir de banderoles déchet et les a distribués aux femmes au foyer. Même si ces sacs à provisions étaient constitués de banderoles abandonnées, personne ne savait qu’il s’agissait de sacs fabriqués à partir de banderoles. On dit plutôt que les femmes au foyer aimaient beaucoup ce sac parce qu’il était si joli. Les banderoles déchet pleuvent, et quand il y a des élections comme cette année, cela augmente encore plus. Si les bannières inutiles sont simplement incinérées, cela entraîne des coûts d'incinération et pollue l'environnement. Par conséquent, les banderoles de recyclage des déchets seront un bon exemple pour réduire les coûts d’incinération et protéger l’environnement.

#######

For example, a volunteer center in an autonomous district made 'healing shopping bags' out of waste banners and distributed them to housewives. Although these shopping bags were made of discarded banners, no one knew that they were bags made of banners. Rather, it is said that housewives really liked the bag because it was so pretty. Waste banners are pouring out, and when there is an election like this year, it increases even more. If waste banners that are discarded useless are simply incinerated, incineration costs are incurred and the environment is polluted. Therefore, recycling waste banners will be a good example to reduce incineration costs and protect the environment.
g_text_translate.es:
Las pancartas de residuos que fueron clasificados como residuos e incinerados se utilizan como artículos para el hogar. Por ejemplo, un centro de voluntariado de un distrito autónomo fabricó "bolsas de compras curativas" con carteles de residuos y las distribuyó entre las amas de casa. Aunque estas bolsas de compras estaban hechas de pancartas desechadas, nadie sabía que eran bolsas hechas de pancartas. Más bien se dice que a las amas de casa les gustó mucho el bolso porque era muy bonito. Se están derramando pancartas sobre desperdicio, y cuando hay elecciones como las de este año, aumenta aún más. Si simplemente se incineran los carteles de residuos que se desechan sin valor alguno, se generan costes de incineración y se contamina el medio ambiente. Por tanto, las pancartas de reciclaje de residuos serán un buen ejemplo para reducir los costes de incineración y proteger el medio ambiente.

#######

Waste banners that were classified as waste and incinerated are used as household items. Although these shopping bags were made of discarded banners, no one knew that they were bags made of banners. Rather, it is said that housewives really liked the bag because it was so pretty. Waste banners are pouring out, and when there is an election like this year, it increases even more. If waste banners that are discarded useless are simply incinerated, incineration costs are incurred and the environment is polluted. Therefore, recycling waste banners will be a good example to reduce incineration costs and protect the environment.
g_text_translate.id:
Spanduk sampah yang tergolong sampah dan dibakar digunakan sebagai barang rumah tangga. Misalnya, sebuah pusat relawan di daerah otonom membuat 'tas belanja penyembuhan' dari spanduk sampah dan membagikannya kepada ibu-ibu rumah tangga. Meski tas belanjaan ini terbuat dari spanduk bekas, namun tidak ada yang mengetahui bahwa tas belanja tersebut terbuat dari spanduk. Malah konon para ibu rumah tangga sangat menyukai tas tersebut karena cantik sekali. Spanduk-spanduk sampah bertebaran, dan ketika ada pemilu seperti tahun ini, jumlahnya semakin meningkat. Jika sampah spanduk yang dibuang sia-sia dibakar begitu saja, timbul biaya pembakaran dan pencemaran lingkungan. Oleh karena itu, spanduk daur ulang sampah akan menjadi contoh yang baik untuk mengurangi biaya pembakaran dan melindungi lingkungan.

g_text_translate.ja:
廃棄物として分別され焼却されたバナーは家庭用品として活用されます。たとえば、ある自治区のボランティアセンターは、廃棄物の横断幕から「癒しのショッピングバッグ」を作り、主婦に配布した。このレジ袋は廃棄されたのぼりを利用して作られたものですが、それがのぼり旗で作られた袋であることは誰も知りませんでした。むしろ、バッグがとてもきれいだったので、主婦たちにとても気に入ったそうです。ゴミの横断幕があふれ出ており、今年のように選挙があるとさらに増える。無駄に捨てられた廃バナーをそのまま焼却すると、焼却費用が発生し、環境も汚染されてしまいます。したがって、廃棄物のバナーをリサイクルすることは、焼却コストを削減し、環境を保護するための良い例となります。

g_text_translate.de:
Als Haushaltsgegenstände werden Abfallbanner verwendet, die als Abfall eingestuft und verbrannt wurden. Beispielsweise stellte ein Freiwilligenzentrum in einem autonomen Bezirk „heilende Einkaufstüten“ aus Abfallbannern her und verteilte sie an Hausfrauen. Obwohl diese Einkaufstaschen aus weggeworfenen Bannern bestanden, wusste niemand, dass es sich um Taschen aus Bannern handelte. Man sagt vielmehr, dass die Tasche den Hausfrauen sehr gut gefiel, weil sie so hübsch war. Es strömen Abfallbanner heraus, und wenn es eine Wahl wie dieses Jahr gibt, nimmt die Menge noch mehr zu. Werden nutzlos weggeworfene Abfallbanner einfach verbrannt, entstehen Verbrennungskosten und die Umwelt wird belastet. Daher sind Recycling-Müllbanner ein gutes Beispiel für die Reduzierung der Verbrennungskosten und den Schutz der Umwelt.

#######

Waste banners that were classified as waste and incinerated are used as household items. For example, a volunteer center in an autonomous district made 'healing shopping bags' out of waste banners and distributed them to housewives. Although these shopping bags were made of discarded banners, no one knew that they were bags made of banners. Rather, it is said that housewives really liked the bag because it was so pretty. Waste banners are pouring out, and when there is an election like this year, it increases even more. If waste banners that are discarded useless are simply incinerated, incineration costs are incurred and the environment is polluted. Therefore, recycling waste banners will be a good example to reduce incineration costs and protect the environment.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
被分类为废物并焚烧的废物横幅被用作家庭用品。例如，某自治区志愿者中心用废旧横幅制作“治愈购物袋”，分发给家庭主妇。虽然这些购物袋是用废弃的横幅制作的，但没有人知道它们是横幅制作的袋子。相反，据说家庭主妇非常喜欢这个包，因为它非常漂亮。垃圾横幅倾泻而出，当像今年这样的选举时，它会增加更多。废弃无用的废横幅如果简单焚烧，不仅会产生焚烧成本，还会污染环境。因此，回收废弃横幅将成为降低焚烧成本、保护环境的一个很好的例子。

g_text_translate.ru:
Баннеры с отходами, которые были классифицированы как отходы и сожжены, используются как предметы домашнего обихода. Например, волонтёрский центр в автономном округе изготовил из баннеров для мусора «лечебные сумки» и раздал их домохозяйкам. Хотя эти сумки для покупок были сделаны из выброшенных баннеров, никто не знал, что это сумки из баннеров. Говорят, что сумка очень нравилась хозяйкам, потому что она была очень красивой. Баннеры с мусором льются наружу, а когда проходят такие выборы, как в этом году, их количество увеличивается еще больше. Если баннеры с мусором, которые выбрасываются бесполезными, просто сжигаются, возникают затраты на сжигание и загрязняется окружающая среда. Таким образом, баннеры с переработкой отходов станут хорошим примером снижения затрат на сжигание и защиты окружающей среды.

#######

Waste banners that were classified as waste and incinerated are used as household items. For example, a volunteer center in an autonomous district made 'healing shopping bags' out of waste banners and distributed them to housewives. Although these shopping bags were made of discarded banners, no one knew that they were bags made of banners. Rather, it is said that housewives really liked the bag because it was so pretty. Waste banners are pouring out, and when there is an election like this year, it increases even more. If waste banners that are discarded useless are simply incinerated, incineration costs are incurred and the environment is polluted. Therefore, recycling waste banners will be a good example to reduce incineration costs and protect the environment.
g_text_translate.th:
ป้ายขยะที่จัดเป็นขยะและเผาจะถูกใช้เป็นของใช้ในครัวเรือน ตัวอย่างเช่น ศูนย์อาสาสมัครในเขตปกครองตนเองแห่งหนึ่งได้จัดทำ 'ถุงช้อปปิ้งเพื่อการรักษา' จากป้ายขยะและแจกจ่ายให้กับแม่บ้าน แม้ว่าถุงช้อปปิ้งเหล่านี้จะทำมาจากแบนเนอร์ที่ถูกทิ้งร้าง แต่ก็ไม่มีใครรู้ว่ามันเป็นถุงที่ทำจากแบนเนอร์ แต่ว่ากันว่าแม่บ้านชอบกระเป๋าใบนี้มากเพราะมันสวยมาก ป้ายขยะไหลออกมาและเมื่อมีการเลือกตั้งแบบนี้ปีนี้ก็ยิ่งเพิ่มมากขึ้น หากแบนเนอร์ขยะที่ถูกทิ้งโดยไร้ประโยชน์ถูกเผาเพียงอย่างเดียว ค่าใช้จ่ายในการเผาก็จะเกิดขึ้น และสิ่งแวดล้อมก็จะกลายเป็นมลพิษ ดังนั้นการรีไซเคิลป้ายขยะจึงเป็นตัวอย่างที่ดีในการลดต้นทุนการเผาและปกป้องสิ่งแวดล้อม

g_text_translate.pt:
Banners de resíduos classificados como resíduos e incinerados são utilizados como utensílios domésticos. Por exemplo, um centro de voluntariado num distrito autónomo fez “sacos de compras curativos” a partir de faixas de lixo e distribuiu-os às donas de casa. Embora essas sacolas de compras fossem feitas de faixas descartadas, ninguém sabia que eram sacolas feitas de faixas. Em vez disso, diz-se que as donas de casa gostaram muito da bolsa porque era muito bonita. Estão sendo espalhadas faixas de lixo, e quando há uma eleição como esta este ano, aumenta ainda mais. Se os banners de resíduos descartados inutilmente forem simplesmente incinerados, incorrerão em custos de incineração e o meio ambiente será poluído. Portanto, as bandeiras de reciclagem de resíduos serão um bom exemplo para reduzir os custos de incineração e proteger o meio ambiente.

#######

g_text_translate.hi:
अपशिष्ट बैनर जिन्हें अपशिष्ट के रूप में वर्गीकृत किया गया था और जला दिया गया था, घरेलू वस्तुओं के रूप में उपयोग किए जाते हैं। उदाहरण के लिए, एक स्वायत्त जिले के एक स्वयंसेवी केंद्र ने बेकार बैनरों से 'हीलिंग शॉपिंग बैग' बनाए और उन्हें गृहिणियों को वितरित किया। हालाँकि ये शॉपिंग बैग फेंके गए बैनरों से बने थे, लेकिन किसी को नहीं पता था कि ये बैनरों से बने बैग थे। बल्कि ऐसा कहा जाता है कि गृहिणियों को यह बैग बहुत पसंद आया क्योंकि यह बहुत सुंदर था। फालतू के बैनर बाहर आ रहे हैं और जब इस साल जैसा चुनाव हो तो ये और भी बढ़ जाता है. यदि बेकार फेंके गए बेकार बैनरों को यूं ही जला दिया जाए, तो जलाने की लागत आती है और पर्यावरण प्रदूषित होता है। इसलिए, अपशिष्ट बैनरों का पुनर्चक्रण भस्मीकरण लागत को कम करने और पर्यावरण की रक्षा के लिए एक अच्छा उदाहरण होगा।

g_text_translate.tr:
Atık olarak sınıflandırılan ve yakılan atık afişleri ev eşyası olarak kullanılıyor. Örneğin özerk bir bölgedeki bir gönüllü merkezi, atık pankartlarından 'şifalı alışveriş poşetleri' hazırlayıp ev hanımlarına dağıttı. Bu alışveriş torbaları atılmış pankartlardan yapılmış olsa da kimse onların pankartlardan yapılmış çantalar olduğunu bilmiyordu. Daha ziyade ev hanımlarının çantayı çok güzel olduğu için beğendiği söyleniyor. Atık pankartları yağıyor, bu seneki gibi seçim olunca daha da artıyor. Kullanışsız olarak atılan atık afişleri basitçe yakılırsa, yakma maliyeti ortaya çıkar ve çevre kirlenir. Bu nedenle atıkların geri dönüştürülmesi afişleri, yakma maliyetlerinin azaltılması ve çevrenin korunması açısından güzel bir örnek olacaktır.

general.g_text: 우리는 병을 치료하기 위해 약을 먹는다. 하지만 그 약 때문에 더 큰 병이 생긴다면 차라리 약을 먹지 않는 것이 더 낫다. 과학도 마찬가지이다. 과학이 다수를 위해 바르게 사용될 때는 인류의 문제를 해결해 주는 고마운 존재가 되겠지만, 특정 소수의 불순한 목적을 위해 사용될 때는 무서운 결과를 가져올 것이다. 과학은 (        )과 같은 존재이다.

g_text_translate.vi: Chúng ta uống thuốc để chữa bệnh. Nhưng nếu thuốc đó gây ra bệnh nặng hơn, tốt hơn là không nên dùng thuốc. Khoa học cũng như thế. Khi khoa học được sử dụng một cách đúng đắn vì đa số, nó sẽ là một sự tồn tại đáng biết ơn để giải quyết các vấn đề của nhân loại, nhưng khi nó được sử dụng cho mục đích không trong sạch của một số ít cụ thể, nó sẽ gây ra hậu quả nghiêm trọng. Khoa học là sự tồn tại giống như (        ).
g_text_translate.en: We take medicine to cure our illness. However, if the medicine causes a bigger illness, it is better not to take the medicine. So is science. When science is used correctly for the majority, it will be a grateful existence that solves the problems of mankind, but when it is used for the impure purpose of a specific few, it will bring dire results. Science is like a double-edged sword.
g_text_translate.it:
Prendiamo medicine per curare la nostra malattia. Tuttavia, se il medicinale provoca una malattia più grave, è meglio non assumerlo. Così è la scienza. Quando la scienza viene utilizzata correttamente dalla maggioranza, sarà un’esistenza riconoscente che risolve i problemi dell’umanità, ma quando viene utilizzata per lo scopo impuro di pochi specifici, porterà risultati disastrosi. La scienza è come un’arma a doppio taglio.

#######

We take medicine to cure our illness. However, if the medicine causes a bigger illness, it is better not to take the medicine. So is science. When science is used correctly for the majority, it will be a grateful existence that solves the problems of mankind, but when it is used for the impure purpose of a specific few, it will bring dire results. Science is like a double-edged sword.
g_text_translate.fr:
Nous prenons des médicaments pour guérir notre maladie. Cependant, si le médicament provoque une maladie plus grave, il est préférable de ne pas le prendre. La science aussi. Lorsque la science est utilisée correctement pour la majorité, elle constitue une existence reconnaissante qui résout les problèmes de l’humanité, mais lorsqu’elle est utilisée dans le but impur de quelques-uns en particulier, elle entraîne des résultats désastreux. La science est comme une épée à double tranchant.

#######

We take medicine to cure our illness. However, if the medicine causes a bigger illness, it is better not to take the medicine. So is science. When science is used correctly for the majority, it will be a grateful existence that solves the problems of mankind, but when it is used for the impure purpose of a specific few, it will bring dire results. Science is like a double-edged sword.
g_text_translate.es:
Tomamos medicamentos para curar nuestra enfermedad. Sin embargo, si el medicamento causa una enfermedad mayor, es mejor no tomarlo. También lo es la ciencia. Cuando la ciencia se usa correctamente para la mayoría, será una existencia agradecida que resuelve los problemas de la humanidad, pero cuando se usa para el propósito impuro de unos pocos específicos, traerá resultados nefastos. La ciencia es como un arma de doble filo.

#######

We take medicine to cure our illness. However, if the medicine causes a bigger illness, it is better not to take the medicine. So is science. When science is used correctly for the majority, it will be a grateful existence that solves the problems of mankind, but when it is used for the impure purpose of a specific few, it will bring dire results. Science is like a double-edged sword.
g_text_translate.id:
Kita meminum obat untuk menyembuhkan penyakit kita. Namun bila obatnya menyebabkan penyakit yang lebih parah, sebaiknya obat tersebut tidak diminum. Begitu juga sains. Jika ilmu pengetahuan digunakan dengan benar oleh sebagian besar orang, maka hal tersebut akan menjadi sebuah anugerah yang dapat memecahkan permasalahan umat manusia, namun jika ilmu pengetahuan digunakan untuk tujuan yang tidak murni bagi segelintir orang tertentu, maka hal tersebut akan membawa akibat yang buruk. Sains ibarat pedang bermata dua.

#######

We take medicine to cure our illness. However, if the medicine causes a bigger illness, it is better not to take the medicine. So is science. When science is used correctly for the majority, it will be a grateful existence that solves the problems of mankind, but when it is used for the impure purpose of a specific few, it will bring dire results. Science is like a double-edged sword.
g_text_translate.ja:
私たちは病気を治すために薬を飲みます。ただし、その薬がより大きな病気を引き起こす場合は、薬を服用しない方がよいでしょう。科学も同様です。科学は大多数にとって正しく使えば人類の課題を解決してくれるありがたい存在ですが、特定の少数の人たちの不純な目的のために使われると悲惨な結果をもたらします。科学は両刃の剣のようなものです。

Science is like a double-edged sword.

Das gilt auch für die Wissenschaft. Wenn die Wissenschaft für die Mehrheit richtig eingesetzt wird, wird sie eine dankbare Existenz sein, die die Probleme der Menschheit löst, aber wenn sie für die unreinen Zwecke einiger weniger eingesetzt wird, wird sie schreckliche Ergebnisse bringen. 2. Phải uống thuốc để điều trị bệnh.
3. Khi khoa học được sử dụng đúng cách, nó có thể chữa được tất cả các bệnh.
4. Nếu bạn bị bệnh vì thuốc thì thà không uống còn hơn.
--------------------
Khoa học vừa có lợi vừa có thể có hại, nói nôm na thì vừa có thể là bệnh tật vừa có thể là thuốc men đối với chúng ta. 1 là đáp án đúng.

general.g_text: 대부분의 사람들은 평일보다는 주말에 식사량이 늘어난다. 가족과의 식사나 친구와의 약속 등으로 외식을 하게 되고, 외식을 안 하더라도 평소 부족했던 영양을 섭취해 두어야 한다는 생각에 과식을 하는 경우가 많다. 그러나 지나친 것은 (        ) 평소에 부족했던 영양을 보충한다 하더라도 과식을 하면 월요일에 더욱 피로감을 느낄 수 있다. 주말에는 활동량이 줄어 과식으로 인해 쌓인 에너지를 소비할 기회가 별로 없기 때문에 월요일에 더욱 몸이 무겁게 느껴지는 것이다. 따라서 주말이라고 해서 무조건 평소보다 많이 먹는 것은 좋지 않다. 다만 조금씩이라도 영양을 좀 더 골고루 섭취하고 혹시 과식을 하게 될 경우에는 적당한 운동으로 에너지를 소비시켜 주는 것이 바람직하다.

g_text_translate.vi: Hầu như lượng thức ăn của mọi người vào cuối tuần tăng nhiều hơn so với ngày thường. Có nhiều trường hợp phải đi ra ngoài ăn vì cuộc hẹn với bạn bè hoặc bữa ăn cùng gia đình, ngoài ra, dù không có hẹn, nhưng vẫn ăn nhiều bởi suy nghĩ bổ sung dinh dưỡng mà ngày thường bị thiếu. Tuy nhiên, quá nhiều thì (        ), ngay cả khi bạn bổ sung thêm dinh dưỡng mà bình thường bạn thiếu, nếu bạn ăn quá nhiều, bạn có thể cảm thấy mệt mỏi hơn vào thứ Hai. Bạn thậm chí còn cảm thấy nặng nề vào thứ Hai vì bạn ít hoạt động hơn vào cuối tuần và ít có cơ hội sử dụng hết năng lượng bạn đã tích lũy từ việc ăn quá nhiều. Do đó, việc ăn nhiều hơn bình thường chỉ vì là ngày cuối tuần sẽ không tốt chút nào. Chỉ là, bạn nên tiêu thụ dinh dưỡng đều hơn một chút và tiêu hao năng lượng thông qua tập thể dục vừa phải trong trường hợp ăn quá nhiều.
g_text_translate.en: Most people eat more on weekends than on weekdays. You eat out for a meal with family or an appointment with friends, and even if you don't eat out, you often overeat because you think you need to take in the nutrients you normally lack. However, too much is the same as not enough, so even if you supplement the nutrients you normally lack, if you eat too much, you can feel more tired on Monday. On the weekends, the amount of activity decreases and there is not much opportunity to consume the energy accumulated due to overeating, so the body feels heavier on Mondays. Therefore, it is not good to eat more than usual just because it is a weekend. However, it is desirable to consume nutrients evenly in small amounts and to consume energy through proper exercise if you overeat.
g_text_translate.it:
La maggior parte delle persone mangia di più nei fine settimana che nei giorni feriali. Mangi fuori per un pasto con la famiglia o per un appuntamento con gli amici e, anche se non mangi fuori, spesso mangi troppo perché pensi di aver bisogno di assumere le sostanze nutritive che normalmente ti mancano. Tuttavia, troppo equivale a non abbastanza, quindi anche se integri i nutrienti che normalmente ti mancano, se mangi troppo, potresti sentirti più stanco il lunedì. Nei fine settimana la quantità di attività diminuisce e non c'è molta possibilità di consumare l'energia accumulata a causa dell'eccesso di cibo, quindi il corpo si sente più pesante il lunedì. Pertanto non è bene mangiare più del solito solo perché è un fine settimana. Tuttavia, è consigliabile consumare i nutrienti in modo uniforme in piccole quantità e consumare energia attraverso un corretto esercizio fisico se si mangia troppo.

#######

Most people eat more on weekends than on weekdays. You eat out for a meal with family or an appointment with friends, and even if you don't eat out, you often overeat because you think you need to take in the nutrients you normally lack. However, too much is the same as not enough, so even if you supplement the nutrients you normally lack, if you eat too much, you can feel more tired on Monday. On the weekends, the amount of activity decreases and there is not much opportunity to consume the energy accumulated due to overeating, so the body feels heavier on Mondays. Therefore, it is not good to eat more than usual just because it is a weekend. However, it is desirable to consume nutrients evenly in small amounts and to consume energy through proper exercise if you overeat.
g_text_translate.fr:
La plupart des gens mangent davantage le week-end que pendant la semaine. Vous mangez au restaurant pour un repas en famille ou un rendez-vous avec des amis, et même si vous ne mangez pas au restaurant, vous mangez souvent trop parce que vous pensez avoir besoin d'absorber les nutriments qui vous manquent normalement. Cependant, trop équivaut à pas assez, donc même si vous complétez les nutriments qui vous manquent normalement, si vous mangez trop, vous pouvez vous sentir plus fatigué le lundi. Le week-end, la quantité d'activité diminue et il n'y a pas beaucoup de possibilité de consommer l'énergie accumulée en raison de la suralimentation, de sorte que le corps se sent plus lourd le lundi. Il n’est donc pas bon de manger plus que d’habitude simplement parce que c’est un week-end. Cependant, il est souhaitable de consommer les nutriments uniformément en petites quantités et de consommer de l'énergie en faisant de l'exercice approprié si vous mangez trop.

#######

Most people eat more on weekends than on weekdays. You eat out for a meal with family or an appointment with friends, and even if you don't eat out, you often overeat because you think you need to take in the nutrients you normally lack. However, too much is the same as not enough, so even if you supplement the nutrients you normally lack, if you eat too much, you can feel more tired on Monday. On the weekends, the amount of activity decreases and there is not much opportunity to consume the energy accumulated due to overeating, so the body feels heavier on Mondays. Therefore, it is not good to eat more than usual just because it is a weekend. However, it is desirable to consume nutrients evenly in small amounts and to consume energy through proper exercise if you overeat.
g_text_translate.es:
La mayoría de la gente come más los fines de semana que entre semana. Usted come fuera de casa para una comida con su familia o una cita con amigos, e incluso si no sale a comer, a menudo come en exceso porque cree que necesita ingerir los nutrientes que normalmente le faltan. Sin embargo, demasiado es lo mismo que poco, por lo que incluso si complementas los nutrientes que normalmente te faltan, si comes demasiado, puedes sentirte más cansado el lunes. Los fines de semana la cantidad de actividad disminuye y no hay muchas oportunidades de consumir la energía acumulada por comer en exceso, por lo que el cuerpo se siente más pesado los lunes. Por tanto, no es bueno comer más de lo habitual sólo porque es fin de semana. Sin embargo, es deseable consumir nutrientes de manera uniforme en pequeñas cantidades y consumir energía mediante el ejercicio adecuado si se come en exceso.

g_text_translate.id:
Kebanyakan orang makan lebih banyak pada akhir pekan dibandingkan pada hari kerja. Anda makan di luar untuk makan bersama keluarga atau janji dengan teman, dan bahkan jika Anda tidak makan di luar, Anda sering makan berlebihan karena Anda merasa perlu mengonsumsi nutrisi yang biasanya kurang. Namun, terlalu banyak sama dengan tidak cukup, jadi meskipun Anda menambah nutrisi yang biasanya kurang, jika Anda makan terlalu banyak, Anda bisa merasa lebih lelah di hari Senin. Di akhir pekan, jumlah aktivitas berkurang dan tidak banyak kesempatan untuk menghabiskan energi yang terkumpul akibat makan berlebihan, sehingga badan terasa lebih berat di hari Senin. Oleh karena itu, tidak baik makan lebih banyak dari biasanya hanya karena ini adalah akhir pekan. Namun, disarankan untuk mengonsumsi nutrisi secara merata dalam jumlah kecil dan mengonsumsi energi melalui olahraga yang benar jika Anda makan berlebihan.

g_text_translate.ja:
ほとんどの人は平日よりも週末のほうがたくさん食べます。家族との食事や友人との約束で外食をしたり、外食しなくても普段不足している栄養素を摂取しなければと考えて食べ過ぎてしまうことが多いです。ただし、多すぎると足りないのと同じなので、普段不足している栄養素を補っても、食べすぎると月曜日の疲れが強くなってしまいます。週末は活動量が減り、食べ過ぎで溜まったエネルギーを消費する機会が少ないため、月曜日になると体が重く感じられます。そのため、週末だからといっていつもよりたくさん食べてしまうのはよくありません。ただし、少量の栄養素を満遍なく摂取し、食べ過ぎた場合は適度な運動でエネルギーを消費することが望ましいです。

g_text_translate.de:
Die meisten Menschen essen am Wochenende mehr als an Wochentagen. Sie gehen zum Essen mit der Familie oder zu einem Termin mit Freunden auswärts, und selbst wenn Sie nicht auswärts essen, essen Sie oft zu viel, weil Sie denken, Sie müssten die Nährstoffe zu sich nehmen, die Ihnen normalerweise fehlen. Zu viel ist jedoch gleichbedeutend mit nicht genug. Selbst wenn Sie die Nährstoffe ergänzen, die Ihnen normalerweise fehlen, können Sie sich am Montag müder fühlen, wenn Sie zu viel essen. An den Wochenenden nimmt die Aktivität ab und es besteht nicht mehr viel Gelegenheit, die durch übermäßiges Essen angesammelte Energie zu verbrauchen, sodass sich der Körper montags schwerer anfühlt. Daher ist es nicht gut, mehr als gewöhnlich zu essen, nur weil Wochenende ist. Es ist jedoch wünschenswert, die Nährstoffe gleichmäßig in kleinen Mengen zu sich zu nehmen und bei Überernährung durch entsprechende Bewegung Energie zu verbrauchen.

g_text_translate.zh-CN:
大多数人周末比工作日吃得更多。你和家人一起出去吃饭或者和朋友约会，即使你不出去吃饭，你也经常吃得过多，因为你认为你需要摄入平时缺乏的营养。然而，太多就等于不够，所以即使补充了平时缺乏的营养，如果吃得太多，周一也会感觉更累。周末活动量减少，没有太多机会消耗因暴饮暴食而积累的能量，因此周一身体感觉较重。因此，仅仅因为是周末就吃得比平常多是不好的。但如果吃得过多，最好是少量均匀地摄入营养，并通过适当的运动来消耗能量。

g_text_translate.ru:
Большинство людей едят больше по выходным, чем в будние дни. Вы едите вне дома, чтобы пообедать с семьей или пойти на встречу с друзьями, и даже если вы не едите вне дома, вы часто переедаете, потому что думаете, что вам необходимо восполнить питательные вещества, которых вам обычно не хватает. Однако слишком много — это то же самое, что недостаточно, поэтому, даже если вы дополняете питательные вещества, которых вам обычно не хватает, если вы едите слишком много, вы можете чувствовать себя более уставшим в понедельник. В выходные количество активности снижается и возможностей расходовать накопленную за счет переедания энергию не так много, поэтому в понедельник тело чувствует себя тяжелее. Поэтому нехорошо есть больше обычного только потому, что сегодня выходные. Однако желательно потреблять питательные вещества равномерно в небольших количествах и расходовать энергию за счет правильных физических упражнений, если вы переедаете.

A maioria das pessoas come mais nos finais de semana do que durante a semana. Você come fora para uma refeição com a família ou um encontro com amigos e, mesmo que não coma fora, muitas vezes come demais porque acha que precisa ingerir os nutrientes que normalmente lhe faltam. Porém, muito é o mesmo que falta, então mesmo que você complemente os nutrientes que normalmente falta, se comer demais, poderá se sentir mais cansado na segunda-feira. Nos finais de semana, a quantidade de atividade diminui e não há muita oportunidade de consumir a energia acumulada devido à alimentação excessiva, por isso o corpo fica mais pesado às segundas-feiras. Portanto, não é bom comer mais do que o habitual só porque é fim de semana. No entanto, é desejável consumir nutrientes uniformemente em pequenas quantidades e consumir energia através de exercícios adequados, caso coma demais.

g_text_translate.hi:
अधिकांश लोग सप्ताह के दिनों की तुलना में सप्ताहांत पर अधिक खाते हैं। आप परिवार के साथ भोजन के लिए या दोस्तों के साथ अपॉइंटमेंट पर बाहर खाना खाते हैं, और भले ही आप बाहर खाना नहीं खाते हैं, आप अक्सर अधिक खा लेते हैं क्योंकि आपको लगता है कि आपको उन पोषक तत्वों को लेने की ज़रूरत है जिनकी आपके पास आमतौर पर कमी होती है। हालाँकि, बहुत अधिक पर्याप्त न होने के समान है, इसलिए भले ही आप उन पोषक तत्वों की पूर्ति करते हैं जिनकी आमतौर पर कमी होती है, यदि आप बहुत अधिक खाते हैं, तो आप सोमवार को अधिक थकान महसूस कर सकते हैं। सप्ताहांत पर, गतिविधि की मात्रा कम हो जाती है और अधिक खाने के कारण जमा हुई ऊर्जा का उपभोग करने का अधिक अवसर नहीं मिलता है, इसलिए सोमवार को शरीर भारी महसूस होता है। इसलिए, केवल सप्ताहांत होने के कारण सामान्य से अधिक खाना अच्छा नहीं है। हालाँकि, पोषक तत्वों का समान रूप से कम मात्रा में उपभोग करना और यदि आप अधिक भोजन करते हैं तो उचित व्यायाम के माध्यम से ऊर्जा का उपभोग करना वांछनीय है।

g_text_translate.tr:
Çoğu insan hafta sonları hafta içi günlerden daha fazla yemek yiyor. Ailenizle birlikte yemek yemek için veya arkadaşlarınızla randevu için dışarıda yemek yiyorsunuz ve dışarıda yemeseniz bile, normalde eksik olduğunuz besinleri almanız gerektiğini düşündüğünüz için sıklıkla aşırı yiyorsunuz. Ancak çok fazlası, yetersiz olmakla aynı şeydir, bu nedenle normalde eksik olduğunuz besinleri takviye etseniz bile, çok fazla yerseniz Pazartesi günü kendinizi daha yorgun hissedebilirsiniz. Hafta sonları aktivite miktarı azaldığından aşırı yeme nedeniyle biriken enerjiyi tüketme fırsatı çok fazla olmadığından pazartesi günleri vücut daha ağır hissedilir. Bu nedenle hafta sonu olduğu için normalden fazla yemek yemek iyi değildir. Ancak besin maddelerini küçük miktarlarda ve eşit miktarda tüketmek, aşırı yemek yemeniz durumunda ise doğru egzersiz yaparak enerji tüketmek arzu edilir.

general.g_text: 요즘 사람들의 가장 큰 특징 중의 하나는 시각적인 요소를 중시하는 점이다. '백문이 불여일견'이란 말이 있듯이 백 번 듣는 것보다 한 번의 강한 시각적 이미지가 머릿속에 각인되면 기억에 더 오래 남는다. 이런 경향에 맞춰 기업들도 광고를 할 때 시각적인 요소에 주의를 기울여야 한다. 짧은 시간에 소비자들의 (        ) 사진 또는 영상을 준비하는 것이 좋다.

g_text_translate.vi: Một trong những đặc điểm lớn nhất của con người ngày nay là yếu tố thị giác được coi là quan trọng. Giống như câu 'Trăm nghe không bằng một thấy', nếu một hình ảnh thị giác mạnh mẽ được khắc sâu trong đầu một lần thì sẽ để lại trong trí nhớ lâu hơn so với một trăm lần nghe. Để phù hợp với xu hướng này, các doanh nghiệp cũng phải chú ý đến yếu tố thị giác khi quảng cáo. Nên chuẩn bị ảnh hoặc video (        ) của người tiêu dùng trong một thời gian ngắn.
g_text_translate.en: One of the biggest characteristics of people these days is that they value visual elements. As the saying goes, 'a sight is worth a thousand words', a strong visual image that is imprinted in your mind once is more memorable than hearing it a hundred times. In line with this trend, companies should also pay attention to visual elements when advertising. It is good to prepare photos or videos that attract consumers' attention in a short time.
g_text_translate.it:
Una delle più grandi caratteristiche delle persone al giorno d'oggi è che danno valore agli elementi visivi. Come dice il proverbio, "uno spettacolo vale più di mille parole", un'immagine visiva forte che rimane impressa nella tua mente una volta è più memorabile che ascoltata cento volte. In linea con questa tendenza, le aziende dovrebbero prestare attenzione anche agli elementi visivi quando fanno pubblicità. È bene preparare foto o video che attirino l'attenzione dei consumatori in breve tempo.

#######

One of the biggest characteristics of people these days is that they value visual elements. As the saying goes, 'a sight is worth a thousand words', a strong visual image that is imprinted in your mind once is more memorable than hearing it a hundred times. In line with this trend, companies should also pay attention to visual elements when advertising. It is good to prepare photos or videos that attract consumers' attention in a short time.
g_text_translate.fr:
L’une des plus grandes caractéristiques des gens de nos jours est qu’ils accordent de l’importance aux éléments visuels. Comme le dit le proverbe, « une vue vaut mille mots », une image visuelle forte qui s'imprime une fois dans votre esprit est plus mémorable que de l'entendre cent fois. Conformément à cette tendance, les entreprises doivent également prêter attention aux éléments visuels lors de leur publicité. Il est bon de préparer des photos ou des vidéos qui attirent l'attention des consommateurs en peu de temps.

#######

One of the biggest characteristics of people these days is that they value visual elements. As the saying goes, 'a sight is worth a thousand words', a strong visual image that is imprinted in your mind once is more memorable than hearing it a hundred times. In line with this trend, companies should also pay attention to visual elements when advertising. It is good to prepare photos or videos that attract consumers' attention in a short time.
g_text_translate.es:
Una de las características más importantes de la gente hoy en día es que valoran los elementos visuales. Como dice el refrán, "una vista vale más que mil palabras", una imagen visual fuerte que queda impresa en tu mente una vez es más memorable que escucharla cien veces. En línea con esta tendencia, las empresas también deberían prestar atención a los elementos visuales a la hora de hacer publicidad. Es bueno preparar fotografías o vídeos que llamen la atención de los consumidores en poco tiempo.

#######

One of the biggest characteristics of people these days is that they value visual elements. As the saying goes, 'a sight is worth a thousand words', a strong visual image that is imprinted in your mind once is more memorable than hearing it a hundred times. In line with this trend, companies should also pay attention to visual elements when advertising. It is good to prepare photos or videos that attract consumers' attention in a short time.
g_text_translate.id:
Salah satu karakteristik terbesar orang saat ini adalah mereka menghargai elemen visual. Seperti kata pepatah, 'sebuah pemandangan bernilai ribuan kata', gambaran visual kuat yang terpatri dalam pikiran Anda sekali lebih berkesan daripada mendengarnya ratusan kali. Sejalan dengan tren tersebut, perusahaan juga harus memperhatikan elemen visual saat beriklan. Ada baiknya menyiapkan foto atau video yang menarik perhatian konsumen dalam waktu singkat.

#######

One of the biggest characteristics of people these days is that they value visual elements. As the saying goes, 'a sight is worth a thousand words', a strong visual image that is imprinted in your mind once is more memorable than hearing it a hundred times. In line with this trend, companies should also pay attention to visual elements when advertising. It is good to prepare photos or videos that attract consumers' attention in a short time.
g_text_translate.ja:
現代人の最大の特徴は、視覚的な要素を大切にすることです。 「百聞は一見に如かず」という言葉があるように、一度心に焼き付けられた強烈なビジュアルイメージは、100回聞くよりも記憶に残ります。この傾向に合わせて、企業は広告を掲載する際に視覚的な要素にも注意を払う必要があります。消費者の注目を集める写真や動画を短時間で準備すると良いでしょう。

#######

g_text_translate.de:
Eines der größten Merkmale der Menschen heutzutage ist, dass sie visuelle Elemente schätzen. Wie das Sprichwort sagt: „Ein Anblick sagt mehr als tausend Worte.“ Ein starkes visuelles Bild, das sich einmal in Ihrem Gedächtnis eingeprägt hat, ist unvergesslicher, als es hundertmal zu hören. Diesem Trend folgend sollten Unternehmen auch bei der Werbung auf visuelle Elemente achten. Es ist gut, Fotos oder Videos vorzubereiten, die in kurzer Zeit die Aufmerksamkeit der Verbraucher erregen.

g_text_translate.ru:
Одной из важнейших характеристик современных людей является то, что они ценят визуальные элементы. Как говорится, «взгляд стоит тысячи слов», сильный визуальный образ, отпечатавшийся в вашем сознании один раз, запоминается лучше, чем услышанный сто раз. В соответствии с этой тенденцией компаниям также следует уделять внимание визуальным элементам при рекламе. g_text_translate.pt:

g_text_translate.hi:
आजकल लोगों की सबसे बड़ी विशेषताओं में से एक यह है कि वे दृश्य तत्वों को महत्व देते हैं। जैसा कि कहा जाता है, 'एक दृश्य हजारों शब्दों के बराबर होता है', एक मजबूत दृश्य छवि जो आपके दिमाग में एक बार अंकित हो जाती है, उसे सौ बार सुनने की तुलना में अधिक यादगार होती है। इस प्रवृत्ति के अनुरूप, कंपनियों को विज्ञापन देते समय दृश्य तत्वों पर भी ध्यान देना चाहिए। कम समय में उपभोक्ताओं का ध्यान आकर्षित करने वाली तस्वीरें या वीडियो तैयार करना अच्छा है।

Bu trend doğrultusunda firmaların reklam yaparken görsel unsurlara da dikkat etmesi gerekiyor. Tüketicilerin dikkatini çekecek fotoğraf veya videoları kısa sürede hazırlamak iyidir.

3. Quảng cáo bằng hình ảnh hoặc video trở nên phổ biến.

explain.en:
Choose the central thought of the paragraph.
1. These days, people value what they can see.
2. The key to advertising is a memorable visual image.
3. Advertisements made with photos or videos are popular.
4. What you see without sound is more memorable.

A strong visual image that is imprinted in your mind once is more memorable than hearing it a hundred times. So 2 is the correct answer.

3. Le pubblicità realizzate con foto o video sono popolari.
4. Ciò che vedi senza audio è più memorabile.

Un'immagine visiva forte che rimane impressa nella tua mente una volta è più memorabile che ascoltarla cento volte. Quindi 2 è la risposta corretta.

段落の中心となる考えを選択します。

2. 広告の鍵は記憶に残るビジュアルイメージです。
3. 写真やビデオを使った広告が人気です。
4. 音なしで見たほうが記憶に残ります。
--------------------
一度心に焼き付けられた強烈なビジュアルイメージは、100回聞くよりも記憶に残ります。したがって、2が正解です。

#######

Choose the central thought of the paragraph.
1. These days, people value what they can see.
2. The key to advertising is a memorable visual image.
3. Advertisements made with photos or videos are popular.
4. What you see without sound is more memorable.
--------------------
A strong visual image that is imprinted in your mind once is more memorable than hearing it a hundred times. So 2 is the correct answer.

general.g_text: 요즘 젊은층의 대화에서는 말을 줄여 쓰거나 새로운 단어를 만들어 사용하는 등의 통신 언어가 많이 사용되고 있다. 통신 언어는 원래 인터넷 채팅이나 게시판, 문자 메시지 등에서 사람들이 보다 빠르고 편리하게 의사소통을 하기 위해 만들어 사용하는 말들이었다. 그런데 요즘은 젊은층의 일상적인 대화에서도 그러한 통신 언어가 흔히 사용되고 있는 것이다. 신문이나 인터넷 뉴스 등에서 젊은층의 잘못된 언어 사용 문제가 (        ) 경우가 많은데 대부분 언어 규칙에서 벗어난 표현을 마음대로 만들어 사용하는 것과 관계가 있다. 따라서 가능하면 문자 메시지나 인터넷 상에서도 바른 언어를 사용해야 하며 특히 통신 언어로서 만들어진 것을 일상적인 언어생활에서 남용하는 일이 없도록 노력해야 한다.

g_text_translate.vi: Trong các cuộc trò chuyện của giới trẻ hiện nay, ngôn ngữ mạng như viết tắt từ hay tạo từ mới được sử dụng rất nhiều. Ngôn ngữ mạng ban đầu được tạo ra và được sử dụng bởi mọi người trong trò chuyện Internet, bảng thông báo hay tin nhắn văn bản để giao tiếp nhanh hơn và thuận tiện hơn. Tuy nhiên, gần đây, ngôn ngữ mạng như vậy cũng được sử dụng phổ biến trong các cuộc trò chuyện hàng ngày của giới trẻ. Trên báo chí và tin tức Internet, vấn đề sử dụng sai ngôn ngữ của giới trẻ thường xuyên (        ), nhưng phần lớn liên quan đến việc tạo ra và sử dụng những cách diễn đạt lệch lạc với các quy tắc của ngôn ngữ. Vì vậy, nếu có thể, nên sử dụng ngôn ngữ chính xác cho tin nhắn văn bản và trên Internet, đồng thời nỗ lực không lạm dụng cái được tạo ra với tư cách là ngôn ngữ mạng làm ngôn ngữ giao tiếp trong cuộc sống hàng ngày.
g_text_translate.en: These days, communication language such as abbreviation or creating new words is widely used in conversations among young people. Communication languages were originally words created and used by people to communicate more quickly and conveniently in Internet chatting, bulletin boards, and text messages. However, these days, such communication language is commonly used in everyday conversation among young people. In newspapers and Internet news, the problem of young people's incorrect use of language often comes up on the cutting board, and most of them are related to freely creating and using expressions that deviate from language rules. Therefore, if possible, use the right language even in text messages or on the Internet, and in particular, try not to abuse what was created as a communication language in everyday language life.
g_text_translate.it:
Al giorno d'oggi, nelle conversazioni tra i giovani è ampiamente utilizzato un linguaggio di comunicazione come l'abbreviazione o la creazione di nuove parole. I linguaggi di comunicazione erano originariamente parole create e utilizzate dalle persone per comunicare in modo più rapido e conveniente nelle chat su Internet, nelle bacheche e nei messaggi di testo. Tuttavia, al giorno d’oggi, tale linguaggio comunicativo è comunemente usato nelle conversazioni quotidiane tra i giovani. Nei giornali e nelle notizie su Internet spesso emerge il problema dell'uso scorretto della lingua da parte dei giovani, e la maggior parte di essi sono legati alla libera creazione e all'utilizzo di espressioni che si discostano dalle regole linguistiche. Utilizzate quindi, se possibile, il linguaggio giusto anche negli sms o su Internet, e soprattutto cercate di non abusare di quello che è nato come linguaggio di comunicazione nella vita linguistica di tutti i giorni.

#######

These days, communication language such as abbreviation or creating new words is widely used in conversations among young people. Communication languages were originally words created and used by people to communicate more quickly and conveniently in Internet chatting, bulletin boards, and text messages. However, these days, such communication language is commonly used in everyday conversation among young people. In newspapers and Internet news, the problem of young people's incorrect use of language often comes up on the cutting board, and most of them are related to freely creating and using expressions that deviate from language rules. Therefore, if possible, use the right language even in text messages or on the Internet, and in particular, try not to abuse what was created as a communication language in everyday language life.
g_text_translate.fr:
De nos jours, les langages de communication tels que l'abréviation ou la création de nouveaux mots sont largement utilisés dans les conversations entre jeunes. Les langages de communication étaient à l'origine des mots créés et utilisés par les gens pour communiquer plus rapidement et plus facilement dans les discussions sur Internet, les tableaux d'affichage et les messages texte. Cependant, de nos jours, ce langage de communication est couramment utilisé dans les conversations quotidiennes des jeunes. Dans les journaux et sur Internet, le problème de l'utilisation incorrecte de la langue par les jeunes revient souvent sur la planche à découper, et la plupart d'entre eux sont liés à la création et à l'utilisation libres d'expressions qui s'écartent des règles linguistiques. Par conséquent, si possible, utilisez le bon langage même dans les messages texte ou sur Internet et, en particulier, essayez de ne pas abuser de ce qui a été créé comme langage de communication dans la vie linguistique de tous les jours.

#######

Therefore, if possible, use the right language even in text messages or on the Internet, and in particular, try not to abuse what was created as a communication language in everyday language life.
g_text_translate.es:
Hoy en día, el lenguaje de comunicación, como las abreviaturas o la creación de nuevas palabras, se utiliza mucho en las conversaciones entre los jóvenes. Los lenguajes de comunicación fueron originalmente palabras creadas y utilizadas por personas para comunicarse de manera más rápida y conveniente en chats de Internet, tableros de anuncios y mensajes de texto. Sin embargo, hoy en día, este lenguaje de comunicación se utiliza comúnmente en las conversaciones cotidianas entre los jóvenes. En los periódicos y en las noticias de Internet, el problema del uso incorrecto del lenguaje por parte de los jóvenes surge a menudo en la tabla de cortar, y la mayoría de ellos están relacionados con la creación y el uso libre de expresiones que se desvían de las reglas del lenguaje. Por lo tanto, si es posible, utilice el lenguaje correcto incluso en los mensajes de texto o en Internet y, en particular, trate de no abusar de lo que se creó como lenguaje de comunicación en la vida lingüística cotidiana.

#######

g_text_translate.id:
Saat ini, bahasa komunikasi seperti menyingkat atau membuat kata baru banyak digunakan dalam percakapan di kalangan anak muda. Bahasa komunikasi awalnya adalah kata-kata yang dibuat dan digunakan oleh orang-orang untuk berkomunikasi dengan lebih cepat dan nyaman dalam obrolan Internet, papan buletin, dan pesan teks. Namun, saat ini bahasa komunikasi seperti itu sudah lazim digunakan dalam percakapan sehari-hari di kalangan anak muda. Di surat kabar dan berita Internet, masalah kesalahan penggunaan bahasa oleh kaum muda sering kali muncul begitu saja, dan sebagian besar terkait dengan kebebasan menciptakan dan menggunakan ekspresi yang menyimpang dari kaidah bahasa. Oleh karena itu, jika memungkinkan, gunakan bahasa yang tepat bahkan dalam pesan teks atau di Internet, dan khususnya, usahakan untuk tidak menyalahgunakan apa yang diciptakan sebagai bahasa komunikasi dalam kehidupan bahasa sehari-hari.

#######

g_text_translate.ja:
昨今、若者の間では、略語や新しい言葉を作るなどのコミュニケーション言語が会話の中で広く使われています。コミュニケーション言語はもともと、インターネットのチャット、掲示板、テキスト メッセージでより迅速かつ便利にコミュニケーションを図るために人々によって作成され使用された言葉です。しかし、最近では、若者の間では日常会話でこのようなコミュニケーション言語が普通に使われています。新聞やインターネットのニュースなどで、青少年の誤った言語使用の問題がよくまな板の上に上がりますが、その多くは言語のルールから逸脱した表現を自由に創作・使用することに関するものです。したがって、テキストメッセージやインターネット上であっても、可能であれば正しい言語を使用し、特にコミュニケーション言語として作られたものを日常の言語生活で乱用しないようにしてください。

#######

These days, communication language such as abbreviation or creating new words is widely used in conversations among young people. In newspapers and Internet news, the problem of young people's incorrect use of language often comes up on the cutting board, and most of them are related to freely creating and using expressions that deviate from language rules. Therefore, if possible, use the right language even in text messages or on the Internet, and in particular, try not to abuse what was created as a communication language in everyday language life.
g_text_translate.de:
Heutzutage werden in Gesprächen unter jungen Menschen häufig Kommunikationssprachen wie Abkürzungen oder das Erfinden neuer Wörter verwendet. Kommunikationssprachen waren ursprünglich Wörter, die von Menschen geschaffen und verwendet wurden, um in Internet-Chats, schwarzen Brettern und Textnachrichten schneller und bequemer zu kommunizieren. Heutzutage wird eine solche Kommunikationssprache jedoch häufig in alltäglichen Gesprächen unter jungen Menschen verwendet. In Zeitungen und Internetnachrichten wird häufig das Problem des falschen Sprachgebrauchs junger Menschen thematisiert, und die meisten davon beziehen sich auf die freie Bildung und Verwendung von Ausdrücken, die von den Sprachregeln abweichen. Verwenden Sie daher nach Möglichkeit auch in Textnachrichten oder im Internet die richtige Sprache und versuchen Sie insbesondere, das, was als Kommunikationssprache geschaffen wurde, nicht im alltäglichen Sprachleben zu missbrauchen.

#######

These days, communication language such as abbreviation or creating new words is widely used in conversations among young people. Communication languages were originally words created and used by people to communicate more quickly and conveniently in Internet chatting, bulletin boards, and text messages. However, these days, such communication language is commonly used in everyday conversation among young people. In newspapers and Internet news, the problem of young people's incorrect use of language often comes up on the cutting board, and most of them are related to freely creating and using expressions that deviate from language rules. Therefore, if possible, use the right language even in text messages or on the Internet, and in particular, try not to abuse what was created as a communication language in everyday language life.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
如今，缩写或创造新词等交流语言在年轻人的对话中被广泛使用。交流语言最初是人们为了在网络聊天、公告板和短信中更快速、更方便地交流而创造和使用的词语。然而，如今，这种交流语言已广泛应用于年轻人的日常对话中。报纸和网络新闻中，年轻人错误使用语言的问题经常被摆在案板上，其中大部分与随意创造和使用偏离语言规则的表达方式有关。因此，如果可能的话，即使在短信或互联网上也请使用正确的语言，尤其是尽量不要滥用在日常语言生活中作为交流语言而创建的语言。

#######

However, these days, such communication language is commonly used in everyday conversation among young people. In newspapers and Internet news, the problem of young people's incorrect use of language often comes up on the cutting board, and most of them are related to freely creating and using expressions that deviate from language rules. g_text_translate.zh-TW:
如今，縮寫或創造新詞等交流語言在年輕人的對話中被廣泛使用。交流語言最初是人們為了在網絡聊天、公告板和短信中更快速、更方便地交流而創造和使用的詞語。然而，如今，這種交流語言已廣泛應用於年輕人的日常對話中。報紙和網絡新聞中，年輕人錯誤使用語言的問題經常被擺在案板上，其中大部分與隨意創造和使用偏離語言規則的表達方式有關。因此，如果可能的話，即使在短信或互聯網上也請使用正確的語言，尤其是盡量不要濫用在日常語言生活中作為交流語言而創建的語言。

g_text_translate.ru:
В наши дни в разговорах среди молодежи широко используются такие языки общения, как сокращения или создание новых слов. Языки общения изначально представляли собой слова, созданные и используемые людьми для более быстрого и удобного общения в Интернет-чатах, на досках объявлений и в текстовых сообщениях. Однако в наши дни такой язык общения широко используется в повседневной беседе среди молодежи. В газетах и ​​новостях Интернета на разделочной доске часто поднимается проблема неправильного использования языка молодыми людьми, и большинство из них связано со свободным созданием и использованием выражений, отклоняющихся от языковых правил. Поэтому по возможности используйте правильный язык даже в текстовых сообщениях или в Интернете и, в частности, старайтесь не злоупотреблять тем, что создано как язык общения в повседневной языковой жизни.

g_text_translate.th:
ในปัจจุบัน ภาษาในการสื่อสาร เช่น การใช้คำย่อหรือการสร้างคำศัพท์ใหม่ๆ ถูกนำมาใช้กันอย่างแพร่หลายในการสนทนาระหว่างคนหนุ่มสาว ภาษาการสื่อสารเดิมทีเป็นคำที่ผู้คนสร้างขึ้นและใช้เพื่อการสื่อสารที่รวดเร็วและสะดวกยิ่งขึ้นในการสนทนาทางอินเทอร์เน็ต กระดานข่าว และข้อความตัวอักษร อย่าง​ไร​ก็​ดี ใน​ปัจจุบัน ภาษา​การ​สื่อ​ความ​เช่น​นั้น​มัก​ใช้​กัน​ใน​การ​สนทนา​กับ​วัยรุ่น​ทุก​วัน. ในหนังสือพิมพ์และข่าวทางอินเทอร์เน็ต ปัญหาการใช้ภาษาที่ไม่ถูกต้องของคนหนุ่มสาวมักจะเป็นปัญหา และปัญหาส่วนใหญ่เกี่ยวข้องกับการสร้างและใช้สำนวนอย่างอิสระที่ผิดไปจากกฎเกณฑ์ทางภาษา ดังนั้น หากเป็นไปได้ ให้ใช้ภาษาที่ถูกต้องแม้จะอยู่ในข้อความหรือบนอินเทอร์เน็ต และโดยเฉพาะอย่างยิ่ง พยายามอย่าใช้ภาษาที่ถูกสร้างขึ้นเป็นภาษาสื่อสารในชีวิตประจำวันในทางที่ผิด

g_text_translate.pt:
Hoje em dia, a linguagem de comunicação, como abreviar ou criar novas palavras, é muito utilizada nas conversas entre os jovens. As linguagens de comunicação foram originalmente palavras criadas e usadas pelas pessoas para se comunicarem de forma mais rápida e conveniente em bate-papos na Internet, quadros de avisos e mensagens de texto. No entanto, hoje em dia, essa linguagem de comunicação é comumente usada nas conversas cotidianas entre os jovens. Nos jornais e nas notícias da Internet, o problema do uso incorreto da linguagem pelos jovens surge frequentemente na tábua de corte, e a maioria deles está relacionada com a criação e utilização livres de expressões que se desviam das regras linguísticas. Portanto, se possível, utilize a linguagem correta mesmo nas mensagens de texto ou na Internet e, principalmente, procure não abusar do que foi criado como linguagem de comunicação no cotidiano linguístico.

g_text_translate.hi:
आजकल, युवा लोगों के बीच बातचीत में संक्षिप्तीकरण या नए शब्द बनाने जैसी संचार भाषा का व्यापक रूप से उपयोग किया जाता है। संचार भाषाएँ मूल रूप से ऐसे शब्द थे जो लोगों द्वारा इंटरनेट चैटिंग, बुलेटिन बोर्ड और टेक्स्ट संदेशों में अधिक तेज़ी से और आसानी से संचार करने के लिए बनाए और उपयोग किए जाते थे। हालाँकि, आजकल, युवाओं के बीच रोजमर्रा की बातचीत में ऐसी संचार भाषा का उपयोग आमतौर पर किया जाता है। समाचार पत्रों और इंटरनेट समाचारों में, युवा लोगों द्वारा भाषा के गलत उपयोग की समस्या अक्सर कटिंग बोर्ड पर आती है, और उनमें से अधिकांश भाषा के नियमों से विचलित अभिव्यक्तियों को स्वतंत्र रूप से बनाने और उपयोग करने से संबंधित हैं। इसलिए, यदि संभव हो, तो टेक्स्ट संदेशों या इंटरनेट पर भी सही भाषा का उपयोग करें और विशेष रूप से, रोजमर्रा की भाषा के जीवन में संचार भाषा के रूप में बनाई गई भाषा का दुरुपयोग न करने का प्रयास करें।

g_text_translate.tr:
Günümüzde gençler arasındaki konuşmalarda kısaltma veya yeni kelime oluşturma gibi iletişim dili yaygın olarak kullanılmaktadır. İletişim dilleri başlangıçta insanlar tarafından İnternet sohbetlerinde, bülten panolarında ve metin mesajlarında daha hızlı ve rahat iletişim kurmak için oluşturulan ve kullanılan kelimelerdi. Ancak günümüzde gençler arasında günlük konuşmalarda bu tür iletişim dili yaygın olarak kullanılmaktadır. Gazetelerde ve internet haberlerinde gençlerin dili yanlış kullanma sorunu sıklıkla gündeme geliyor ve bunların çoğu dil kurallarına aykırı ifadeleri özgürce oluşturup kullanmakla ilgili. Bu nedenle mümkünse kısa mesajlarda veya internette bile doğru dili kullanın ve özellikle günlük dil yaşamında iletişim dili olarak yaratılan dili kötüye kullanmamaya çalışın.
